subject: Our last chance

body:
| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this [link.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_t=upJ6SzJeZlfEQ9yQ-_48YjHc2yT-kGllq-T1erbnU97nSY05yp6BkRh4UwQGotxotsKKb6wCryT__lxl8_StPN7DZgMQ_ecToCCielxx0R7upyUMkoZtGPsrUeY4gJkk)
---
Friend,

This October, I've been hitting the road to support Republicans up and down the ballot.

The final campaign surge has already begun, but I'm asking you today to support our efforts to turn Virginia red.

[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlh5C-9DBgGql9E33hllsH3xF7sRbREDuUsmEtjKWDk1Rz2kRbHQ8kskVv0Evnm-4Y_MwQ8yEolhJZHFnEcq61UyKvmMCK2MYKeV32bCeCV8qiEKUgEfUNJP1R7q-RgFxnuFTGMYMRWUfGHeEiAhgeHNRSfvmBWgUdo40Z_wn0pja4%3D)
---
[**> >> FIGHT FOR VIRGINIA WITH JASON <<<**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlhT_TP0dHdBvO55XmUUgy6m5c3xvvvsDqL4hVZ_DdzoTNS5ymDsxMuR0IdjPghfRK_tcJM3I8EO7v71FjvL2lmnW5ZLa6wRB7eSimPhF7IiR1INb7AnqGlx7rMCqJqnANXin3Ze1B2UPkv3OIOvO-sXVR47HkBAWY1_qWlapcarfo%3D)
---
It's not just about the presidency -- it's about the importance of electing common-sense conservative leaders up and down the ballot.

We've got an incredible candidate for Senate. We've got competitive congressional districts across the Commonwealth. And we've got the energy on the ground to make those victories happen -- if we act.

**Virginia isn 't just our surprise swing state this year. The roads to majorities in Congress could very well run right through Virginia.**

---
[**> >> LET'S WIN VIRGINIA <<<**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlhU41cXA2cgfVAT5Jy3StYB0U3p7LyN7UceC7YyRHl47QDG6xR1hAf5dEO0B20zYzmG6OTyao9iwoHNWhRXns8RA7hm8F5dHpy_WB5gVXKhVFV8-8zxbAUjK7XBZRjCJPq3bYk-EWB261-ZfU9AJk3lmcwcjzpgcKNwyCy0cGs5Fc%3D)
---
That's why I'm mobilizing resources online and on the road to reach voters and turn Virginia red in these final days.

[**To support these efforts, we 're running an urgent end-of-month fundraising surge to power us through Election Day.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlhlPfuzPqDJX28WK81dz4FgUNncPykl8l3L0j5Dr8T74bXlKt7QLtoglrMSdKnx7GEGzzDWhXH7VUIo7cWFB2AVGfahr1g4_kGdD-YdpxWaB2bikZVobNCTKP4f8IRAhaeNBEatZyRw8gv7wLhnA8BiaGK8xTPLuxK7cZrzSe0Xhg%3D) We only have DAYS left until the book closes on the 2024 election for good, so we need to act now.

Friend, can I count on you to be by my side while we fight for Virginia? Please, pitch in anything you can.

---
[**> >> CHIP IN TO OUR FINAL PUSH FUND NOW <<<**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlhOJHhKThaHN_x92YWNfbNoKgcg83MHw7XLrp9_o85haPWgbrVJDJuGo_IcMupaiIWHtnJkNj_UAquoCBXhCHI_Qkj6zTKenZvdME5ntt8EIgVuFTK0i6mAr4GhW9t2undxW7VGAG8Ya8ChF_jC5j81Fx_fGsucOyR_9Io-MvQglM%3D)
---
Thank you,
Jason Miyares
Virginia Attorney General

---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlhmgaR7AinP_YTxPUQq-ibAQm24LdYb8WgWpsTzF9Ma_bMUy4_fmt1cfhVVfH048LTLNrnFGxWCVsFvE3Y_EelM16bYkhtvjFI0fHgNFSHWm0-caKWsCYHm5s7g-uBwgWAtJ4_TnOyxInPIJ0IzCdMR4gnoHQxUIZdzIl-y4L48C4%3D)

_**WHO IS JASON MIYARES AND WHY IS HE WRITING TO ME?**_ _Jason Miyares is the Attorney General of Virginia -- but his story doesn't start in Virginia... _ It starts in Havana, Cuba, when his mother, Miriam Miyares, fled communist Cuba penniless and homeless. She immigrated to Virginia and raised Jason to appreciate freedom, fairness, and justice for all. In 2015, almost fifty years to the day that she fled Cuba, Miriam was able to vote for Jason to represent her in the Virginia House of Delegates. After working as a prosecutor and serving for three terms in the state legislature, he ran and was elected the 48th Attorney General of Virginia. Since his inauguration in January 2022, Jason has been focused on fighting violent crime and improving public safety, strengthening economic growth, combatting the deadly impact of opioids and fentanyl, and protecting Virginians from corporate misconduct. He's been fearless in standing up for the rule of law by challenging the Biden-Harris Administration whenever it tries to use lawfare to advance its radical agenda, whether it's failing to secure the border or advancing its extreme green agenda. **This year, he 's not on the ballot -- but the American Miracle is. Jason Miyares is laser-focused on making sure that we win Virginia this year, and that's why he's writing to you today. ****[Will you join Jason's team and help him turn Virginia red?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8365abbf0235430a80ec9cb914d24380&_e=4d7qBD8745lfActJ8RF0XTXwdNlHAWxFxLtQm7-Ssi_JCr0qe89aUlZZyOAw687_fMCQ6jRGvswbJTkO7Wq3tf347TImikpzZehVZ0MeIlH3gUaTieUJFBXYtB1j6LUjSqsRLXB60rFXdcCpEJphFQhk-DmPhvvUGk285O9Q3uFBDwW_aJVoMnF8rJQNsRi749rkdB9bRW0l-YvVSpmra4tfcti_inNJjcdPey7oqZ0w98jYOPO4pl57aKJLiqlhcgxF-vQPiNG6ZpDqIPeZbDhD5h63e43agF9Djmcwb7i6pQJn7Lr2gmMC9oXK8W61NzAit4rpI8T-GJ6E0PCtGAtgU0RQIar74_h815GqupzBPYbixlsviPE4JC8aACddexR9N7DTb_svRMm9agBgNM4g8JwP_3FW0PoUBCWQ_2U%3D)**

|

subject: Limited Time: Free Color Map of Rome
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ad77dbfa632444558e1b9686991bb547&_t=UQ4zozhNgRX8GpCeS0hdbg_EXbqfpqjgNlY3UlG1J77iCDL-x1rr08Uwxd2n-qX7P7ydaOZxEwZ-Tmet1PvOKuHuUvViAc7cRrTb356kq-yIvPOxjBKs1ZlNcHZpCvRU)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ad77dbfa632444558e1b9686991bb547&_e=PuUIB7x_NLQItuzKIK8gK5Kqx1PR-pyVceyq7tt21zbSU1V3xtf4acQjDSq6_i6PRUPGh_Q40ZwbPuezUkjmQtMXBE-wnkqON4KnIpiVPzKCWOBpM-Q0t5Y1mbIXx8klvhkET7eSaDF24MtGecMbF1-sDJ-gypVRpToyMhKxf_bkU5QPq6wHsc47qOSXXVXCUjiyZuTNjC2Yd9wTUJYks2vEadPnOAFL2Vm0HwSQmQ9y1n1ICTybycfJBYeHHcIxrIHV4PtMg_37GNIlZ_xzmcQLNW2rgkRDX_E8oR2BQbrIsGvjJ5m3z2gJ4UkSz4tEmmc_-s0fdImTQrqneLlVAk7T2o56JlQfln_hZCciFs5q7IswSKqSHdv1nafVrFOD1HnNK2_87nb58YPKKjZuvA%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ad77dbfa632444558e1b9686991bb547&_e=PuUIB7x_NLQItuzKIK8gK5Kqx1PR-pyVceyq7tt21zbSU1V3xtf4acQjDSq6_i6PRUPGh_Q40ZwbPuezUkjmQtMXBE-wnkqON4KnIpiVPzKCWOBpM-Q0t5Y1mbIXx8klvhkET7eSaDF24MtGecMbF1-sDJ-gypVRpToyMhKxf_bkU5QPq6wHsc47qOSXXVXCUjiyZuTNjC2Yd9wTUJYks2vEadPnOAFL2Vm0HwSQmQ9y1n1ICTybycfJBYeHHcIxRxmpU0dwaqDli12Jet15IZLHDo_Tl-IbkitSsrAVz6Pxp1s_serRUhESj0waAga8YNKV5OxN4msTZvXFd7Ccw1pbvgcDpESOr9Y0UPTxcVU2rlOvhuI3aupPjSK8MMFuNcBE5VqHwAN_C_crlis0lw%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ad77dbfa632444558e1b9686991bb547&_e=PuUIB7x_NLQItuzKIK8gK5Kqx1PR-pyVceyq7tt21zbSU1V3xtf4acQjDSq6_i6PRUPGh_Q40ZwbPuezUkjmQtMXBE-wnkqON4KnIpiVPzKCWOBpM-Q0t5Y1mbIXx8klvhkET7eSaDF24MtGecMbF1-sDJ-gypVRpToyMhKxf_bkU5QPq6wHsc47qOSXXVXCUjiyZuTNjC2Yd9wTUJYks2vEadPnOAFL2Vm0HwSQmQ9y1n1ICTybycfJBYeHHcIxNASivssUHslvhUGKPA9fiaxB2p1uO5o_WTNsI3I14mf9qPjGabWkcjARpTmEe-kFSYlv76tqiCY1MEcLfruFkYnTo-1MTmZa3m5dVcr1-1wDfpB81ph34Xi_qHMKIIaftCnjMQuXo8d28FeEeNg5-g%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

body:
This is your last chance to respond!
| Friend, Democrats only hold the Senate majority for about __6 more weeks__ and we’re running out of time to put a check on Donald Trump’s power! **The No Kings Act would REVERSE the MAGA Supreme Court’s immunity decision** – but your input on this bill is NOWHERE TO BE FOUND! **You only have until MIDNIGHT tonight to respond:**
**[Should Congress Pass the No Kings Act?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241118_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=18073%2E878179%2Efhw5Rj)** | [YES, TRUMP IS NOT ABOVE THE LAW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241118_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=18073%2E878179%2Efhw5Rj)

name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: Your continued input is critical

body:
let’s keep it up next year

Fellow Patriot, two things:

1.) Thank you for always being a steadfast conservative. Thanks to you, we kept Texas [RED](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e4c8b2b7455446828fe881c43ff0f257&_e=mFGX97AXlFmbt1eAAeXbH5NWDSiKpC2sImOFThCCZgu-EblS0eakXWe32P3igflCIvjsrzone1-8cydWpaF3K7kYDqW8eH4NtCBbl3HN4iA-nLLEk0UF5c-IKTEegzI9DAWHE3I3Mm_SEp1UZ9-xS3Xf9N8krBz6uFM4K0jRCw0NU83nayogbK73lronVdsIpvSD0d6t4DU2w8MRwMO6OdtQ-ucx0TBpV0gTVmpXnDFOc1ieZsBmtt8sLme192Vqs5C2D6fsUwpYpxfuWdGOEe27c7RNnzpMt9E-Rfy5AhGUEMpsKXjUa6tm7qFLebuqXKon8dzr9-V-b9Ubdm_GCHQVC7JpRlGgvL__pRty5WvXO4DcLkgvAOaj0KZRv_JegxeMddHA0MCpAV1bnArEyNc45nJGQ1nu3TrlXFuuGJoWqHAD8Ag_KybI_En10RXwjb6cu2EUQoc1nOltZ5lg4w%3D%3D) and won back the Senate Majority.

2.) Can you do me a huge favor? **[Will you fill out our Senate Majority Survey to let Senate Republicans know what you want us to focus on in the first 100 days?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e4c8b2b7455446828fe881c43ff0f257&_e=mFGX97AXlFmbt1eAAeXbH5NWDSiKpC2sImOFThCCZgu-EblS0eakXWe32P3igflCIvjsrzone1-8cydWpaF3K7kYDqW8eH4NtCBbl3HN4iA-nLLEk0UF5c-IKTEegzI9DAWHE3I3Mm_SEp1UZ9-xS3Xf9N8krBz6uFM4K0jRCw0NU83nayogbK73lronVdsIpvSD0d6t4DU2w8MRwMO6OdtQ-ucx0TBpV0gTVmpXnDFOc1ieZsBmtt8sLme192Vqs5C2D6fsUwpYpxfuWdGOEe27c7RNnzpMt9E-Rfy5AhGUEMpsKXjUa6tm7qFLebuq2W2soRtqJRw9Vr6_76OJUFu4LR66ATtuzExE2YgPHeThi-PN5YKoTjcBqPMm15ecSaGpQWugfMynduvCO5PSOPSG4JeS8CYyi6j8jjVqGwDfAak3CiKjs77ZBdo79bH_VOww1qXHuXO1p-kV_fJT8Q%3D%3D)**

Here's the link: **[SenateMajoritySurvey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e4c8b2b7455446828fe881c43ff0f257&_e=mFGX97AXlFmbt1eAAeXbH5NWDSiKpC2sImOFThCCZgu-EblS0eakXWe32P3igflCIvjsrzone1-8cydWpaF3K7kYDqW8eH4NtCBbl3HN4iA-nLLEk0UF5c-IKTEegzI9DAWHE3I3Mm_SEp1UZ9-xS3Xf9N8krBz6uFM4K0jRCw0NU83nayogbK73lronVdsIpvSD0d6t4DU2w8MRwMO6OdtQ-ucx0TBpV0gTVmpXnDFOc1ieZsBmtt8sLme192Vqs5C2D6fsUwpYpxfuWdGOEe27c7RNnzpMt9E-Rfy5AhGUEMpsKXjUa6tm7qFLebuqx3a783H0Nc7LAVvsNsPVzhWhlqq2mDqOoytNjyNAgg1LokLCFooDnpIA6NPzkfv4OFerw_mkMPW6f4YKt9VCRnsy88SNCe2_8q1PECwbB5HbmSIPOOmmxj4oiUTKu7ak6VYL9WLgoLO7y_JFqTxQSA%3D%3D)**** **

Just as your participation was critical to our victories on Election Day, it will be critical to our success delivering conservative wins next year.

Thank you,

body:
I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2dbeef4540ed48fa9c1cc6e6d0e92989&_e=JhHtGkVzWx5wp-jZnlbMa-swENUmyHY6fWQenXnAk5rJTsx-2_tzYeflw_gGUAToeqFrfJY_dKaDEPwGCm_MNNR3fq1vsxv2NNaFXMrvvBwZSfCu9TJiT7UvgOCyMt_SB4Qw8Kg9wqpcTEGB5pi16Z89YmzjQdRI51h6NrEDCdD2DfHnnQXf5EyL-WdlY-i3lQdeqbb8hdRi35ijUXJO6b9K6ui3Jo0rksumk-ggqnfqA8vhlNHByIIa7PDMGrJR0vR2fC6iLIqcrotLTC0zG-Cj5bYip8uG3OdF0qVdg0dt4EftlH9zHwN7S_q5JO_DKP2FghFnWepgtNzmkAF4UODJkSxS46mDaNZV5O7cwrUuFz6gZwmPi7d3Gj6i890CrTK5JSObwimWZXfmA1VrZoQEtvf-jG-4hKQ8YgKeXgMoYKgguKlVyMG7nyyQAaJb "Derrick Van Orden")
---
Hey you know I'm not firing off these emails at random, right, Friend?

This is Derrick Van Orden. Seriously, sometimes it seems like people think I just pulled their email out of a hat and sent something random. Well, Friend, I can assure you that I know [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2dbeef4540ed48fa9c1cc6e6d0e92989&_e=JhHtGkVzWx5wp-jZnlbMa-swENUmyHY6fWQenXnAk5rJTsx-2_tzYeflw_gGUAToeqFrfJY_dKaDEPwGCm_MNNR3fq1vsxv2NNaFXMrvvBwZSfCu9TJiT7UvgOCyMt_SB4Qw8Kg9wqpcTEGB5pi16Z89YmzjQdRI51h6NrEDCdD2DfHnnQXf5EyL-WdlY-i3lQdeqbb8hdRi35ijUXJO6b9K6ui3Jo0rksumk-ggqnfqA8vhlNHByIIa7PDMGrJR0vR2fC6iLIqcrotLTC0zGwWKPhQMCQIWyyIEXC19qkbuv1lCO1A7qDOGAsLzmWVsktwLUWXaEdFh0hQWm-CJhFHVl3wrJwCNfYcVwkHGd6D-VQa4Z_PWrVThclV3POiQtQB7FGropJZ1BpIgK6i8GEfk_IzxLOZLWo6cudapmLTa4-SnXEkCupDDZDY336BH "%%Email__c%%") belongs to you and I meant to contact _**YOU**_!

I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain:

I am a retired US Navy SEAL of 26 years. My Team and I have successfully defended this seat from radical Democrats. **What we do now will determine whether or not we capitalize on the red wave we saw on November 5th - _that 's no exaggeration, Friend!_**
---

Look, my Team and I flipped this seat red for the first time in over two decades. __Think about that_ - the last time a Republican held this seat was when Bill Clinton was President! _

After that hard-fought battle, the Democrats doubled down and threw _more dark money_ and _more smear campaigns_ my way for the next race. But my Team and I stood tall and fought off their attacks.

Now, we **MUST** fix the damage the radical Left has done to our country! We've fought too hard and for too long to let this moment slip from our grasp.

Losing as badly as they did this year has been a pretty embarrassing blow to the Democrats' egos, so now they're doing EVERYTHING they can to stop our fight to undo all of their insane programs and moves. **Friend, they want to DESTROY us!**
---
| | [DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2dbeef4540ed48fa9c1cc6e6d0e92989&_e=JhHtGkVzWx5wp-jZnlbMa-swENUmyHY6fWQenXnAk5rJTsx-2_tzYeflw_gGUAToeqFrfJY_dKaDEPwGCm_MNNR3fq1vsxv2NNaFXMrvvBwZSfCu9TJiT7UvgOCyMt_SB4Qw8Kg9wqpcTEGB5pi16Z89YmzjQdRI51h6NrEDCdD2DfHnnQXf5EyL-WdlY-i3lQdeqbb8hdRi35ijUXJO6b9K6ui3Jo0rksumk-ggqnfqA8vhlNHByIIa7PDMGrJR0vR2fC6iLIqcrotLTC0zG43I9wByNZPAkKP-nRyA5deHlUATLaU7cpeBkTnYDOz9AtJT2r1ZJynPrdB3mkQgsO2q15s0VCt5PVOoy8hgBCR9TFwDG9yy6i3qH43qm5zppItbdaWKGw975Q1nSyZ1tly5VdNy1jBK_HCZSOClLx7jHPLPtf09Vob1xCVLmQTY "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN")

Man, I wish I could tell you we were off by a couple hundred dollars even. But the fact is, _we are falling short of our Goal by _THOUSANDS_ of dollars!_

clean_body: I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain: | | | | | | "Derrick Van Orden" Hey you know I'm not firing off these emails at random, right, Friend? This is Derrick Van Orden. Seriously, sometimes it seems like people think I just pulled their email out of a hat and sent something random. Well, Friend, I can assure you that I know "%%Emailc%%" belongs to you and I meant to contact YOU! I know these emails, texts, phone calls, and letters can get annoying, but I promise you that this is crucial for our mission. Let me explain: I am a retired US Navy SEAL of 26 years. My Team and I have successfully defended this seat from radical Democrats. What we do now will determine whether or not we capitalize on the red wave we saw on November 5th - that 's no exaggeration, Friend! | | "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN" | | "HELP MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" | "Derrick Van Orden" Look, my Team and I flipped this seat red for the first time in over two decades. Think about that - the last time a Republican held this seat was when Bill Clinton was President! After that hard-fought battle, the Democrats doubled down and threw more dark money and more smear campaigns my way for the next race. But my Team and I stood tall and fought off their attacks. Now, we MUST fix the damage the radical Left has done to our country! We've fought too hard and for too long to let this moment slip from our grasp. Losing as badly as they did this year has been a pretty embarrassing blow to the Democrats' egos, so now they're doing EVERYTHING they can to stop our fight to undo all of their insane programs and moves. Friend, they want to DESTROY us! | | "DEFEND DERRICK VAN ORDEN" Right now, my Team and I are on pace to fall short of our critical first End of Month Goal since Election Day. I wish I could tell you we were off by just a few dollars. Man, I wish I could tell you we were off by a couple hundred dollars even. But the fact is, we are falling short of our Goal by THOUSANDS of dollars! | | | "HELP DERRICK SALVAGE THIS DEADLINE >>" If we miss this Goal, the Democrats will look at me, my Team, and our fantastic grassroots supporters and say that we 're weak. They'll say we're not serious about getting things done. They'll even say we're not committed to America First values! But you and I know that's not true, Friend. That's why I'm personally asking you to help me prove the liberal media and liberal cabal wrong about us! "I’ve set an internal deadline for my Team and my supporters to raise $3,702 to help us get back on track to reach our Goal before midnight! Please chip in now:" | | | "DONATE $750" | | | "DONATE $500" | | "DONATE $250" | | | "DONATE $100" | | | "DONATE $50" | | | "DONATE $35" | | | "DONATE ANYTHING YOU CAN >>" I cannot thank you enough for reading this email, Friend. Again, I want you to know that I'm emailing YOU directly because you are a reliable supporter and a fantastic member of my Team. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | Peter, 99% of people who receive this email won’t even finish reading this sentence. We get it. $10, $20, or even $5 a contribution might not seem like it can do a lot. But when thousands of people are donating all across the country, it can go a long way in defending our democracy. Peter, we have staff on the ground continuing to support the races that need our help. We're ready to defend the races that are within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges and that is going to take some time. But all of this takes resources, Peter, so we're relying on you today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Team Harris-Walz | | | |

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEKlen5KLZT3M77mOAgkIBC566uV6CNUkA7vt-yO7NNjwdGDHO6irbNf051ll4jqE4rxD_4juz8AoPGQzdjlEwhJawU9X_nG-boAfCEAG1i2r-KsSejTQvW9ZhdBdqyRPchJXsKKWJUb6tvgs3OwwFENwWDSTpXsLk2dc_xFV1TZ2qH4cB-9T_JJgEAACzZzU4i01IQ2x3XKP9BZqEGNIfEChQf-grsaa2Dn3MJSsMMwnHImxlPHfGalmjdjrnOQtVEAylmlMepETuvLb3dEIuYuGwFHlpSF_4g0-L1NZGRv7ZZSAlUVymSBwH-2SM-nW1R0S4OQ0PbLkoHUjcjeZ2wBUAjyniJ6zPAplZsbko2C3ljcYwbLGE_enKMs6Y5qN-Q%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEKlen5KLZT3M77mOAgkIBC566uV6CNUkA7vt-yO7NNjwdGDHO6irbNf051ll4jqE4rxD_4juz8AoPGQzdjlEwhJawU9X_nG-boAfCEAG1i2r-KsSejTQvW9ZhdBdqyRPchJXsKKWJUb6tvgs3OwwFENwWDSTpXsLk2dc_xFV1TZ2qH4cB-9T_JJgEAACzZzU4i01IQ2x3XKP9BZqEGNIfEChQf-grsaa2Dn3MJSsMMwnDaj8C8Ay8QFa53w4LZCU0i3SVTzoDueWs6zKtVScFy9JSXL3Vko1ajfA32DQp7JW2a2kfNdtSEoT3BQDM2TZMnzA942QpEWha8VwoTOegiKXWZ7k7vo2GB7z475iQqmR1RmVDEzE0p8t6jJ9fIqBxg%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEKlen5KLZT3M77mOAgkIBC566uV6CNUkA7vt-yO7NNjwdGDHO6irbNf051ll4jqE4rxD_4juz8AoPGQzdjlEwhJawU9X_nG-boAfCEAG1i2r-KsSejTQvW9ZhdBdqyRPchJXsKKWJUb6tvgs3OwwFENwWDSTpXsLk2dc_xFV1TZ2qH4cB-9T_JJgEAACzZzU4i01IQ2x3XKP9BZqEGNIfEChQf-grsaa2Dn3MJSsMMwnFR6fZlB9Plp_juHe07tFKFJMS2l0qbyTq30M-V4pgR1MsPJTXe0dSaVq_Ff3InAUREHjWVyrpRMotZG3vbBGgvRLaAhgxZHw7xwbDpdSXKtyj_gnj62Fzxm2qtX9SW92qlzEZtMhw2S9rrNvh3bl2g%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEKlen5KLZT3M77mOAgkIBC566uV6CNUkA7vt-yO7NNjwdGDHO6irbNf051ll4jqE4rxD_4juz8AoPGQzdjlEwhJawU9X_nG-boAfCEAG1i2r-KsSejTQvW9ZhdBdqyRPchJXsKKWJUb6tvgs3OwwFENwWDSTpXsLk2dc_xFV1TZ2qH4cB-9T_JJgEAACzZzU4i01IQ2x3XKP9BZqEGNIfEChQf-grsaa2Dn3MJSsMMwnc5SVYYhT4qUdZIhiSmVHnzzYFrckhMI9ZrTz2g2BNQoJYAKby9VTtejYKFIhDFbNBD8Sgm8XmaRiC5WJHX9T9vyMGhwE-ck3Ef4jmcoakxovuU3I6R_WYtgxmvWk1TryHS9i1bQ4A41jOdXBoYfZjw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEKlen5KLZT3M77mOAgkIBC566uV6CNUkA7vt-yO7NNjwdGDHO6irbNf051ll4jqE4rxD_4juz8AoPGQzdjlEwhJawU9X_nG-boAfCEAG1i2r-KsSejTQvW9ZhdBdqyRPchJXsKKWJUb6tvgs3OwwFENwWDSTpXsLk2dc_xFV1TZ2qH4cB-9T_JJgEAACzZzU4i01IQ2x3XKP9BZqEGNIfEChQf-grsaa2Dn3MJSsMMwnwtGkeVsyhPsWwYpfLh7oyqZ4ef4fviSyaqOeMB_ZCej4tUNd4BaYDba45H_0_KOTcVM_eqJWccV4xw3UPoYXME9LtZ1srBmKuQcWknNBk0FCkJAffGhdoepy-6XFvbqbI_xHbC2aDcd8OgsFEihH_A%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEKlen5KLZT3M77mOAgkIBC566uV6CNUkA7vt-yO7NNjwdGDHO6irbNf051ll4jqE4rxD_4juz8AoPGQzdjlEwhJawU9X_nG-boAfCEAG1i2r-KsSejTQvW9ZhdBdqyRPchJXsKKWJUb6tvgs3OwwFENwWDSTpXsLk2dc_xFV1TZ2qH4cB-9T_JJgEAACzZzU4i01IQ2x3XKP9BZqEGNIfEChQf-grsaa2Dn3MJSsMMwnHBIjGDUCF-hiQmxj4LaADgMm0P76SJXdzA0Fau-dGFXyj4TxT6S_AByGjlO8IT2YVB5UHf-KAiA9SsKBIjlcXautlTvjM-e9XjuN4DBDyrAN6UflfHXynluwtWM3oDklIgDr6q56Man__OGWJio4og%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_e=Iqac0xOLbNqoz4s-rQJAEETPK5iHNgRfnMOYWJbt5Gx70BJ7z484yS2nPn9c6DKo-He6NaUMU92QrG4AKyzHJzO29DPKxHhzyrxlmRL1bVMf9GpGQXOK2IDv6S-Wfmw7fXVeNGru5iYolYU9sqoBw5uopj-I1TYBE-isuz5A6JuBMHdjYtkdLwncHIfGzIRM2G8P6DQbA4IM6Q81lYMOXg%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=510b04b33fd444acad799e205cb24d08&_t=a2jamz5zdFYyi99juN-0emswcFTve146_NMlYIEh3yLszzDiPY5Sdxv3RBsQGEVk5zpEP4PDG-Sag1c06PIqrkBHh9nS2m8TN779qeD4c_Y7V-5BTjX6-fx_lUMmOHV4)

body:
Seriously?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97296498/512980789/-171021866?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNmNDkxODYtMTNhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_vtRD0EO3kdx_Hea89aVKs6txCmuTgYPTGsx10S-4TI=) | Hi Peter, I’m truly terrified about who Donald Trump is nominating to his Cabinet. Matt Gaetz for Attorney General? RFK Jr. for Health Secretary? A FOX News host for Defense Secretary? And Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence? **One thing is clear: Trump is choosing a Cabinet based on who will be most loyal to _him,_ not who is best for our country. It’s incredibly scary.** What’s worse? Senate Republicans might let him get away with it. [_**We can’t let the Senate rubberstamp these terrible nominees. Will you add your name to my petition and tell the Senate to oppose these extreme cabinet picks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97296499/512980790/-1111016439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNmNDkxODYtMTNhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_vtRD0EO3kdx_Hea89aVKs6txCmuTgYPTGsx10S-4TI=&emci=93ff272a-e6a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=23f49186-13a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97296500/512980791/-1111016439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNmNDkxODYtMTNhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_vtRD0EO3kdx_Hea89aVKs6txCmuTgYPTGsx10S-4TI=&emci=93ff272a-e6a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=23f49186-13a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6455652) Peter, I can’t think of anything worse than having someone who was investigated for sex trafficking leading the Department of Justice, or an anti-vaxxer in charge of the Health Department. It’s despicable. **Trump is trying to install these extremists to do his bidding. We can’t let him.** [_**Will you sign my petition calling on the Senate to do their Constitutional duty and vote against Trump’s most extreme nominees?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97296501/512980792/-1111016439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNmNDkxODYtMTNhNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_vtRD0EO3kdx_Hea89aVKs6txCmuTgYPTGsx10S-4TI=&emci=93ff272a-e6a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=23f49186-13a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6455652) Thanks for speaking out, \- Josh

clean_body: Seriously? | = | Hi Peter, I’m truly terrified about who Donald Trump is nominating to his Cabinet. Matt Gaetz for Attorney General? RFK Jr. for Health Secretary? A FOX News host for Defense Secretary? And Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence? One thing is clear: Trump is choosing a Cabinet based on who will be most loyal to him, not who is best for our country. It’s incredibly scary. What’s worse? Senate Republicans might let him get away with it. Peter, I can’t think of anything worse than having someone who was investigated for sex trafficking leading the Department of Justice, or an anti-vaxxer in charge of the Health Department. It’s despicable. Trump is trying to install these extremists to do his bidding. We can’t let him. Thanks for speaking out, \- Josh *

name: Bryan
subject: Campaign Update
body:
President Trump names Sean Duffy Secretary of Transportation, Continuing the Fight to Secure Our Elections, and How To Get Involved! | | | | |
---
| | | | | Happy Monday! Here’s an update from the campaign trail:
---
| **President Trump Nominates Sean Duffy** President Trump nominated Wisconsin’s own Sean Duffy for Secretary of Transportation. This is a great choice for Wisconsin and our country.
I look forward to continue working with Sean to bring the change we need in Washington.
---
| Congratulations to Sean and the entire Duffy family!
---
| **Continuing the Fight to Secure Our Elections** As Chairman of the Committee on House Administration, my committee has been leading to fight for safe and secure elections across the country.
I’ve been investigating the Democrat fundraising platform, ActBlue, for insufficient donor verification policies which leaves our elections vulnerable to fraudulent and illegal foreign donations.
Recently, I subpoenaed ActBlue for documents and communications related to ActBlue’s donor verification policies. **I’m committed to preventing foreign interference in our elections.**
---
[Click Here to Read More!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=84bcc86e66&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **Get Involved and Help Elect Conservatives** Election season never ends in Wisconsin. We have some important races on the ballot this spring, **including the crucial statewide Supreme Court race**.
We had some great success across Wisconsin and in the First Congressional District this November. But we need to double down on our efforts and keep our foot on the gas.
The Spring Primary is on **February 18, 2025**.
The Spring General Election is on **April 1, 2025**.
Now is a great time to join your county party, get involved, and help elect conservatives across Wisconsin this spring! Click the link below to find your country party and get involved.
---
[Click Here to Find Your County Party!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f38765ac89&e=e907534017)
|
On Wisconsin,
Bryan Steil
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/a1b853d6d7c1/campaign-update?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * 1818 Milton Ave # 1448 * Janesville, WI 53545-1129 * USA

name: PA Senate Alert
subject: $1 million will be wasted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Help Dave McCormick fund this recount so Democrats can’t use dirty tricks to ROB DAVE, PENNSYLVANIA AND AMERICA of his strong leadership. |
Peter,

Dave McCormick needs our help to secure this seat amongst meddling from corrupt D.C. Democrats in this Pennsylvania Senate race.

**Dave has a CLEAR VICTORY with a lead of 26,462 votes in this race.**

**But Democrat Bob Casey is DEMANDING a recount despite the precise results in this race.**

We will get a little technical here, so please stick with us. It will all make sense in a second.
* A study of recounts from 2000-2023 showed that out of 6,929 General Elections, there were 36 recounts.
* Of those 36 recounts, **only three reversed the results of the election.**
* In statewide races, **the most significant margin of votes that was overturned was 511 votes** , flipping from one candidate to the other.

**Bob Casey has no legitimate case for a recount in this race, as he lost by 26,462 votes.**

**Worst of all, he wants to waste upwards of $1 million to fund a recount that will only confirm what we already know: Dave McCormick is the next junior Senator from Pennsylvania.**

We are raising money to support Dave McCormick in this expensive recount and need your help to ensure his recount is fully funded and his clear victory confirmed. We can’t let Democrats pull the wool over our eyes with dirty tricks to change the results.

Even though we know it, these radical Democrats don’t or are so corrupt they are LYING to try and take this seat from voters.

**[We hate to ask after all of your support and generous contributions that helped us take back the Senate majority, but if there is anything you have left to spare for politics this year, please donate today to support this critical recount.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1ddee85a5b3f45588ee5450eb901f48e&_e=fy6Wn39R8f26fCt-dLSLfPnvSm69x8bqDX-QugmN6qhdGzMw3zSuZVqgJ0j4HvMrEQMbNldALEogCwvzQMZHPh_vmmusylCD-JOWyQFeMPiMyPaNckfwkNBjDJkKf5glcfAFxEvUfx_zD5n2oalJ5jVhXeXsnWw1hQKY6fZeS4RXYxLDEG7xEPfu89NfbIkN50eUIH5tmyj0RR7HAGNDvKftL9HH8Zk5gY8hCFtz1CEb7i2K-cwIhFrG20FUmrJieZWyNQeKZ_rdY_7dfm82TZWWJ34i8LJ5OHTA9lPW-mGGAfUa7_e0DCRPHJSZYq9C1EevPmq5TEmbCP3SPzyMR_4kUEpv1jiVcEu31EjTxZ0nx4QgW-1ZSFTOoQgvgMRxSeP7WsQllwZLzpDEvJX2TUP48VNk5cXDhPAgnK-_B6Xk0ssD4TlDVyJ9HJW0FAME)**

Dave McCormick is a principled conservative U.S. Army veteran, a dedicated family man, and an extraordinarily successful businessman. He is among the strongest leaders in politics, and his character is beyond reproach.

His voice in the U.S. Senate will be critical as our new majority works with President-elect Trump to Make America Great Again and help Americans recover from the disastrous Biden-Harris administration.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvgcbjf50hejuuv26e4953t71piuu5r4rnadrbn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cjh2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo410kdpvjnvi8tp1cda5uq9a6tr0vhm88t31kao_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cjh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z11adp0rp455278in5da2evtfh8h7v8tjaugsdc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cjh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9lfjov8tf8bi12v7fn511sqder2tfg5iku3n928_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cjh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5peftgmg41jtctr36nmpudid0k0rel0rorpstk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cjh2bs)
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkd8pvaqspp40dv91ghu2f83ib7uo8uev57s096g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cdh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0qihhn8t36ch8ai0nufujfk796uv7l8ekcg8g88_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cdh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkf7a8fin1qp02oe2d500c13tp26f0mdjhpmbeb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34cdh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3aok9l0ekjrqt49cekbu8trup2bic11bf1jvlbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34clh2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zahg9nq152u4oe83ke8ksamk4vrc0rgi0versdio_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34clh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zca6jan3jiaiprg410j1ha4dflc73gil5u707ph8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34clh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpoomb2u397sr82vcqhd1q670a523v0j7mg44e68_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34clh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztb9th8q5pn9ltoirrft8knd68or8k8at5433mp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34clh2bs)
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Update for America
subject: Trump's Economic Battlefield: Your Financial Survival Kit
body:
Play the long game with your retirement... just as Trump plans to do with the economy.

| | | | **Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
---
**Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
| | Donald Trump's return is a cause for celebration, but [there's something important you must remember](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsf0jijq4veut9lc3u10imjmdud61k8dr9lrpk1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i62o34chh2bs). The road to economic recovery will be long and challenging. Why? Because President-elect Trump inherits a nation facing **significant economic problems:** 1\. A national debt exceeding $35 trillion and still growing
2\. Inflation that has eroded a chunk of the dollar's purchasing power
3\. A weakened American position on the global stage
4\. Growing support for socialism among young people While Trump's policies aim to address these issues, change won't happen overnight. In fact, **it might take _decades_ to reverse the damage**. Which means now, more than ever, it's critical for your savings to be diversified so that you can weather the ups and downs of economic recovery. This is why savvy Americans are turning to precious metals. And a Gold IRA can protect your IRA or 401(k) in a **tax-sheltered account** , regardless of market fluctuations or policy changes.

subject: Trump's Economic Battlefield: Your Financial Survival Kit
body:
Play the long game with your retirement... just as Trump plans to do with the economy.

| | | | **Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
---
**Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
| | Donald Trump's return is a cause for celebration, but [there's something important you must remember](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqpm8cimh6d3fv66l7uftr6115oa2gb2742m40j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i6ao72cdh2bs). The road to economic recovery will be long and challenging. Why? Because President-elect Trump inherits a nation facing **significant economic problems:** 1\. A national debt exceeding $35 trillion and still growing
2\. Inflation that has eroded a chunk of the dollar's purchasing power
3\. A weakened American position on the global stage
4\. Growing support for socialism among young people While Trump's policies aim to address these issues, change won't happen overnight. In fact, **it might take _decades_ to reverse the damage**. Which means now, more than ever, it's critical for your savings to be diversified so that you can weather the ups and downs of economic recovery. This is why savvy Americans are turning to precious metals. And a Gold IRA can protect your IRA or 401(k) in a **tax-sheltered account** , regardless of market fluctuations or policy changes.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zolkcsugqc08q7hhk4h54janbf0c3i3tc20e4t68_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i6eor6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgl6bimp8fjhuhjvmsia56m1rr004b7neibc0ml8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i6eor6cth2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlunp5pc9333vmgmcgapvd57q8k4r04eqm4nk4o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i6eor6cth2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6tjh9f27194k6tng2hdk89ithgh3pkmk1gilc78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1i6eor6cth2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Let's change course before it’s too late
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsCvIR9WpN

I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom
are very similar.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCvIR9WpN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day, fellow
American.

I'd like to tell you
the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar.

Both were born in the
late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a
two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public
elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now
have a four-year degree.

In most respects,
these young women are nearly identical-same background, grew up
at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and
books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that
difference is vital to preserving liberty in America.

The first young lady
learned false narratives about American history in her K-12
education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors
cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly
anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and
viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class.

Her teachers gave
this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our
nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as essentially
and irredeemably unjust.

Absent any opposing
viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these
misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what
she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses
this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid,
hateful, and even racist.

Maybe you know
someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too.

What about the other
young lady?

Well, she received a
complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her
schools, especially her college, she received an education that
covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and
comprehensively.

She understands the
principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read
and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln,
along with many other primary sources.

Her studies allowed
her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and
"injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending.

This young lady is an
informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the
crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and
political debates from a constitutional perspective.

I ask you, which of
these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership?

You can tell us your
preference by completing Hillsdale College's National Survey on
the State of American Education using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63853606:sCvIR9WpN:m:3:2627245898:C2541421002D04DACBBE12164E6B0411:r

This survey lets you
share your views about the state of our country and how to change
course before it's too late.

By participating, you
will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your
community that can only come from the local level.

The survey is part of
our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

The goal of this new
campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT the Constitution
says;
HOW it relates to
current issues and events; and
WHY we must preserve
constitutional principles if liberty is to endure.

If this campaign is
successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among
millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education
system failed.

These are young
people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just
didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in
school.

You are essential to
the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable
about the principles of liberty and limited government.

That's because we're
seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the
Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we must do this
work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even
indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and
loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want
what's best for the country.

So please, share your
opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of
American Education today. Thank you for reading my email, and I
hope you have a wonderful day.

For our children,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional
Advancement
Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isCvIR9WpN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCvIR9WpN

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J7VO4e6YqJ7vhbuDQr45Ew~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHuiKP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1DQjU4MTI1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDhFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgpnOyVRPGfw9wpWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J7VO4e6YqJ7vhbuDQr45Ew~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHuiKP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1DQjU4MTI1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDhFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgpnOyVRPGfw9wpWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J7VO4e6YqJ7vhbuDQr45Ew~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHuiKP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1DQjU4MTI1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDhFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgpnOyVRPGfw9wpWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/J7VO4e6YqJ7vhbuDQr45Ew~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHuiKP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1DQjU4MTI1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDhFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgpnOyVRPGfw9wpWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |

subject: Trump's Economic Battlefield: Your Financial Survival Kit
body:
Play the long game with your retirement... just as Trump plans to do with the economy.

| | | | **Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
---
**Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
| | Donald Trump's return is a cause for celebration, but [there's something important you must remember](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W7pYge6hkEPqMmIttbCaNg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHvAKP0SuaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVla2l0LmJpcmNoZ29sZC5jb20vZ29sZC1zaWx2ZXItaXJhLXRyYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmF2JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cGFuJm1zaWQ9NzI5NTUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZXhfdHZfdjAxYV9ub3YyNCZwbGFjZW1lbnQ9dHYmc3ViaWQ9Uk0tUk9OLTIwMjQxMTE5VwNzcGNCCmc7OFg8Z_b_GcFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). The road to economic recovery will be long and challenging. Why? Because President-elect Trump inherits a nation facing **significant economic problems:** 1\. A national debt exceeding $35 trillion and still growing
2\. Inflation that has eroded a chunk of the dollar's purchasing power
3\. A weakened American position on the global stage
4\. Growing support for socialism among young people While Trump's policies aim to address these issues, change won't happen overnight. In fact, **it might take _decades_ to reverse the damage**. Which means now, more than ever, it's critical for your savings to be diversified so that you can weather the ups and downs of economic recovery. This is why savvy Americans are turning to precious metals. And a Gold IRA can protect your IRA or 401(k) in a **tax-sheltered account** , regardless of market fluctuations or policy changes.

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Theology 101
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMUcuK3DAQ_Br5JqOW_Jg5-LDgHQhkN4E55GhkqcdukCXhljfk74PD7J5z7Kqmqqvr19v0ZilQXN7thgMxTztP0U4rhSDLikn6Dz9ppRsJIOE6QeWHVsPlcalwgN5oBfpyhWodnO0VemW6GbzCh9HQOTtj6zr9mPvOVDScOgBwVVejtap9C3ZulVeznTtnG9GoI3tbsKbI5JFdSjmnQIUc12lfqjCspWQW5kXom9A3Rnfs6OvzXPY2YI3-EPr2NZ87R85pL_ILY5lioIjSpWNn5H85Q1r-SFBw5hXmxk6YUamm79-VbvR3aMcf4-vrXejuKNvE6dgdCjPmPXFGVyguT2pDT8cmzIibpfAEnd2ypSUKM36aTafRk02xYCzCjD9f5Lf7XX7-qdoHn39TCMRdLxq1nJK1S1tV_q-rj0H_DQAA___q853M) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b7b052234343159ade198d0c11cedb&_e=rcoqhKtgJcjz4E19qo0iUfjleg0Cmy-8Tx6Lfeoe0NOXyrOF6Edt0E8EPKlxHO2KHjV3bq97_KyPPgaRfjqDLNrj-k-wnSf5mCf0bgBDog8d-OUk20k5zQCZ8WLrPyD9rbj-w53q0DrRzUznSj-wFnQj4E7Ar1lsWhSamW6jE9WiMAZ1xF1CmbwXVLvx9JC_9xYRzSE9uipQyJGmIhvPl7kYsuoBYJOYUkKpR5-bMcMpv5QA3KQCRWBd1YLgrPYezTAv0sE6EfpnrM2dzQZryyEXz-VhmfneKYQgLJU1Reb3_VeQnIxtHJJfEsEJFUWj0BH3XG-QiRq1vDNsvVsSE-Y2aPEoqAlFXtsHEysiJrm_0tbk5GEa5Mc6kpdzBnAEULhXZt6fqIKnlgb-9R1FOw%3D%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b7b052234343159ade198d0c11cedb&_e=rcoqhKtgJcjz4E19qo0iUfjleg0Cmy-8Tx6Lfeoe0NOXyrOF6Edt0E8EPKlxHO2KHjV3bq97_KyPPgaRfjqDLNrj-k-wnSf5mCf0bgBDog8d-OUk20k5zQCZ8WLrPyD9rbj-w53q0DrRzUznSj-wFnQj4E7Ar1lsWhSamW6jE9WiMAZ1xF1CmbwXVLvx9JC_9xYRzSE9uipQyJGmIhvPl7kYsuoBYJOYUkKpR5-bMcMpv5QA3KQCRWBd1YLgrPYeRkTSfe4NDQFB3IFfzEMiothjig-Vbi1mIpr3QFnyBC2J_mzNZbeNbezBlMTkEgGGw1KJ3Kqnj1VqVzvqDdkYpG_YC4f1v1dosXRk2wcdfzQOknOgAfRbCsGmToty6kU_cqGPumKB-vG1wg7SoFOBug%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b7b052234343159ade198d0c11cedb&_e=rcoqhKtgJcjz4E19qo0iUfjleg0Cmy-8Tx6Lfeoe0NOXyrOF6Edt0E8EPKlxHO2KHjV3bq97_KyPPgaRfjqDLNrj-k-wnSf5mCf0bgBDog8d-OUk20k5zQCZ8WLrPyD9rbj-w53q0DrRzUznSj-wFnQj4E7Ar1lsWhSamW6jE9WiMAZ1xF1CmbwXVLvx9JC_9xYRzSE9uipQyJGmIhvPl7kYsuoBYJOYUkKpR5-bMcMpv5QA3KQCRWBd1YLgrPYef0uW5xKI9v460hdvbrs4R4ma_bdZwJL6SNZy9S951X8wwiVCmFfeVe_4Bmrbp7fZvJu90J4KjAe7UX9lcESF1byirQQZJhPOoh5-FGMSdbnR_3q95ll_DXBc14DvtNAYEDwKMbquBTuNa-A0FBwruA%3D%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57b7b052234343159ade198d0c11cedb&_e=rcoqhKtgJcjz4E19qo0iUfjleg0Cmy-8Tx6Lfeoe0NOXyrOF6Edt0E8EPKlxHO2KHjV3bq97_KyPPgaRfjqDLNrj-k-wnSf5mCf0bgBDog8d-OUk20k5zQCZ8WLrPyD9rbj-w53q0DrRzUznSj-wFnQj4E7Ar1lsWhSamW6jE9WiMAZ1xF1CmbwXVLvx9JC_9xYRzSE9uipQyJGmIhvPl7kYsuoBYJOYUkKpR5-bMcMpv5QA3KQCRWBd1YLgrPYeWVWcfAzQHypIilljUZ-ht6yrdjEgm8IUvua2rjqgbcU-lDglufj53bvTvoNb7nS_cl5nZ2e5-jsgV1LrE8z0Yrx5A4sSJROyauFPaL4PdgJ2hQ9_33jaTlKWMqfvh0v1_i2kfsdIPn9TQ4nMHgYfig%3D%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

body:

But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bcee14f67634ccc8c1265545f28ed4f&_e=q2kqlTmiYhokr6N_W2tkU_Wp5Y6MJr0oiY6L544j-zescGstLBjy79O0Tto6npHYOrKpxZcoMrI-eCj1Db4fpE1LJHiS95HXdKy-h4uQk9DNYYO6Fy9TCXMSYNCJmEu_sz1S2I9xnec-bLbM6p2rvCpqeOc8qKsm5IeNbFsibFbAt_vX23lsy8NatlPsUBPhERt_LrqPR6J2G5Y_3m6Glyq0tFwWZ396bg1Ws6-b_sni3gcHy9_OYFc2OrJStNYlWdw-9pi-fcHZi42tE_angsHaDm5EoDkpamXl7sJlu0O47ayPFPaj_P1j4eVcw_qER6Fy5YUf0hr8YBtecCqH3I92hkGb8ihhZpkX8tX-xXiCdkFUykClh-LLzXauhdBKZ6t6HkqmsEYgH3AUUTX38EKwO2xHT8uTM1GkLIognnM%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bcee14f67634ccc8c1265545f28ed4f&_e=q2kqlTmiYhokr6N_W2tkU_Wp5Y6MJr0oiY6L544j-zescGstLBjy79O0Tto6npHYOrKpxZcoMrI-eCj1Db4fpE1LJHiS95HXdKy-h4uQk9DNYYO6Fy9TCXMSYNCJmEu_sz1S2I9xnec-bLbM6p2rvCpqeOc8qKsm5IeNbFsibFbAt_vX23lsy8NatlPsUBPhERt_LrqPR6J2G5Y_3m6Glyq0tFwWZ396bg1Ws6-b_sni3gcHy9_OYFc2OrJStNYl2WHDAmJXGUS2e2-OWUVgzha0nOsxNi_fHIYXLuPZ9ZXLTs93WGNe_7hn2HLQMiV_6szxuZKiR4eQRbaTMak8Y1SykxIb8KNpbHoSJTOLZDBe1H2ZixIQ72gjZlxYMHdQHBDeCx7S_9fE-EedisP4aEn_f3ajOISen7G2xkj2Khw%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. **Trump's Win: Your Financial Game Plan for the Next 4 Years**
| | Donald Trump's return is a cause for celebration, but [there's something important you must remember](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccd9459b6dbf417fb334d7a169007c9f&_e=9QYrsG4YBpGlskXizJWVvKNKbGNstvK-ZUIKitmSfKB6NYjBZeD9ll2hDDc08U1JzERgIQjrC5tDpkbsYiN7fnBIsaDcsZbroFp67qq3CLVrlx1hdZGw8247pyzz-R7qu3F_mgA4Q0G9a1m1jJhsnPh79NgFEuVgx8lsuo62VqFVQoqPMh8s4RADzrEMio9g90Dj_J8kGamwHFKnIbkzS1UrTEOzULyski8l8KKWN_KZMZkE30XtAjz_I7Z0Rj8HIXvwOfr8gOxYome59Jpz9V-si3vwU-Bfn7yNaRNd2jJIYrExrFYu6qex0UdnbleMLe-3gb2jPar3Zlw8o6oeMpkcIfehdA_jkChPE9zB2yD6to9tSxfBrFkBUyITpmxR8SEve6RAu9pBcN7CRFfjuw%3D%3D). The road to economic recovery will be long and challenging. Why? Because President-elect Trump inherits a nation facing **significant economic problems:** 1\. A national debt exceeding $35 trillion and still growing
2\. Inflation that has eroded a chunk of the dollar's purchasing power
3\. A weakened American position on the global stage
4\. Growing support for socialism among young people While Trump's policies aim to address these issues, change won't happen overnight. In fact, **it might take _decades_ to reverse the damage**. Which means now, more than ever, it's critical for your savings to be diversified so that you can weather the ups and downs of economic recovery. This is why savvy Americans are turning to precious metals. And a Gold IRA can protect your IRA or 401(k) in a **tax-sheltered account** , regardless of market fluctuations or policy changes.

name: The New York Sun
subject: The New York Sun is different
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsm8IjtWNj
For a limited time, join for just 1¢
In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've
experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osm8IjtWNj

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
Friend,
In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Join the
Sun Now →

Alan
Dershowitz
Columnist
for The New York Sun

The New
York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY
10022, United States

emails? Manage your email preferences or unsubscribe.

the Sun for good?

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iCv1gkMV2h64Aty8mTU1FQ~~/AARclAA~_n7BD1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iCv1gkMV2h64Aty8mTU1FQ~~/AARclAA~_n7BD1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iCv1gkMV2h64Aty8mTU1FQ~~/AARclAA~_n7BD1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iCv1gkMV2h64Aty8mTU1FQ~~/AARclAA~_n7BD1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pmTBN1EPklRNK_aFN8lM5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHv4QP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmc7NGY8Z_n7BD1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sqHVv8M6utkrfiBvGlbaKQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpHv4QP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnOzRmPGf5-wQ9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Learn how America can win the new Cold War with China
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Dear Fellow Conservative,

The new Cold War is at hand.

While in the 20th century, America had to face off against the
Soviet Union, today the Chinese Communist Party is America's
greatest international threat.

America needs a comprehensive plan to win this new Cold War.
Which is why we at The Heritage Foundation created this FREE
eBook titled 5 Things America Must Do to Win the New Cold War.

This free resource details concrete policy actions the United
States should implement that will strengthen our country and
reduce China's influence on America and global politics.

You can download your free copy using the secure link below.
http://emails.dcdailyjournal.com/ct/63854903:Ws4ejtWNg:m:3:2664259406:C797979480AFFD77BC69535AC5BDAFE1:r

With China's threat being such a huge issue, Americans need to
know that there are solutions to this new Cold War.

I hope this eBook gives you hope that the Chinese Communist
Party's rise is not inevitable and that The Heritage Foundation
is ready to fight on your behalf for these policy solutions.

Please download your free copy of 5 Things America Must Do to
Win the New Cold War using this secure link right now:
https://secured.heritage.org/free-5-things-americans-must-do-to-win-the-new-cold-war/

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE
Washington D.C. 20002
