name: Reagan Dunn
subject: NEW TAX INCOMING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
King County is trying to raise taxes AGAIN - My vote is NO | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=6716804e16&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ea118d1f15a2/new-tax-incoming?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45cb77d791&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friends,

Today, the King County Council is scheduled to vote to raise property taxes through a simple majority vote, and without a vote of the people. This new tax is being marketed as a needed funding source for Harborview Medical Center, but a large portion of the funds will be used to instead prop up King County's inefficient and financially unsustainable public health clinics.

Yesterday, I penned an Op-ed in the Seattle Times indicating my opposition to this new tax. [**READ THE FULL STORY HERE!**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=85569fba9c&e=77eef70c61)
**_[https://www.seattletimes.com/opinion/king-county-council-tax-plan-will-rob-harborview-to-pay-for-clinics/](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=18c2b9a9a2&e=77eef70c61)_**
**With prices at all-time highs, will you stand with me to oppose this new tax on King County residents? Send a message to King County to oppose this new tax by supporting my campaign here:**[**ReaganDunn.com/NoNewTax**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=f2c4ab891c&e=77eef70c61)

>From the Op-ed: _"__If the council is really going to pass another property tax hike, it should do so with the intent to use the tax dollars as intended -- to fund Harborview, not to make up for King County's financial shortcomings. King County needs to make the necessary choices to improve operations, reduce waste and balance its budget. Looking to taxpayers for more money should always be a last resort. The Metropolitan King County Council should not pass this new, flawed property tax."_

I hope you'll stand with me in urging the King County Council to cut waste, remove inefficiency, and budget responsibly before adding yet another tax on King County's already overtaxed residents.
**_Would you be willing to make a donation of $20, $35, or $50 today to support my efforts? [DONATE HERE](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4b93dbe0e3&e=77eef70c61)_** Thank you for your support!
Reagan Dunn

P.S. I recently received the endorsement of all 9 Mayors in my district! **Could you help me out by adding your name to my endorsement list by clicking**[**HERE**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=e780ac1e31&e=77eef70c61)**?** Thanks so much!
ReaganDunn.com

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn6ove4jp3evvv96peeo8nm5tdrorp5kn4nn63g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gm2or2c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziir5okom0ff9rb2g60nr9ler8e36c4amglatsio_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gm2or2c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3iiv2h1u2k417o61dthg56e6ghub68i2hui75ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gm2or2c3h2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgv0so1l126ireb896r431fd8412p6ijvbpb2hpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gm2or2c3h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc7f13mr3brmr76n1pomsr9dutjkp24gr12c9ks0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gm2or2c3h2bs)

ICYMI News

subject: MassGOP is Seeking Candidates!
body:
| | | | |

---
| MassGOP is Seeking Candidates!
---
---
| Massachusetts, along with the entire nation, has seen a significant political realignment this election cycle. Massachusetts moved decisively to the right, and now is not the time to rest on our laurels. As Republicans, we must seize this opportunity. Starting in February, the MassGOP will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those interested in running for municipal office in 2025 and beyond.
Municipal elections are an ideal starting point for a political career, opening the door to higher office. We're eager to work with anyone interested in running for positions such as select board, school board, city council, mayor, dog catcher, you name it!
The MassGOP is here to provide essential training and resources to set your campaign on the path to success. We have the tools; we need the candidates. Complete the form below to sign up for regular communications on upcoming training sessions. Meetings will take place throughout Massachusetts, with dates and locations announced soon.
Now is the time to step up for your community. This election cycle has proven our momentum, and in 2025, we'll show Massachusetts that Republicans are a serious force for positive change, rooted in fiscal responsibility and common sense.
If you're interested in becoming a candidate, [please complete this form!](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IW-ctk7kWQuzzbABn804ZLcHkpX2e3bVhdi7rkOWrdPS_ZSd4Ld0AWrLSRCEMgDfSBrEs6TOj-Chr853xpaOrIqaJMHJeRNGiYEasmi4SWj1Gh1PYF-lqjRbPwGCG9KVdZud7vbdXOK42x3oM1oyVy91y74fwABofHkBJYrw1iU=&c=D5Dcoz6glxoByY0PKFQwHiaFOQBL6ZuMtg1Rhb3OOpaTB-MIzHSTDw==&ch=tvyJ5u58Hc2IPDdFN7ZEfGtWkVJd3b0v--IqNJng6_tIl3qluLzcNQ==)
Let's get to work.
To Victory,
Todd Taylor Chelsea City Councilor Massachusetts Republican State Committeeman

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: We need you in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Pennsylvania’s Senate race isn’t over.
Hi Peter,
I wanted to send you a quick update on what’s happening here on the ground in Pennsylvania’s Senate race:
David McCormick and national Republicans are working to throw out votes in an attempt to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters and ultimately impact the outcome of this election.
With tens of thousands of votes left to count, we are still fighting to ensure that Pennsylvanians' voices are heard in this Senate race — but we need your help.
**[Can you split $10 between Bob Casey and Lucas Kunce to support our efforts in Pennsylvania today? We’re counting on you to stand up for the voting rights of Pennsylvanians.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84336?refcode=em20241119-8678&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8678%2E614464%2EwasZ1_)**

to fund warm meals
for our heroes!****](https://links.e.uso.) [GOAL: ** 2,500 MEALS **](https://links.e.uso.) ****
| [MATCH MY THANKSGIVING GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
Next week, Americans will celebrate Thanksgiving with family, friends, food and fun. However you celebrate, we sincerely hope you enjoy this time with your family and loved ones.
But for service members deployed far from home, it'll just be another Thursday. Another day in a lonely barracks, thousands of miles away from their loved ones. Another day of the same old mess hall food. Another day of hoping they'll be able to find a secure internet connection to call home before their kids go to bed. **It 's up to us to brighten this day for them.**
The USO is determined to uplift our service members on this important day. That's why we've set a goal to fund 2,500 Thanksgiving meals at military bases and USO Centers around the world.
**And we 're so glad to share that the NFL is _matching_ all gifts, [but we're counting on YOU to help us reach this ambitious goal by Thursday at midnight.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/Dd9Kh-qeZdJa/MERXQjI1VVUzSGhCaDQ1SW9KRDFqVUNKbjdCcHAxdVpFbkxuQS9kNmsyNnU0aml6d2hOOGljUC9NZWNSTklnUVcvMlJYTG40NW1Gc01BY1NqNnJDM3d5c2Z4OEZEZlQwNHM1dnF4YlI3U0E9S0/emFyOVhXbUNST2NQSW80UFVSbTJJSmdxd2w3UE9pa3Fud05weTdhekxsWXNoTytuZlZSM1VQUk1XZzM1WmI3TXpQR0dlSkFleG5ZMDRqQVR1ZmN6MjdHQlZJM05PZmNGS0)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP PROVIDE
ONE THANKSGIVING MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.)

TWO THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~-LGsE/MERXQjI1VVUzSGhCaDQ1SW9KRDFqVUNKbjdCcHAxdVpFbkxuQS9kNmsyNnU0aml6d2hOOGljUC9NZWNSTklnUVcvMlJYTG40NW1Gc01BY1NqNnJDM3d5c2Z4OEZEZlQwNHM1dnF4YlI3U0E9S0/emFyOVhXbUNST2NQSW80UFVSbTJJSmdxd2w3UE9pa3Fud05weTdhekxsWXNoTytuZlZSM1VQUk1XZzM1WmI3TXpQR0dlSkFleG5ZMDRqQVR1ZmN6MjdHQlZJM05PZmNGS0)

Spending Thanksgiving far away from their loved ones is just one of many, many sacrifices our military members make throughout the year in service of our country while asking nothing of us in return. **We may not be able to bring them home or fully understand the challenges they go through -- but we can make sure they enjoy a warm, festive Thanksgiving meal.**
**[Please, will you rush $37.50 or more right now to DOUBLE the value of your gift to support our heroes this Thanksgiving and year-round? There couldn't be a better time to donate this holiday season.](https://links.e.uso.)**

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlllvhb0d2hhdgtvvda5mu7kahqtu7c4hu3hgtco_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhr31ilaohvuhv0t8riubb26tgg9kbh0034innbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4p9vh6mphf8orpc6sc8ee4pvto6gbo2eoi8esp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc075gjjq2vig0r1dvvfgqdo2hd04g1s18itmj1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq60c9io76gg90u30lqactdo91v01vhtahabeubo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgqgavodftgi161n8tck7l12p5kghi6s4qtvqvv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1b0v9co6mh51or0llqkl7n1ala3rj9m330las0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4052firel2s5a54hv48ig42ib1j6voovse1hgrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z20d92e4ek0p1f78v41681pt0qq90f6b2v78enk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpcsr68a1stsfr4hk0cn8goipk4b18cmp0hdnqn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbvu6ou7sg1kknk5f7jfcsrq4584kk1j8hv82sl8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj5cjie1pj246h22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4evap9q4qqb6o6siso7js22o9n42iittdjlqea8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1djl6rg0l9pc0gdmp11dopilpi9943me7vi2pl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c1gmapb6cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
We're helping to build a warchest of funds for the two Democrats who run for these open Florida seats - we need your urgent help!
Chip in NOW so we can flip these red seats blue >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.

subject: TFVC Tuesday: Trump Taps RFK Jr to Lead HHS
body:
| |

| Making good on his campaign promise to **Make America Healthy Again** , President Trump has named Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as the Secretary of the Health and Human Services Department, the federal agency that oversees the CDC and NIH, among other public health institutions. If confirmed, RFK Jr. would be in position to have **great influence over public health policy** , vaccine safety research, and federal regulations for healthcare institutions and providers. This is obviously amazing news for medical liberty advocates here in Texas and across the nation and provides more than a shred of hope that the long-standing collusion between government regulators and Big Pharma will find its rightful place in the **ash heap of history**. Just a few years ago, it would have been inconceivable that we could see the **upending of the legal immunity** for vaccine manufacturers that is currently enshrined in federal law, but this is a clear signal that this is a real possibility. Regardless, there is still much work to be done in our state to protect medical liberty, and whether or not Trump and RFK Jr. are able to deliver on their #MAHA promises, **TFVC will continue to lead the fight in Texas** for medical privacy, informed consent and vaccine choice.****

---
---
| |
---
| Voices for Vaccine Choice

---
| |
---
| |

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: The personality contradiction & how to make it work for you
body:
| Hi Peter, What if you woke up tomorrow with a completely different personality? What if you got to choose your new personality? That may sound wild, but our personalities _can_ change over time — and we _can_ take an active role in making those changes happen.1 Actually, the reality is a little more complicated than that. Our personalities are both relatively stable and flexible. That means that our dominant traits tend to stick with us for life while some parts of our personalities evolve. Most of the time, those personality changes are gradual shifts over longer periods. But more abrupt shifts can happen when we intentionally work on them.1 That's not to say that we can change 100% of our personalities. Still, it shows how we can refine our personalities for the better. When we do, our relationships can get better too.2 And that's not exclusive to the personalities and relationships we share with other people — it also can affect our money personalities and our relationship with our finances too.
---
|
---
[**Want to read more about money personalities and your money mindset? Click here to check out the rest.**](https://financeinsights.net/vW6qskjnZHk0O1QtKNB0qf62JXw?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Best regards,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**

clean_body: | Hi Peter, What if you woke up tomorrow with a completely different personality? What if you got to choose your new personality? That may sound wild, but our personalities can change over time — and we can take an active role in making those changes happen.1 Actually, the reality is a little more complicated than that. Our personalities are both relatively stable and flexible. That means that our dominant traits tend to stick with us for life while some parts of our personalities evolve. Most of the time, those personality changes are gradual shifts over longer periods. But more abrupt shifts can happen when we intentionally work on them.1 That's not to say that we can change 100% of our personalities. Still, it shows how we can refine our personalities for the better. When we do, our relationships can get better too.2 And that's not exclusive to the personalities and relationships we share with other people — it also can affect our money personalities and our relationship with our finances too. | Best regards, Reid Rasner - CEO Omnivest Financial (307) 337-1223 * P.S. What's your strongest personality trait? How has that trait helped you in a challenging time? Hit "reply" and share your story. I'd love to hear about how your personality has gotten you through difficult experiences. Sources 1\. () 2\. Risk Disclosure: Investing involves risk including the potential loss of principal. Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you agreed that we need to protect Social Security from Republican cuts.

clean_body: Make Your Voice Heard| | | Peter, I'll keep this quick. November 5th sent shockwaves to the Swamp and delivered a clear mandate for conservatives to LEAD!! As we close out 2024 and look forward to 2025, I want to hear from you. What issues matter to you and your family, and what issues do you want this new Republican majority to tackle? Take the quick survey below to make your voice heard! | | | | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Bob Casey
subject: American democracy was born in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4873%2E552475%2EcWzoJa)
Peter, my priority has always been standing up for the people of Pennsylvania.
Across our Commonwealth, close to 7 million people cast their votes in a free and fair election. Our county election officials will finish counting those votes, just like they do in every election.
We need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard. The American democratic process was born in Pennsylvania, and that process must and will play out.
[**I’m here to tell you that the process is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over. Can you fund our fight to have all voices heard with a donation of $5 or more right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-1?refcode=em20241119-1&refcode2=4873_552475_cWzoJa&akid=4873%2E552475%2EcWzoJa)

New moms are at risk for post-partum depression and anxiety. Lynsey Gollehon knows that from her experience as an ER nurse and
from her own story. After the birth of her third child, Lynsey struggled with depression and anxiety, but, even with her
professional training, she did not recognize the symptoms.

Lynsey founded Behind the Smile, an organization that offers hope and help to moms who are struggling with depression and anxiety.
Learn the signs you may not know and learn how you can make a difference for moms in your life. Like, share and subscribe.

Discover the Difference: Are You Feeling the Blues, the Blahs, or Depression?

For most of us, life is complex, over-scheduled, and stressful on many levels. Amid our breakneck speed navigating parenting,
school, work, and home life, sometimes disappointment, sadness, and unexpectedly dark feelings can stop us in our tracks. We all
have a bad day once in a while. Then, sometimes, we can’t seem to get out of a long and disappointing rut.

If you find yourself or a loved one dealing with deep feelings of discouragement, sadness, and pain that won’t go away, it’s worth
a second look. This week, we are digging into “the blues,” “the blahs,” and depression. Do you know the difference?

clean_body: Understanding the signs and symptoms of depression and anxiety can mean get help sooner. Do you know what to look out for? If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] November 12, 2024 • Newsletter Behind the Smile, Post-Partum Depression Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] New moms are at risk for post-partum depression and anxiety. Lynsey Gollehon knows that from her experience as an ER nurse and from her own story. After the birth of her third child, Lynsey struggled with depression and anxiety, but, even with her professional training, she did not recognize the symptoms. Lynsey founded Behind the Smile, an organization that offers hope and help to moms who are struggling with depression and anxiety. Learn the signs you may not know and learn how you can make a difference for moms in your life. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] Discover the Difference: Are You Feeling the Blues, the Blahs, or Depression? For most of us, life is complex, over-scheduled, and stressful on many levels. Amid our breakneck speed navigating parenting, school, work, and home life, sometimes disappointment, sadness, and unexpectedly dark feelings can stop us in our tracks. We all have a bad day once in a while. Then, sometimes, we can’t seem to get out of a long and disappointing rut. If you find yourself or a loved one dealing with deep feelings of discouragement, sadness, and pain that won’t go away, it’s worth a second look. This week, we are digging into “the blues,” “the blahs,” and depression. Do you know the difference? Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. # [Tell Mike Johnson "to hell with protocol, release the Gaetz ethics report!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc38799a8-ce2b-48f4-8cf9-441c7d38fcab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Speaker Mike Johnson is blocking the release of a report detailing years worth of sexual, drug and other misbehavior and possible crimes by Matt Gaetz -- the nominee for Attorney General. Johnson says it would be a "breach of protocol" since Gaetz has resigned his seat. Are you kidding me? Gaetz is about to become the highest legal official in America. And he resigned his seat precisely so he could block the imminent release of the report. Senators on both sides of the aisle want to see the report before they vote, and it is essential that they get to do this. [**Sign now, and demand that Johnson stop blocking release of the report.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cdb9523-7e65-41b0-aa3c-0360c5a1d576/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Don't let him get away with hiding the evidence.

| Peter – The Supreme Court is a complete MESS right now: FIRST, Trump DESTROYED the Supreme Court by handpicking three far-right, extremist Justices – making the bench a 6-3 ultra-conservative majority. THEN, They just granted Trump — a convicted felon — full immunity. SO, in response to the Supreme Court’s antics, Democrats introduced the Judiciary Act, which would give President Biden authority to appoint four justices to restore balance to the bench. NOW, if the Judiciary Act passes, Trump and MAGA justices will THROW A FIT about losing power. If we’re successful with this, we could turn back the tide and save our democracy from all the damage that’s been done. But to get the job done before the new Republican Congress is sworn in, Democrats will need a massive groundswell of support. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d941b49-ab20-4200-be25-9fcf3081d490/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

But to get the job done before the new Republican Congress is sworn in, Democrats will need a massive groundswell of support. | | | We can do this, but only if we do it together. \- Blue Amp Action HQ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

subject: IT’S BACK: Tell Congress to vote NO on H.R. 9495
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97325213/513047607/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDk1NWMzOC04ZGE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQJ25x6xhCKGDCNpdg6rxZo6rcXcWsT8eLFHQ-D7xlw=&emci=30e08ede-e8a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=74955c38-8da6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

**Here’s the situation, team:**
**FIRST:** Congress introduced H.R. 9495, the Stop Terror-Financing and Tax Penalties on American Hostages Act, which would give the Treasury Department unchecked authority to declare _ANY_ nonprofit they don’t like a “terrorist supporting organization.”
That label would strip the nonprofit of its tax-exempt status and upend political discourse as we know it. The Executive Branch (**A.K.A. the president**) would be able to dismantle any organization that speaks out against it.
_That’s not how our democracy is supposed to work._
_**IN RESPONSE,**_ we sounded the alarm to this incredible network of young voters, urging you to tell your representatives to vote NO.
Thanks largely to the _thousands_ of people from every state who flooded Congress’ inboxes with messages denouncing H.R. 9495, _the bill was voted down last week_.
_**BUT NOW**_ , H.R. 9495 is back with a vote scheduled for TOMORROW, and anti-free-speech Republicans are determined to make sure it passes.
_**We can’t let that happen.**_
[We’re sounding the alarm AGAIN and urging _everyone_ to add their name and DEMAND that Congress votes NO on H.R. 9495. Our right to free speech is on the line.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97325214/513047608/244312093?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDk1NWMzOC04ZGE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQJ25x6xhCKGDCNpdg6rxZo6rcXcWsT8eLFHQ-D7xlw=&emci=30e08ede-e8a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=74955c38-8da6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)

Prosecutors request stay in Trump NY case until 2029 as defense plans motion for dismissal 'once and for all'

New York prosecutors are requesting a stay until at least 2029 in New York v. Trump, as the president's defense attorneys prepare to move to dismiss the case entirely.

Prosecutors wrote a letter to Judge Juan Merchan on Tuesday, who agreed last week to grant a stay on all deadlines associated with the conviction proceedings against Trump in the final months before he takes office.

Bragg case 'effectively over' in 'major victory,' Trump officials say

Trump officials told Fox News Digital that Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s case is "effectively over" after Bragg requested a stay until 2029, celebrating the development as a "major victory" for President-elect Trump.

New York prosecutors said Tuesday that, while they are likely to oppose the argument, they are open to being briefed on Trump defense attorneys’ case for complete dismissal.

"Prosecutors are trying to save face," a Trump official told Fox News Digital. "They know this case will soon be thrown out."

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Democrats bend laws to boost Casey
body:
Kyle Sammin | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Kyle Sammin:_ Democracy dies in daylight as Democrats break the law to help Casey_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=42dbccfef3&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| “The _Washington Post _has been telling us for eight years now that _Democracy Dies in Darkness._ Anyone who watched the proceedings in Bucks County this week knows that’s not true. It dies in broad daylight. As we all know by now, Republican Dave McCormick came out on top in the Senate race against three-term incumbent Democrat Bob Casey, Jr. As the final votes were being counted, the race tightened, but McCormick still led by tens of thousands of votes statewide, with not nearly enough provisional and absentee ballots still outstanding for Casey to honestly believe he had a chance to pull ahead in the tally. But even if he couldn’t honestly believe it, he and Democratic elections lawyer Marc Elias sure seem to _dishonestly _believe it..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9cdcdf8bdf&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|

---

subject: Legacy Media is Failing — But We Have Options
body:
With historic lows in ratings, the American people are tired of misinformation--so let's talk about the solutions

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..T5pOPoDOFErjLHd5p7GmlwZUBlTEwOTkS9LhQEWgVyk?) for more
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWFzaW1yYXNoaWQuY29tL3AvbGVnYWN5LW1lZGlhLWlzLWZhaWxpbmctYnV0LXdlLWhhdmU_.5A685no9UQJQssZfM6fAAaoT88yZ_CLw1Bvj_aPc3E0?)
---
Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription!
* * *
# [Legacy Media is Failing -- But We Have Options](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151668014&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY4MDE0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIwMzIwOTQsImV4cCI6MTczNDYyNDA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pGMNievzK71hpwQrhNPc9da21YVuy7xxaO5hM-wcNMg)
### With historic lows in ratings, the American people are tired of misinformation--so let's talk about the solutions
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151668014&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY4MDE0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMjAzMjA5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzM0NjI0MDk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Zl4Gj-DX3S7sl9hXkttt0t3I1-WFVNty1gEytUQhNi0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151668014&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY4MDE0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIwMzIwOTQsImV4cCI6MTczNDYyNDA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pGMNievzK71hpwQrhNPc9da21YVuy7xxaO5hM-wcNMg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151668014&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNjY4MDE0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIwMzIwOTQsImV4cCI6MTczNDYyNDA5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pGMNievzK71hpwQrhNPc9da21YVuy7xxaO5hM-wcNMg)
---
| | [](https://substack..xSiuI_vWurYtnEK7ZG2nY0pH-npL72rFVqWnu0Rwo2s?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/legacy-media-is-failing-but-we-have?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
It should not be surprising that legacy media is failing to report on its own failing ratings and trust. Americans are tired of legacy media's clickbait headlines, refusal to hold the powerful accountable, and the overall misinformation and disinformation. As a result, they're suffering historic losses in people unsubscribing, deleting, and simply not watching. But solutions exist to ensure we can get the information we need to remain healthy and informed citizens. What are they? **Let 's Address This**.
Quick Note! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vqcXG7D6vNvGl5SEthX8-sb13QaUWP45qdbH3T3J4OA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151668014)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0dea781-ae35-4c49-a661-d9dc930e484a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
How do we know which media outlet to trust?
### How bad is distrust in legacy media?
Plummeting trust in legacy media is hitting record levels. Gallup Polling [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/61ad13a0-d9c3-4fe8-b6f4-65a4c740e7d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> For the third consecutive year, more U.S. adults have no trust at all in the media (36%) than trust it a great deal or fair amount. Another 33% of Americans express "not very much" confidence.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/df432fc6-8f8b-4b50-b502-04f37f260101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is no surprise, therefore, that CNN and MSNBC are seeing the consequences of this distrust, and accordingly experiencing historic lows in ratings. As journalist Dylan Byers [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/111f96d1-0f18-4d47-b715-1242d1367c71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
> On Tuesday, one week after the election, CNN and MSNBC drew their lowest 25-54 demo ratings in nearly a quarter of a century... CNN lowest since June 27, 2000 MSNBC lowest since August 7, 2001 (excluding last year's July 4 holiday).
Print media likewise hasn't escaped unscathed. In the wake of refusing to take a stance on the Presidential election, readers revolted against Washington Post with a mass exodus. When the dust settled, [Washington Post unsubscribes surpassed 250,000 customers](https://substack.com/redirect/74e01d4d-91b2-40d6-873e-645223c40ea4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), staggeringly more than 10% of its overall subscriber base.
This begs a very important question: Especially with a new administration taking the helm, and persisting questions around government accountability, how can the American people procure reliable and accurate information?
### Two Solutions to Legacy Media Failures
1. **Independent Media:** It can be challenging to find reliable, unbiased information--especially on critical issues like human rights. That's why independent voices and non-profit media are more important than ever. To help meet this need, I launched _[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/ce447c42-df55-417c-8d40-72063abbd540?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ with Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/redirect/ce447c42-df55-417c-8d40-72063abbd540?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a platform dedicated to providing verifiable and timely insights on the human rights issues that shape our world. Thanks to your support, our community has already grown to over 80,000 subscribers who share a commitment to justice, accuracy, and meaningful public discourse.

And ensuring the information I share is credible is a responsibility I take seriously. I rely on tools and resources designed to verify and cross-check the sources I cite, so when you read a fact on one of my articles, it is backed by verifiable data. How do I make that determination?
2. **Accessible Media Monitoring Tools:** One of the most valuable tools I use is Ground News, which helps me provide the trustworthy analysis you expect and deserve.

The problem is that up until now, there has not been an easy way to discern which media headline is accurate, which is misleading, or which is simply false. This is why Ground News is such a game changer. Their app and website help you effectively parse through complex stories with competing versions of the same events. They empower you to think critically about news coverage and assess which version of a story is accurate and which version is...not.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ca39a51-28b1-42fd-913e-4fb5f5477347?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's how. In any given story, Ground News does three things:
1. First, it immediately gathers related articles from around the world in one place so you can compare coverage and see what details are emphasized, exaggerated, or left out entirely.
2. Then, before you decide which articles to read and trust, Ground News provides context about the source of the information--like whether they have a political bias, the reliability of their reporting, and who owns them.
3. Finally, Ground News cuts through partisanship and sensationalism, the lack of transparency, editorial bias, and instead focuses on confirmed coverage, facts, and proper context--so you know you're reading accurate news.

[SUBSCRIBE TO GROUND NEWS](https://substack.com/redirect/e6002c5c-d51c-4fb3-87d6-19ec6f695cfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
You have my commitment to continue to provide thoughtful, comprehensive, and fact based analysis on the key human rights issues that impact us all. And when I find a valuable partner to help me deliver that insight, you can bet I'll be proud to share them with you. Ground News is one such partner, and I encourage you to likewise invest in them. They are subscriber supported so by signing up you directly contribute to the development of the platform. (_Note, if you subscribe to Ground News at the above link, you 'll get 50% off - this is their best deal of the year and it will only be available for a limited time_).
### Conclusion
Legacy media will sadly continue to be driven by its corporate donors. But we don't have to sit beholden to biased or incomplete reporting. At a time when trust in legacy media is at historic lows, let us stop being manipulated by clickbait-driven algorithms and corporate driven headlines. Let us instead take control of what's happening in our country and world, and that starts with ensuring we have accurate information. Investing in independent media, and in new tools like Ground News, are two important vehicles to help us become more aware, more discerning, and to think more critically.

clean_body: With historic lows in ratings, the American people are tired of misinformation--so let's talk about the solutions | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! With historic lows in ratings, the American people are tired of misinformation--so let's talk about the solutions | | | Nov 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | It should not be surprising that legacy media is failing to report on its own failing ratings and trust. Americans are tired of legacy media's clickbait headlines, refusal to hold the powerful accountable, and the overall misinformation and disinformation. As a result, they're suffering historic losses in people unsubscribing, deleting, and simply not watching. But solutions exist to ensure we can get the information we need to remain healthy and informed citizens. What are they? Let 's Address This. Quick Note! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- How do we know which media outlet to trust? How bad is distrust in legacy media? Plummeting trust in legacy media is hitting record levels. Gallup Polling : For the third consecutive year, more U.S. adults have no trust at all in the media (36%) than trust it a great deal or fair amount. Another 33% of Americans express "not very much" confidence. | | ---|---|--- It is no surprise, therefore, that CNN and MSNBC are seeing the consequences of this distrust, and accordingly experiencing historic lows in ratings. As journalist Dylan Byers , On Tuesday, one week after the election, CNN and MSNBC drew their lowest 25-54 demo ratings in nearly a quarter of a century... CNN lowest since June 27, 2000 MSNBC lowest since August 7, 2001 (excluding last year's July 4 holiday). Print media likewise hasn't escaped unscathed. In the wake of refusing to take a stance on the Presidential election, readers revolted against Washington Post with a mass exodus. When the dust settled, , staggeringly more than 10% of its overall subscriber base. This begs a very important question: Especially with a new administration taking the helm, and persisting questions around government accountability, how can the American people procure reliable and accurate information? Two Solutions to Legacy Media Failures 1. Independent Media: It can be challenging to find reliable, unbiased information--especially on critical issues like human rights. That's why independent voices and non-profit media are more important than ever. To help meet this need, I launched , a platform dedicated to providing verifiable and timely insights on the human rights issues that shape our world. Thanks to your support, our community has already grown to over 80,000 subscribers who share a commitment to justice, accuracy, and meaningful public discourse. And ensuring the information I share is credible is a responsibility I take seriously. I rely on tools and resources designed to verify and cross-check the sources I cite, so when you read a fact on one of my articles, it is backed by verifiable data. How do I make that determination? 2. Accessible Media Monitoring Tools:** One of the most valuable tools I use is Ground News, which helps me provide the trustworthy analysis you expect and deserve. The problem is that up until now, there has not been an easy way to discern which media headline is accurate, which is misleading, or which is simply false. This is why Ground News is such a game changer. Their app and website help you effectively parse through complex stories with competing versions of the same events. They empower you to think critically about news coverage and assess which version of a story is accurate and which version is...not. | | ---|---|--- Here's how. In any given story, Ground News does three things: 1. First, it immediately gathers related articles from around the world in one place so you can compare coverage and see what details are emphasized, exaggerated, or left out entirely. 2. Then, before you decide which articles to read and trust, Ground News provides context about the source of the information--like whether they have a political bias, the reliability of their reporting, and who owns them. 3. Finally, Ground News cuts through partisanship and sensationalism, the lack of transparency, editorial bias, and instead focuses on confirmed coverage, facts, and proper context--so you know you're reading accurate news. You have my commitment to continue to provide thoughtful, comprehensive, and fact based analysis on the key human rights issues that impact us all. And when I find a valuable partner to help me deliver that insight, you can bet I'll be proud to share them with you. Ground News is one such partner, and I encourage you to likewise invest in them. They are subscriber supported so by signing up you directly contribute to the development of the platform. (Note, if you subscribe to Ground News at the above link, you 'll get 50% off - this is their best deal of the year and it will only be available for a limited time). Conclusion Legacy media will sadly continue to be driven by its corporate donors. But we don't have to sit beholden to biased or incomplete reporting. At a time when trust in legacy media is at historic lows, let us stop being manipulated by clickbait-driven algorithms and corporate driven headlines. Let us instead take control of what's happening in our country and world, and that starts with ensuring we have accurate information. Investing in independent media, and in new tools like Ground News, are two important vehicles to help us become more aware, more discerning, and to think more critically. name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Opposes Natick Select Board’s Proposed Sanctuary Policies
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xz0-dUcous9Hz0uq3WLTF8ZVzIDNYwg0QjDt0vcyNarj7eQvixrUBKadtXyr-ReGZC9fgp3W7_VHPNo2YsqMBTnUtwsqNxdKlE1MAE6JTj4QIJa9bbCftUvGbcCr8625nTWY6u928XkptO_dH5gZUA==&c=Mj6Trucft77SRBzNu1UTKjyj0lpILqkxq0Zly6At7xxOzOYCKOaE0w==&ch=wZLEarmMKfog1WxvoVTCQRYU9rqvp1nLd8ZjX5Iei8Himzz2yUXpWw==)
---
| MassGOP Opposes Natick Select Board's Proposed Sanctuary Policies
---
---
| Natick, MA-- The Massachusetts Republican Party stands with the residents of Natick in opposing the Select Board's proposed sanctuary policies, which would prohibit town employees, including law enforcement, from collecting information about citizenship or immigration status unless required by federal or state law. The proposal also bars town employees from detaining individuals based on their immigration status or violations of immigration law.
This policy sends a dangerous signal to illegal immigrants with criminal backgrounds, creating a safe haven for those seeking to evade law enforcement. Similar policies in other parts of Massachusetts have resulted in devastating consequences, including crimes committed by individuals who exploited sanctuary protections.
Leanne Harris, Massachusetts Republican Party State Committeewoman for the Middlesex and Norfolk District, called the policy reckless, stating:
"This proposal puts Natick on a troubling path that prioritizes political posturing over the safety of residents. By preventing law enforcement from fully cooperating with federal immigration authorities, the town risks becoming a magnet for criminal activity. We've already seen tragic examples across the state where sanctuary policies have failed to protect communities. Natick deserves better."
Massachusetts Republican Party State Committeeman for the Middlesex and Norfolk District, Nicky Miceli, emphasized the broader impact this decision could have:
"The select Board's decision risks overwhelming local resources. We've seen the consequences in other communities that have faced overcrowded schools, housing shortages, and increasing crime rates after implementing similar policies. Even Democratic strongholds like New York City are struggling with the migrant crisis and reevaluating their stance on sanctuary policies. Natick is simply not equipped for this."
The MassGOP warns that this decision could put Natick in the state and national spotlight for all the wrong reasons, drawing parallels to other communities where sanctuary policies have backfired. From the backlash in Norfolk to the challenges faced by major cities like New York, the evidence is clear: sanctuary policies strain resources, divide communities, and create more problems than they solve.
The Massachusetts Republican Party urges the Natick Select Board to reject this proposal and prioritize the safety, resources, and voices of its residents.
###
---
---

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Petition: Stand against Elon's disastrous new department
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111924_1&amount=25]
Team:
We have to act now to urge Congress to oppose the creation of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and the proposed appointments of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to this agency.
This new department, introduced by President-elect Donald Trump, is billed as a means to streamline federal operations . But instead, this department is expected to pave the way for widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and diminished government accountability.
We believe, these reasons among many, make Musk and Ramaswamy’s DOGE a disaster waiting to happen.
Please, add your name: Stand against Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
The reasons are clear: [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
* Lack of Public Service Experience: Musk and Ramaswamy are corporate moguls with no background in public service. Government is about serving people, not profit—something neither of these leaders has shown a commitment to.

* Conflicts of Interest: Both have significant business ties to industries that benefit from lax regulations. Putting them in charge of efficiency reform risks favoritism toward their interests and big businesses, rather than safeguarding public needs.

* Deregulation Disguised as Efficiency: "Efficiency" here could mean removing protections. With Musk and Ramaswamy at the helm, we could see environmental, labor, and consumer protections slashed under the guise of "streamlining."

* Privatization of Public Services: DOGE could push to outsource critical government functions to corporations, reducing transparency and accountability to taxpayers, while increasing corporate profits.

* Threat to Democracy: Government must be accountable to the people, not corporate elites. This department could erode public trust and prioritize corporate power over democratic values.
Sign on now to stand against Elon and Vivek’s appointments and the creation of this thinly veiled attempt of a corporate takeover of our government >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]

These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] Team: We have to act now to urge Congress to oppose the creation of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and the proposed appointments of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to this agency. This new department, introduced by President-elect Donald Trump, is billed as a means to streamline federal operations . But instead, this department is expected to pave the way for widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and diminished government accountability. We believe, these reasons among many, make Musk and Ramaswamy’s DOGE a disaster waiting to happen. Please, add your name: Stand against Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] The reasons are clear: [] Lack of Public Service Experience: Musk and Ramaswamy are corporate moguls with no background in public service. Government is about serving people, not profit—something neither of these leaders has shown a commitment to. Conflicts of Interest: Both have significant business ties to industries that benefit from lax regulations. Putting them in charge of efficiency reform risks favoritism toward their interests and big businesses, rather than safeguarding public needs. Deregulation Disguised as Efficiency: "Efficiency" here could mean removing protections. With Musk and Ramaswamy at the helm, we could see environmental, labor, and consumer protections slashed under the guise of "streamlining." Privatization of Public Services: DOGE could push to outsource critical government functions to corporations, reducing transparency and accountability to taxpayers, while increasing corporate profits. * Threat to Democracy: Government must be accountable to the people, not corporate elites. This department could erode public trust and prioritize corporate power over democratic values. Sign on now to stand against Elon and Vivek’s appointments and the creation of this thinly veiled attempt of a corporate takeover of our government >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Support DJT’s Push for 50-State Concealed Carry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=8612568148af4d68a9479adac801fa1d&_e=KwoaOGYP6CSkVk0_Xn4qwdrW7qbDO_Ce7Ot8NgP57ckHhwDBBG0sVELFZ1OGxZ4Pwml-PNV4gs_WlaaC-ICk6NI-HSnBJJ2rtt9x_lEG6nprodpJ_RwIGiSNi2RApumH6SLwREba6hQeLpCHggELRd0nnC2OzGTACSQpAvzCS81bFueWeV-MhWUn2siLD-5CgyK8k0ffFjQvleUI3uE0jpv3jx4I1Wv88hTeVv1eZpCddbZufsiOs0L3KA6mpugNWe87tYbrtaHtVykX1vyDi3WZARzFTp7sKceQjJ8-wAWhZNqFN3CBqspDQOl8qpjIfvtlGDDOCME76L_vRjRlFOiSmSufzbWveaAcJwR2og0%3D)

Patriot,

Short on time? **[Watch my quick video message here>>>](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=8612568148af4d68a9479adac801fa1d&_e=KwoaOGYP6CSkVk0_Xn4qwdrW7qbDO_Ce7Ot8NgP57ckHhwDBBG0sVELFZ1OGxZ4Pwml-PNV4gs_WlaaC-ICk6NI-HSnBJJ2rtt9x_lEG6nprodpJ_RwIGiSNi2RApumH6SLwREba6hQeLpCHggELRd0nnC2OzGTACSQpAvzCS81bFueWeV-MhWUn2siLD-5CYj63QjqYxie5uJp7Grw5SdGsK29-24V9_KEx4oCEuROSzK6Cbr2BZN3AevFl3_In57gCO6wbKsFrknq0UyQWn-D3O_tnvyP8qarNPurDn5WOAqyaCwcDBRg9JCbWXzEhYVWuJkr2uxTEcxPi-lizcP42pyeUMBlQU-wUPw2hA8I%3D)**

I'm a believer in Constitutional Carry.

But there's the way that it should be, and the way that it is, and our job is to eliminate the gap between the two.

Supporting President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity is a great first step. It means standing up for the rights of law-abiding citizens across the country by ensuring that your rights don't disappear at state lines.

**[Add your name here to support President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=8612568148af4d68a9479adac801fa1d&_e=KwoaOGYP6CSkVk0_Xn4qwdrW7qbDO_Ce7Ot8NgP57ckHhwDBBG0sVELFZ1OGxZ4Pwml-PNV4gs_WlaaC-ICk6NI-HSnBJJ2rtt9x_lEG6nprodpJ_RwIGiSNi2RApumH6SLwREba6hQeLpCHggELRd0nnC2OzGTACSQpAvzCS81bFueWeV-MhWUn2siLD-5CG9Lw32E40wT1aAhmr94jmfm7kVzgaqfQ8Wne4mBkoaWWqhPH28Fmq8NMSJU30WXBOoUWceq-E0hwNaZ2C2E-vtpdsu7SNIpEKteLCMpLd00OxMAPR1nNDm-8lR-Uhe9bT1BLbHpyYFX4_WcI0Xo2pNtaM2Vg6n4r5Z_ZuWRyBxg%3D)**

I'll be right there with President Trump as he backs a policy that respects the freedom of responsible gun owners nationwide, while moving us towards a more perfect and intended experience of our 2nd Amendment rights.

Thank you, [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=8612568148af4d68a9479adac801fa1d&_e=KwoaOGYP6CSkVk0_Xn4qwdrW7qbDO_Ce7Ot8NgP57ckHhwDBBG0sVELFZ1OGxZ4Pwml-PNV4gs_WlaaC-ICk6NI-HSnBJJ2rtt9x_lEG6nprodpJ_RwIGiSNi2RApumH6SLwREba6hQeLpCHggELRd0nnC2OzGTACSQpAvzCS81bFueWeV-MhWUn2siLD-5CzLnMR5sDqJG16Kb2BXn9DDXDKWfZrC4VPnpLcfDB__-H3HY24iWNRNP_vdvTg2ba6UdbS-Pl7DJpaUalJz01jKD7CTcKEtG5Gj1IHoyaSK4Tt8F0JyRRqBPoHNNwEof9vTCDaEscLLnNOv07zelr6Fkh5YDxktGLBDKCE71bhQI%3D)

_Pat Harrigan_

| Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624
---

We know $3 doesn’t seem like enough money to do either of those things. But by the time you’ve gotten to this point in the email, dozens and dozens of people will have already donated their $3. Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same. **Because it all adds up, and that’s how we fight back against MAGA extremism and protect our fundamental freedoms over the next four years.** So please, Peter, help us get ready to organize, mobilize, keep fighting, and send MAGA Republicans a message they don’t want to hear: **We’re not backing down.** **[Chip in a $3 contribution before tonight at midnight. name: Dan Carr
subject: Washington did not cause the RED WAVE!!
body:
The red wave was not delivered by the Washington elites--it was powered by Donald Trump and the American people!

| |
---|---|---
|
# Washington did not cause the RED WAVE!!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
The red wave was not delivered by the Washington elites--it was powered by Donald Trump and the American people! The message is clear: voters have spoken, and the establishment needs to step aside.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7d71ec75-8710-4043-9016-fe8731eb7af2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[] [600x300] [] Laken Riley’s Alleged Killer Arrived In Georgia On ‘Humanitarian Flight,’ Roommate Testifies [] Source: Daily Caller [] Jose Ibarra, the alleged murderer of 22-year-old nursing student Laken Riley, traveled from New York City to Georgia after requesting a humanitarian flight, his roommate testified Monday. Ibarra’s roommate, Rosbeli Elisber Flores-Bello, testified that she and the suspected murderer arrived at the Roosevelt Hotel in New York City and requested a humanitarian flight to Athens in September 2023. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] March 19, 2024 Venezuelan Gang Entering U.S. Through Mexico “Will Unleash an Unprecedented Reign of Terror” [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Among the myriad of detrimental impacts that come with President Joe Biden’s reprehensible open border policies is the infiltration of Venezuela’s largest criminal gang, which has battered American cities with its trademark of gruesome crimes. A Georgia nursing student was brutally murdered by a member of the gang, 26-year-old Jose Antonio Ibarra, who entered the country illegally through the Mexican border in the fall of 2022 and was released into the U.S. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] March 22, 2024 Judicial Watch Sues for 911 Call, Arrest Reports in Murder of Laken Riley [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “There are many political forces that wish to suppress the truth about what happened to Laken Riley, but Judicial Watch will insist on transparency under law for the public interest and public safety,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] February 26, 2024 Ghastly 7,300% Surge in Illegal Immigrants from Same Nation as College Student’s Murderer [] Source: Judicial Watch [] The 26-year-old suspect, Jose Antonio Ibarra, comes from a country—Venezuela—run by a dictator with close ties to terrorists who refuses to accept deportees. This is especially disturbing because the U.S. has seen a shocking 7,300% spike in migrants from Venezuela under the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies. | | Friend,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from days ago, shows how the Times covered the prospect of President Trump's economic policies. The Times wants you to think they are doomed to fail, and not to consider the opportunity that comes with a fresh approach. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less.**
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8eb29cfb24b846458fe5d89b352f30b4&_e=fdbavLTUqAIUzf6OpaDozL0kKTqT9lEyh9Ut0EjBECC522ESqeth_Wcq5F47gF0CPPrnRYamtqsig1VSeM6UM5oS3Fx_U0eM7d-e8L3ItaAYMJOoFmBnjzY-SIsKnBvRLlaWOirzjY7MdUOcc3xovT_7IF493GwjqRLjxZBZR0tgNaE5lTdY2WNuG0tfs9UNkLKq6jkTXkEQuqkE3iVpg19Xq9qUNMOTJO-ZUSbb6rzpA-Y8zkxEgVzZSWDUICyTPeuajFcMvSFDCMhvTAsrsc8I9FulwLU0hhVjMyv-hwwv_2cOJm9ybhJkoi_5A0cwHGG-wTdyWkDAdkmmGZ0x-mJFm7Ssp6wvP4X3zlTda635-6nNajXH8luZLOFUveDv)

| | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what **you** can do about it. name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Baumgartner elected to GOP Congressional Frosh Leadership.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www
body:
It’s been a busy week back in D.C. | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Friends,
I’ve been back in Washington D.C. for incoming Congressional Freshman Orientation and it has been a very special, and very busy, week.
Early in the week we were privileged to visit the National Archives to view our nation’s foundational documents, the Declaration of Independence and the original US Constitution, along with other new electeds - an appropriate way to prepare for service to We The People.
It was particularly wonderful that Eleanor could join me for the first few days of the trip. As we attended the traditional dinner hosted by the Speaker of the House in the Capitol’s Statutory Hall and toured the Library of Congress, I reflected on the providential way in which we met in Afghanistan and where life finds us now. Of course, our victory in the election would not have been possible without supporters like you and we can’t wait for you to come out and visit me in Congress.
---
|
# Election to Freshman Leadership
---
| Last week I joined House Republicans in debating the rules that will govern the next Congress and in electing our leadership – including Speaker of the House Mike Johnson.
I was honored to be elected as the Freshman class representative on the Republican House Policy Committee. This is one of four class leadership positions and the one in which I was most interested. I’m very much looking forward to helping craft and advance the policies that Republicans will put forward at this crucial time in our nation’s history.
With President Trump in the White House and GOP control of both the House and the Senate, I’m hopeful for a 100 day agenda that will help drive inflation down by reducing regulation and increasing American energy production, and one that will take the steps needed to have a common-sense immigration policy and secure the border. I’m one of 33 new GOP members and it’s wonderful to have the early confidence of my classmates.
---
| **Join me at the Inauguration!**
It would be wonderful to have you join me at the Presidential Inauguration on Monday January 20th. Those interested in tickets should reply to this email and also visit Cathy McMorris Rodgers’ Congressional web page to apply for tickets [here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=ffda39d1ce&e=5a45b9550e). (It is not yet known exactly how many tickets I will receive for the Inauguration. Most will be standing tickets, and we anticipate only receiving those physical tickets after I am sworn in on January 3. However I am hopeful that we will be able to accommodate all who are interested - particularly if I am successful in my requests to my Democrat colleagues to share any of their unused tickets.)
For those in D.C. on Sunday Jan 19, I recommend the “Texas Black Tie & Boots Ball” and hope to see you there. I do not have control over tickets for any of the balls, but the Texas tickets can be purchased [here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=563b330da2&e=5a45b9550e).
Also, on Tuesday January 21st from 10am to 12 noon, I will personally be leading a tour of the Library of Congress and the Capitol for visitors from Washington State. RSVP [here](mailto:eleanor@votebaumgartner.com?subject=RSVP%3A%20Capitol%20Tour%20Jan%2021&body=) so we know to expect you.
---
|
# Lots of work to do!
---
| Orientation in D.C. continues this week and my schedule is jam-packed. I’ll be pleased to report back in a few days with additional updates – including some exciting news on who will be my Chief of Staff and my District Director.
It’s an honor to be your Congressman-elect!
-Michael
---
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=7a1a2b5199) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=7a1a2b5199)
---
|
---
|

---

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 🆘 Health Freedom Urgent CALL TO ACTION!
body:
Health Freedom Urgent CALL TO ACTION! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=894ba77bd4&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=13d254f785&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
HEALTH FREEDOM ALERT!
WE NEED YOUR HELP!
THIS IS AN IMPORTANT "ASK"!
PLEASE READ THIS & TAKE ACTION!
(1st Request)**

---
| **HEALTH FREEDOM
Call to Action**
**Please call Steve Huffman today at 614-466-6247 and ask him, “Will you stand with the people and doctors of Ohio and adopt the most recent version of HB 73 and CALL it to a VOTE during the first scheduled health committee meeting? When is the first committee meeting scheduled?”**

**HB 73 ("The Dave & Angie Patient and Health Provider Protection Act", Sponsors: Gross & Loychik) is a bill that:**
* guarantees doctors the right to prescribe any off-label drug that is FDA approved, legal in the state of Ohio, and not a controlled substance, without the threat of losing their license.
* ensures medical free speech.
* guarantees patients a pathway to access off-label drugs prescribed by their provider in both outpatient and inpatient settings.
* has a provision to protect patients from being denied food or fluids while in the hospital.
* has a provision that states the World Health Organization has no jurisdiction in the state of Ohio and that no rule, mandate, or order shall be enforced or funded by any state agency.

The members of the Ohio House of Representatives apparently understood that. That’s why HB 73 passed overwhelmingly by a vote of 75-16 ([https://legislature.ohio.gov/legislation/135/hb73/votes](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f0b96bf743&e=5c740fa3e2)), with bipartisan support **18 months ago**.

Unfortunately, the Huffmans, **cousins Matt & Steve**, don't seem to respect that God-given right—and therefore demonstrate that they respect neither God nor their constituents. Steve won’t let it out of the Senate Health Committee and Matt doesn’t want to bring it to the floor for a vote. Why? **One might conclude it's because they are heavily-funded by the healthcare industry.**

**Time is running out. If it doesn’t get out of committee in this session - it dies & must be reintroduced next year. These are your employees. TELL THEM what you expect them to do! Together we can get action!**

Here is your call to action:

First, contact Senate Health Chairman Steve Huffman and ask him “Will you stand with the people and doctors of Ohio and adopt the most recent version of HB 73 and CALL it to a VOTE during the first scheduled health committee meeting? When is the first committee meeting?”

📬 SHuffman@ohiosenate.gov
☎️ (614) 466-6247

Second, contact the Senate Health Committee and **your personal senator**(**[find them HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dd57df1ea6&e=5c740fa3e2)**) to let them know why HB 73 is important to you.

⬇️ EASY CUT & PASTE EMAILS HERE ⬇️

SHuffman@ohiosenate.gov,
johnson@ohiosenate.gov,
antonio@ohiosenate.gov,
Romanchuk@ohiosenate.gov,
hackett@ohiosenate.gov,
Ingram@ohiosenate.gov,
roegner@ohiosenate.gov

News you can use. Brought to you by: [https://www.ohioamf.org/](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e11d3160fd&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Please call Steve Huffman today at 614-466-6247 and ask him, “Will you stand with the people and doctors of Ohio and adopt the most recent version of HB 73 and CALL it to a VOTE during the first scheduled health committee meeting? When is the first committee meeting scheduled?”**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=94413ca89a&e=5c740fa3e2)

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita

You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=bfafe59d55) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=bfafe59d55).

BREAKING NEWS:
Attorney General Jason Miyares is running for reelection.
Team, Virginia’s Attorney General, Jason Miyares, is a MAGA hardliner. He’s running for another term in office – and it’ll be bad news for Virginians if he wins again.
That’s why we need your grassroots support at this crucial time. Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to help build our movement across Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=10]
SUPPORT JAY → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=10]
Miyares has spent his time in office pandering to corporate polluters, shady landlords, and price-gougers who threaten the safety and security of Virginia’s citizens. It’s clear that he’ll place special interests over the needs of the people he’s meant to serve.
With Trump heading back to the White House, Miyares will serve as a right-hand man in Trump’s attacks on our liberties and freedoms. They’ll work together to roll back Virginians' reproductive rights and boldly flout our nation’s laws.
Jay Jones is in the race for Virginia’s Attorney General because he respects the law. He’ll protect Virginians from attacks on economic security, reproductive freedom, and prosperity. He’ll stop predatory lenders and other bad actors from hurting working-class families, and keep Virginia’s natural resources safe.
Team, Virginia can’t afford four more years of Jason Miyares. We need an Attorney General who will place the people at the forefront of all their decisions – someone like Jay Jones.
If you’re with us, will you chip in $10 or more today to support Jay Jones for Attorney General? Together, we can replace Jason Miyares with an Attorney General who is truly FOR Virginia. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=10]
