clean_body: jayjones.com [jayjones.com] BREAKING NEWS: Attorney General Jason Miyares is running for reelection. Team, Virginia’s Attorney General, Jason Miyares, is a MAGA hardliner. He’s running for another term in office – and it’ll be bad news for Virginians if he wins again. That’s why we need your grassroots support at this crucial time. Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to help build our movement across Virginia? [] SUPPORT JAY → [] Miyares has spent his time in office pandering to corporate polluters, shady landlords, and price-gougers who threaten the safety and security of Virginia’s citizens. It’s clear that he’ll place special interests over the needs of the people he’s meant to serve. With Trump heading back to the White House, Miyares will serve as a right-hand man in Trump’s attacks on our liberties and freedoms. They’ll work together to roll back Virginians' reproductive rights and boldly flout our nation’s laws. Jay Jones is in the race for Virginia’s Attorney General because he respects the law. He’ll protect Virginians from attacks on economic security, reproductive freedom, and prosperity. He’ll stop predatory lenders and other bad actors from hurting working-class families, and keep Virginia’s natural resources safe. Team, Virginia can’t afford four more years of Jason Miyares. We need an Attorney General who will place the people at the forefront of all their decisions – someone like Jay Jones. If you’re with us, will you chip in $10 or more today to support Jay Jones for Attorney General? Together, we can replace Jason Miyares with an Attorney General who is truly FOR Virginia. [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $200 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thank you. - Team Jay Jay Jones for Virginia PO Box 2501 Arlington, VA 22202 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Unless you instruct us otherwise, we will designate your contribution as follows: first to the 2024 general debt, then to the 2026 primary election, then to 2026 general election. Excessive contributions will be returned, refunded, redesignated or reattributed as provided by law.

name: Team Keith
subject: Moving forward
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Our work doesn’t stop after Election Day. We work year-round, organizing in hard-to-reach communities, reaching out to people most campaigns overlook, and bringing people from all walks of life together to build a better future for everyone in Minnesota.

The truth is our work is needed more than ever. Donald Trump is already nominating a cabinet of MAGA extremists who will work to restrict our right to vote, end the right to choose, make us less safe, and make corporations more powerful while weakening the middle class.

No matter what comes our way, make no mistake: Keith will have our back in the courts. But it’s up to us to keep up the ground game, which is why we need to keep our budget on track month after month.

We know fundraising will take a dip around the holidays, so we need to start working to reach our November target ASAP.

Our records show that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, which allows people to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state.

Peter, will you make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION right now to stand with Keith as he prepares to defend Minnesotans' rights during a second Trump administration?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241119ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1! You can now use your 2023 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

body:
We can't give up now.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

We left everything on the table.

We spent every dollar we had keeping our ads on the air and reaching voters in every corner of the district.

We gave it everything we had and now we're running on empty. _**[Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f29ef83c56364a93940791ee7dc0b0aa&_e=1f6HOLoQ6JQTRSQgsBR7VPj6LtJx9vYx2rafUNV83RX9i9WouvwYufnEIhyc7osLx-68VHDKiYBSmRX9OUzOXt1v5I5F_GSsrP52yR3Rav9ZubVthPeliY2eDTPbD3exiHX-37tqOp7YPsN-k5Faq9Qt0GpjRxxaccIIHymPb0aaV_qq2B9UEvq3lBES-QQ0Rv9hDfvp-9kSQjP2Ej4sTm_g5Oslo0hbNIMseUaBvYZ3aBbRuiYjo1HBFG8IzNlkNrrZWUGB48CYRsTKsXsiV3lAeqUYVV-sVZra6WT4JkQDG4VSkoum3IQcG4csjFZZiYXaTcB02DlSChbpmi78-ciddPYK-z2aglTQT5w9Dqxfjc7AmMwHfj_2P3mM6T85a2_ScwWUs0TXjYXriCJXRUV7dgGNYB7qNubU_SZT0vLittx7BAcSeyh1DwtJaqVmZqZNCnUBwpr3zitVtwuw_wBogiPWPcVyGFDZgZI1djc%3D "Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?")**_ We've fought too hard to give up now just inches away from the finish line.

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Here’s where we are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
The AP called the race and named me the winner, but Democrats refuse to accept the results.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ba75768566a04cacad56100b2e7f5d68&_e=nvT_XeBGH8rPz04liZX95J422xADlOqJeRgaPuBwkQHug1nBwntAU272-cry7qPnZyiFo02Uc0w2RB4S6dvOWZ-aqq4ks7AS6_6qgTuPKZivHLRR4XyC7W7xEsQOWi-67j9gcSgdOxW1ZyvU6OyKFknbN3wcJZVLAmPOVSK4nSis2dDfiknQlDqOGBLJzC4DR7I2fJ8Y0GelkbJqJoHTLieW41wcyh5CG_RZXybrFW016vTizvWIjIvqwgex3Pu7UlKfO8phXiZ7LedJ9ybCvlusalVkINtH2lhSHLibAnSlFu8HuyPJjsEcyz7_0ohmb0x7m8TKitWANeEr9pJ55sk55gtLrm0OyyvxX0tHW5pawJZQFwPpg0Z0bVTHLDdI7DM-TDiKOE9gGvK51_bXzw%3D%3D)

Peter,

**FIRST** , I first launched my campaign for U.S. Senate in battleground Pennsylvania. Pollsters had us down by double digits and said we'd never defeat an entrenched career politician like Bob Casey who has spent 18 years in Washington with nothing to show for it other than a record of voting with Biden/Harris 98% of the time.

**THEN** , people like you stepped up. We got to work and built a movement. We spread my message of bringing CHANGE to Washington.

✔️ We traveled thousands of miles on the campaign bus to all 67 of Pennsylvania's counties.
✔️ I joined forces with other political outsiders like President Trump and Elon Musk who love our country and want to bring real change to preserve the American Dream.

Our double-digit polling deficit turned into a DEADLOCK TIE in poll after poll. The national liberal elite, led by Chuck Schumer, spent hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat me. They brought out celebrities on the campaign trail and used media outlets like the _New York Times_ and CNN to spread lies about me and my family to eliminate any chance of me winning.

**NOW** , the election is over. The AP called the race and named me the winner.

But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to force a recount.

But we're following the lead of President Trump. We are going to FIGHT! FIGHT! FIGHT!

**[But while votes continue to be counted, I'm asking for you to chip in today to help us keep up our fight.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ba75768566a04cacad56100b2e7f5d68&_e=nvT_XeBGH8rPz04liZX95J422xADlOqJeRgaPuBwkQHug1nBwntAU272-cry7qPnZyiFo02Uc0w2RB4S6dvOWZ-aqq4ks7AS6_6qgTuPKZivHLRR4XyC7W7xEsQOWi-67j9gcSgdOxW1ZyvU6OyKFknbN3wcJZVLAmPOVSK4nSis2dDfiknQlDqOGBLJzC4DR7I2fJ8Y0GelkbJqJoHTLieW41wcyh5CG_RZXybrFW016vTizvWIjIvqwgex3Pu7bAEtmx-GcZKKqGrJkH2lvGtSimYg-T6EDT7ZVHAMre1KEzOXa2aJa6Or6r5TEpYmkaQZPin2nRrrzjtUD0pcI-RJXFrrWTynXjOS250P6WuzM-jMDJl4IcNSdXRpRG4emPwm6-7leosuiKkxFQvnxA%3D%3D)**

_If you are not in a position to give right now, please don 't._ I mean it.

But if you are able to give, [I'm humbly asking you to chip in any amount to help us fund whatever the Democrats will throw at us in the coming days.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ba75768566a04cacad56100b2e7f5d68&_e=nvT_XeBGH8rPz04liZX95J422xADlOqJeRgaPuBwkQHug1nBwntAU272-cry7qPnZyiFo02Uc0w2RB4S6dvOWZ-aqq4ks7AS6_6qgTuPKZivHLRR4XyC7W7xEsQOWi-67j9gcSgdOxW1ZyvU6OyKFknbN3wcJZVLAmPOVSK4nSis2dDfiknQlDqOGBLJzC4DR7I2fJ8Y0GelkbJqJoHTLieW41wcyh5CG_RZXybrFW016vTizvWIjIvqwgex3Pu7-dtOsx3yoFmCnG4ZMzE2rxaBrAXNv4vJeMBI8kwqlYH_5o5un95PU6Ql8HW9_XrQ1rfbzGT-A7A0WMjWuWcEty8KGDRI3uQ56GYxAWdGw0c3TomAlGnaU15u2XlO_PECo5Jzpz0vCHPKwbSGbsjSyQ%3D%3D)

Thank you for all of your support. We couldn't have done this without you!

Thank you,
Dave McCormick

subject: Help us thank President Biden for his leadership >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85121?t=6&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85121?t=7&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85121?t=8&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85121?t=9&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85121?t=10&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18075%2E878179%2EpD-ksw)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvania is now the frontline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪
[**So please, donate $5 or whatever you can to Bob Casey today. Let’s make sure his team has the resources they need to get the job done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?refcode=em20241119-2&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz)
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?amount=15&refcode=em20241119-2-el&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?amount=25&refcode=em20241119-2-el&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?amount=50&refcode=em20241119-2-el&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?amount=100&refcode=em20241119-2-el&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?amount=250&refcode=em20241119-2-el&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-2?refcode=em20241119-2&refcode2=4874_552475_6OrKOz&akid=4874%2E552475%2E6OrKOz)

Thank you so much ❤️
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪 Thank you so much ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator for Pennsylvania

name: Phil Izon
subject: War of attrition is a strategy against RCV, ready for round 2?
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | **Phil Izon’s Newsletter**
---
| **I’m pretty excited to fight these guys again. I can’t believe they spent $15 million just in 2024 to Stop our Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting.****We spent 0.1% what they did in 2 years since we started this project****So they spent 7,400% more money than the Repeal did.****It appears we may fail by less than 0.5%****Who’s ready for Round 2?**
---
---
|
---
[_ _**Sign Up Here** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673cce9128dedd046de4f6f3&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673ccce5d2392c0f8ed1acbb%26ss_email_id%3D673cce9128dedd046de4f6f3%26ss_campaign_name%3DWar%2Bof%2Battrition%2Bis%2Ba%2Bstrategy%2Bagainst%2BRCV%252C%2Bready%2Bfor%2Bround%2B2%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-19T17%253A45%253A02Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ccce5d2392c0f8ed1acbb&l=en-US&s=RbAU1qeCAEgLO9GUBbCiwFFhGzM%3D)
---
**2022-2024
FL - Banned RCV -🏆
TN - Banned RCV- 🏆
KY - Banned RCV -🏆
OK - Banned RCV-🏆
MS - Banned RCV-🏆
AL - Banned RCV-🏆
LA - Banned RCV-🏆

2024 Election
MO Banned RCV - 🏆-$6.83 million

SD Rejected RCV - 🏆-$1.6 million
NV Rejected RCV - 🏆-$42.8 million
CO Rejected RCV -🏆- $19 million
MT Rejected RCV -🏆- $5 million
AZ Rejected RCV -🏆-$15.9 million
ID Rejected RCV -🏆- $5.5 million
OR Rejected RCV -🏆- $7.5 million**
---
---
|
---
**“So if the ultimate goal of these changes is to pass ranked-choice voting, it behooves us to know where this revolutionary idea came from and who is behind it. Not surprisingly, the supposedly non-partisan idea is funded by far-left donors like Kathryn Murdoch (wife of one of Rupert Murdoch’s sons) and Alex Soros (son of radical billionaire George Soros).”**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673cce9128dedd046de4f6f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ccce5d2392c0f8ed1acbb&l=en-US&s=DnOOyR-MitNKia8cyc4sa-Jqdtk%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the
---
|
---

Wasilla

Peter, it’s the middle of November, which means _**it’s time to prepare for next year.**_ The conservative Heritage Action team is preparing our agenda for 2025 so that we can activate our grassroots team and pressure the next Congress on DAY 1. We want to be ready to secure the border, cut wasteful spending, fight for election integrity, and make your government more accountable by advancing common-sense conservative policies. **Radical Democrats in Congress** already know that our recent string of conservative policy wins is just the beginning. I’m confident that our team will be ready no matter what they throw at us, but before we go into the policy fights that will decide the future of our country for decades to come, I need help from patriots like you, Peter. **[**Before 2024 is over, can you please rush in a $25 donation to support our team and help them pressure Congress to pass conservative policies in 2025? **](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e036cd0fa5cd4ecab8de86128f57b630&_e=7wcUqxpz_0TLbioF9dFhscckheehIHCUbU0fGyKfzHgqtgA-Ej-SYrAAvvEkNdeQWxtM6znNODiQet8l6fcYTc3-YXsLSfZh59k5cX41fZNEdQOj8tybyBicGkaimRkdVLfv9HcojN7ggrLpVqmczJs-OZGeR8s7W961ZkuuLeynr3EpwCC-ZgaZQ-AgpboCWKJtq-djMfZUHLOq0drZfA0ycFjtd5GILiecV7S8hqQ63yzbaet-vq_hFcnq0_MC1ZcMAMNSkL-_Pw56QK6mZHrXlBxW5Lb5SQW-6ZU4V90lr4A8urV8D41ySsOADvy1riIH3fCG5NIepNXri-DL5YcC2CXSL828WZwPyhNus4M2DuLVWhlcEFr_U-AcT18elyGZcNUblQHiaMgkNK20LA%3D%3D)** Americans already support the common-sense conservative agenda that patriots like you have helped shape. We just need to get the word out and activate constituents to speak out and endorse these policies to their lawmakers. **[**Please help us win the policy fights over the border, elections, spending, and government transparency in 2025 with a grassroots donation TODAY. >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e036cd0fa5cd4ecab8de86128f57b630&_e=7wcUqxpz_0TLbioF9dFhscckheehIHCUbU0fGyKfzHgqtgA-Ej-SYrAAvvEkNdeQWxtM6znNODiQet8l6fcYTc3-YXsLSfZh59k5cX41fZNEdQOj8tybyBicGkaimRkdVLfv9HcojN7ggrLpVqmczJs-OZGeR8s7W961ZkuuLeynr3EpwCC-ZgaZQ-AgpboCWKJtq-djMfZUHLOq0drZfLuG-uVUrtyMpdJxdQOHfj8kRXSqx9agK8ZGIrIIWuuc-qQll3kYsaaB4B0BvQISeDQkIDrBAB5hLaEueyPIKDFEfySPNLaBcr5uIePDspdlJx61-FpGR5a6Bku6AW6NlhbwqeDxruR-Jov_MhNq91VfPLfLPvjh_ZZ7ypTWT9gV)** Thank you in advance for your efforts to help us prepare for the fights ahead,

name: WileyNickel.com
subject: The Shadow Cabinet is gaining momentum... and MAGA haters 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
\- - |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97337485/513086994/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjk5MDI2My05ZmE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DkTJy1xywzq0aB8gekE1hrU-ITK5R31A5wuzBhSIgR0=)

Peter — Wiley’s calls to form a Democratic Shadow Cabinet are gaining steam, and he’s putting in the work to make his plan a reality! clean_body: We can’t afford to do nothing. | | | Peter, We’re demanding President Biden and Congress to take immediate action to protect as many immigrants as possible before it’s too late. President Biden has just 62 days left in office, and the Democrat-controlled Senate has just 18 days of legislative session before the chamber turns over to MAGA Republican control. We can’t afford to sit by and let them do nothing — and we have no time to waste. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | When Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans take control, immigrants will be their first target. They won elections based on lies and fear-mongering about our communities, and the attacks won’t stop there. We’re counting on President Biden and Congress to put protections in place for as many immigrants as possible right now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thanks, team. — Juliana, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. name: David Hogg
subject: A vital victory in North Carolina 🏆
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Every victory matters — here's one you made happen
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241119&t=1&akid=1454%2E587540%2E5hB3jL)
At a moment when we need hope more than ever, I wanted to share a victory that YOU helped make possible, Peter.
Remember Dante Pittman? Thanks to the incredible support of this community, Dante just won his race for North Carolina State House District 24. This wasn't just any victory – this was a crucial flip that will help block a Republican supermajority in the state legislature.
This victory ripples far beyond one district. With Dante's win, North Carolina's new Democratic Governor – Josh Stein will have the power to veto extreme legislation. Your support helped create this vital check on power at a time when we need it most.
This is exactly why Leaders We Deserve endorsed Dante. We saw a community leader whose family has called North Carolina home for generations, someone deeply committed to fighting for affordable housing, public education, and economic opportunity. And you showed up for him – through your donations, your engagement, and your belief that change is possible even in the most competitive districts.
With the presidential election behind us and challenging years ahead, victories like this remind us that local battles matter more than ever. When we come together to support outstanding candidates like Dante, we can create meaningful change that protects democracy where it matters most – in our states and communities.
**This victory belongs to all of us.** Thank you for being part of this community and for supporting Leaders We Deserve as we continue to identify and back candidates who will fight for our shared values.
The work continues, and we'll need you more than ever in the battles ahead. **[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 to keep powering our movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241119?refcode=em20241119-1454&amount=5&refcode2=1454_587540_5hB3jL&akid=1454%2E587540%2E5hB3jL)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241119?amount=5&refcode=em20241119-1454&refcode2=1454_587540_5hB3jL&akid=1454%2E587540%2E5hB3jL)**
With gratitude,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241119&t=2&refcode2=1454_587540_5hB3jL&akid=1454%2E587540%2E5hB3jL)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1454%2E587540%2E5hB3jL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1454%2E587540%2E5hB3jL)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: RON PAC
subject: How big was this victory?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC)
body:
Let’s keep winning| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=23d6904b4dcc4250aa54426376e86aa4&_e=9Vyww_JO8jQvLIMYNtY9zOL1LQVYKcH-eXJO2FJ66EVCUK3RIKMjvoXwUY5aH7V61aIvtPpmhtp_NePnUsHEWCadaIEO2CcZQxnGeKS7KFLB8w2tjFPElkNQCtyezLptij2qHkWLgQdMkGACxJPuFBxd7HYoRLbK0EHQSHTcVJqhS5-mH2aInOQcfkOv52tBX1H74x1J5CmVp1ZlOsM28ARC7og0iJpaQMdmrBkvUdIH5QiB9dTjxKd2V_WxX1-HI-Ls9oCC9cDsKVF1loAwlNgrRHwpzYWh1cPcfUYjPR5bcvdjNbUNmiodd0RqJwNlTbETTE-bacanmrvhNpw0gX5F8OOYaQatlc9Jl8laEVGsL4ebUMIeqjfxtlguqCnOKkmIKpnuR1_lEuEw8sHxUZa5jtev8z5vBe1hm4Q2keFpG7MyQQt2csfxqxdTbCcGWOcEyciulVpK8_N_ZiFnIQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend, **_Donald Trump not only earned a sweeping electoral victory on November 5th, he earned a mandate for change._** The scope of the victory — electoral swing state domination, popular vote victory, and a Republican-controlled Senate — represents a **decisive** rejection of the Biden-Harris administration. And President Donald Trump was just one of many RON PAC-supported candidates who won their elections. We’re proud to have contributed to this year’s victories, especially in some of the tightest races, like Senator-Elect Dave McCormick. **Roughly 75% of Americans think the country is on the wrong track. With this November’s results, that is likely to change for the better very soon—and we have patriots like you to thank.**
---
[**LET’S KEEP WINNING**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=23d6904b4dcc4250aa54426376e86aa4&_e=9Vyww_JO8jQvLIMYNtY9zOL1LQVYKcH-eXJO2FJ66EVCUK3RIKMjvoXwUY5aH7V61aIvtPpmhtp_NePnUsHEWCadaIEO2CcZQxnGeKS7KFLB8w2tjFPElkNQCtyezLptij2qHkWLgQdMkGACxJPuFBxd7HYoRLbK0EHQSHTcVJqhS5-mH2aInOQcfkOv52tBX1H74x1J5CmVp1ZlOsM28ARC7og0iJpaQMdmrBkvUdIH5QiB9dTjxKd2V_WxX1-HI-Ls9oCC9cDsKVF1loAwlNgrRHwpzYWh1cPcfUYjPR5bcvdjNbUNmiodd0RqJwNlRB7Fpw6BTQtWhrEcpxANpwJ04CAPdQUgZXm5S0NOSZdEHMeATSiR5XUWIHdhs5ILX3nGWgWe84vkyZ1S4EtskForGXFQ6qduhoMomP77av8qHsbwPw58DuT3achK6XH41ufMI8ahZ5lG8AVDh9SQ9A%3D%3D)

name: Dyneco Gibson
subject: You're Invited to an Exclusive Virtual Townhall on December 19th
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | Good Afternoon, Are you shocked or stunned by the outcome of the November 5th election? Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our freedoms and rights remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “**Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall.** ” **When:** Thursday, December 19, 2024 **Time:** 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOM In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts, to ensure they remain fair and independent. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in 2025’s judicial elections. Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement. We look forward to seeing you.
---
[ RSVP HERE](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YhVueAlOBMb0se9nBbj0OBKxWIYHr3D3kJ-2BAjmyFPsLuL5LYfA5SyQCem8MRc2-2BPNx79dUT1v08-2FRE2khZJaPl2JCenkEv4hi07veAyQ8xXSk4HXh0pRlI7VjisaAdBODw-3D-3DnSc6_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYMuDAkG2nkMnCVCrX0eukoKwLCjKAFYQ0-2FVxuabM038TCGRJIFGoj3TM2ueZUqroPMxvexZRmu5W00U-2Bhd3O4dFM6oOHYFGjAk36djLhs6SZXIzCdK0nZPk3Yi-2FJPqnC6U2N4FXZXGaopvqpC8FrAlS7vyuNJMa-2BiY7MYSuAbI7bqTZDtG5w6xmLkHbGNi2RP)

clean_body: | | | | | | Good Afternoon, Are you shocked or stunned by the outcome of the November 5th election? Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our freedoms and rights remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall. ” When: Thursday, December 19, 2024 Time: 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOM In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts, to ensure they remain fair and independent. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in 2025’s judicial elections. Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement. We look forward to seeing you. | When: Thursday, December 19thTime: 6:30-8:00pm Where: via ZOOM Zoom Registration Link: We hope you will join us for this meaningful virtual townhall! | In Solidarity, Dyneco Gibson Director of Campaigns and Engagementdyneco@newpaproject.org ; (717) 847-1201 The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4) non profit organization, contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | |

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EmOIVepxr_T2r3OPQkM6Wg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3rFHdabuMWMRsslRTxllyg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmc7Tdc8Z_hiBYJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tCIH3AWrxCmWNrkiiu0NcA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpH26QP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnO03XPGf4YgWCUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Jason Miyares
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Far-left, anti-police, criminal-rights progressives.| | | Peter, Why is it so critical I win my fight for re-election? **Both of the announced Democrat candidates for Attorney General are far-left, anti-police, criminal rights progressives who will make Virginia less safe.** They will support the same criminal first, victim last policies that lead to a surge in violent crime. Public safety demands we put victims over criminals. We aren’t going back to four years of lawlessness in Virginia. _**_[I refuse to let it happen. It’s why I’m running for re-election.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=299994b330464adbbda35d1f30f1409e&_e=fdL7uzs8-OteLknEpWIruYTMKj_JyIWR6FqIGVOApHSz5xt6he3oTZqgGTnnkpz3_RCtWanRGeAJEDRfdgAQWFQ9Vlb2HUlUpIhSV13JOcV9cdBlJ8XG0SVGREOQzOnFXpEUoChCbSDi5y76s9_ktQozSpmt6a2oM3PNj5FOJ7MGjGv6cCjXA3PeKFqHTxv31fiwwQWthPIONph2OtEHAmI5whe3PHYWNzQ87c7pLR2iH3Faehfny5C1NiQFpfhFMIfAMSuEIUR6761ih8Ag2WvX9qNi1pYwKVdIHxFX797KGQpXOQdgsZZOlaGY-06G2V5amQwolhaTmt1fOjS0hT1vLT3MDDBwo8msuuqwDNu_XElJI53PM5ETryYOxnj_iTBNZ3npLKaH86qg0RQX7nPkvJ7eqpG2QsNX0CPuqPs%3D)_**_
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=299994b330464adbbda35d1f30f1409e&_e=fdL7uzs8-OteLknEpWIruYTMKj_JyIWR6FqIGVOApHSz5xt6he3oTZqgGTnnkpz3_RCtWanRGeAJEDRfdgAQWFQ9Vlb2HUlUpIhSV13JOcV9cdBlJ8XG0SVGREOQzOnFXpEUoChCbSDi5y76s9_ktQozSpmt6a2oM3PNj5FOJ7MGjGv6cCjXA3PeKFqHTxv31fiwwQWthPIONph2OtEHAmI5whe3PHYWNzQ87c7pLR2iH3Faehfny5C1NiQFpfhFoqPFMa5jvjluUFkLPD5FdDnV3wTpExzy-MylkYtHlxcAU8CYLbd72-KJJb_SUrJVTQMZk3tWwBepfW69u5MxAbichUQqYw2KmQ4WHkFllC7OPUfy6shWd7qMfqWlTxiQKbvo9J59Gp8tmd5nN39NItpFcxIB5oY-2TaqFDhmEMw%3D)
---
Peter, for too long, the far left has prioritized criminals over law-abiding citizens and victims. I’ve run the Attorney General’s office differently; emphasizing the rights of victims and innocent citizens. And our efforts to fight crime have worked: Operation Ceasefire has seen astonishing results. Virginia’s murder rate is down 30 percent. **_It’s amazing what you can do when you actually make an effort to stop crime!_** _**[_**But if we allow a far-left Attorney General into office, all of this hard work could be lost.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=299994b330464adbbda35d1f30f1409e&_e=fdL7uzs8-OteLknEpWIruYTMKj_JyIWR6FqIGVOApHSz5xt6he3oTZqgGTnnkpz3_RCtWanRGeAJEDRfdgAQWFQ9Vlb2HUlUpIhSV13JOcV9cdBlJ8XG0SVGREOQzOnFXpEUoChCbSDi5y76s9_ktQozSpmt6a2oM3PNj5FOJ7MGjGv6cCjXA3PeKFqHTxv31fiwwQWthPIONph2OtEHAmI5whe3PHYWNzQ87c7pLR2iH3Faehfny5C1NiQFpfhFLhgmLtjJoEDENG2S7wjZjVU21LRUwI340jI5hTKWr6m75758OYxrC1plNr3yUSJyLWX-rbJ9RbdgP4xakC8xCpShed85WM1gacti1kdrpvUV7wj4fFVJjbJgtWAbgLy8st6pUHuYqH2Y9lgGnswP40Qa_rcmg89OGxky5-NFkrg%3D)**_ It’s why I’m not backing down. **Can I count on you to join me by becoming a Day One Defender of my re-election campaign?**
---
[**CHIP IN TODAY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=299994b330464adbbda35d1f30f1409e&_e=fdL7uzs8-OteLknEpWIruYTMKj_JyIWR6FqIGVOApHSz5xt6he3oTZqgGTnnkpz3_RCtWanRGeAJEDRfdgAQWFQ9Vlb2HUlUpIhSV13JOcV9cdBlJ8XG0SVGREOQzOnFXpEUoChCbSDi5y76s9_ktQozSpmt6a2oM3PNj5FOJ7MGjGv6cCjXA3PeKFqHTxv31fiwwQWthPIONph2OtEHAmI5whe3PHYWNzQ87c7pLR2iH3Faehfny5C1NiQFpfhFrTx1VC3pgz7hLuf2-wrvN2Q5CuYv4rtMeBCybWZMos2yCYmH11M9cqOZdYjk7pFO8v-UcUq75Jv7F-QTbRUDcHpUoO60Ovn9FaBF-mObgrhItuV1mdZhNmqAU3u4dbO1nlBBc4e0tkMj-Uu1GW2oz0hjD7gYCrd1ZA-20Iu3-Vg%3D)

Thank you,
Jason Miyares
Attorney General of Virginia

## Trump's putting together his team...
and the media is losing their minds over it. I sat down with my old boss and Trump's first Chief of Staff, Reince Preibus to get his reaction to the picks and give insight into the process.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e1baa45e-5279-4adc-8499-7e6f810afb07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## The Morning Meeting After Dark in NYC TONIGHT...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5414ce1b-d54a-4acd-a8ff-1305340e764b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Visit the [2way.tv](https://substack.com/redirect/fa407bc1-6e6d-4163-921f-6524bc331920?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for more information and the link to purchase tickets directly on Comedy Cellar's website: click on "Reservations," and select November 19 shows for both VIP or General Admission tickets.
**PLEASE NOTE: This program will stream live on YouTube[here](https://substack.com/redirect/cc017c18-636a-48e9-b816-0fef8733fa45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (no Zoom!) **
If you are in the Tristate area, please come join us.
Either way, we will see you at 5pm ET tonight
[click here](https://substack.com/redirect/afbabac8-4c0d-4a2d-b87f-9f75a3065bac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Vibes and Joy, finally we have 'em
After the thrill of winning the 2016 election I was on cloud 9. We had been told is was impossible and yet we overcame all of the doubters and President Trump won 306 electoral votes.
At every corner the prevailing narrative was "no way." He would never file as a candidate, he would never win a primary state, he could never be the nominee, and he certainly could not beat Hillary Clinton. There is no question it was an uncovential campaign. Never before had the team at the RNC play such an integral role as it did in presidential campaign
So when election night came and the results were rolling in we were estactic - thrilled - a feeling like nothing I have ever expericend before. ...

body:
Stand with us to take back America

Friend,

body:

Over Evidence Mishap In Corruption Trial

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb5emum8gnj5kvgqknnn1pdpu5blsc3me1mj9lg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj791lmkp79dhk6ep34t5l6cqb7dpjkorrbdt6e5p79c3l6uh7ac9km9qjccbnsor7fl9lmgqb3df161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4or7fljhe9qb0t9km4qu8oj5cpjm2op66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bpdk6ioredbjm8gq48bi4bh28pr6c9g66o30spg649fg

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Morning Joe Hosts Met With Trump
body:
The hosts of MSNBC’s Morning Joe, Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski, are suddenly singing a different tune about President-elect Donald Trump. After years of gleeful, over-the-top criticism—complete with comparisons to fascists and “Nazi-like” rally rhetoric—they’ve decided it’s time to “reset communications.” Over the weekend, the pair trekked to Mar-a-Lago for a sit-down with Trump, their [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)

Instead of standing shoulder-to-shoulder with his peers, Biden was...somewhere else. Naturally, [...]

Couric, on her podcast Next Question, practically dissected Harris’ campaign missteps, non-answers, and missed opportunities leading up to the presidential election. It’s almost like Couric is daring [...]

subject: Why I’m running

body:
Far-left, anti-police, criminal-rights progressives.| | | Friend, Why is it so critical I win my fight for re-election? **Both of the announced Democrat candidates for Attorney General are far-left, anti-police, criminal rights progressives who will make Virginia less safe.** They will support the same criminal first, victim last policies that lead to a surge in violent crime. Public safety demands we put victims over criminals. We aren’t going back to four years of lawlessness in Virginia. _**_[I refuse to let it happen. It’s why I’m running for re-election.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e96986de711a4d3cb66eaed09a3c4ea9&_e=nL0EJWRsqBj4iWiMdC5ggKoN0yZjhxM6uGVT55BcnQSeGqHxaHn74j6Fd1S0XSgamXGG-3zxXIS9s8WEGaNVMCnYkEvWEb7Dlvsdsa_HQVRtfI_mMEJdnuNH1Ur7qam836JnQfWrdXZMH2FZEGA1TiGGnIl5oYw9PS3qREhzSD5Zk-3hrK_Cy-lvMCyeIbAUdlabPuksR3FwrnGyixzQYDWVgIFaDuKPwOWBAi_eqNSI-vZTM4VSSJ5f7EEoSDaayveOBSotsOt7mYKH_3HyHtFxDrY5539rEOkRKQ7rkWHNyA0aCdfa01WjhWQ3xVIln48XYJ5uBbNIgnUsXPzWQZBNNOuN8tRDpZiqP6F3bNWSGfz9qaTwrJePtAHa278zO3fyaPoeER2yAt4FNeel6Q%3D%3D)_**_

Friend, for too long, the far left has prioritized criminals over law-abiding citizens and victims. I’ve run the Attorney General’s office differently; emphasizing the rights of victims and innocent citizens. And our efforts to fight crime have worked: Operation Ceasefire has seen astonishing results. Virginia’s murder rate is down 30 percent. **_It’s amazing what you can do when you actually make an effort to stop crime!_** _**[_**But if we allow a far-left Attorney General into office, all of this hard work could be lost.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e96986de711a4d3cb66eaed09a3c4ea9&_e=nL0EJWRsqBj4iWiMdC5ggKoN0yZjhxM6uGVT55BcnQSeGqHxaHn74j6Fd1S0XSgamXGG-3zxXIS9s8WEGaNVMCnYkEvWEb7Dlvsdsa_HQVRtfI_mMEJdnuNH1Ur7qam836JnQfWrdXZMH2FZEGA1TiGGnIl5oYw9PS3qREhzSD5Zk-3hrK_Cy-lvMCyeIbAUdlabPuksR3FwrnGyixzQYDWVgIFaDuKPwOWBAi_eqNRweI8JBkCldestpW6bCEPW8JzGD9d47FXKWkjPaV8UKyeBryPKN7CunMHELUFhQEKtOq8qMjx7g3zJTT2WHoey4JnG9RlcoER1QGnfAumbiktXB6jLneKMMAbpHWxYPf9XBGu_8dJCIKBgCDT1MWvObpvRsd_oRc6xBHf_tkbAdw%3D%3D)**_ It’s why I’m not backing down. **Can I count on you to join me by becoming a Day One Defender of my re-election campaign?**

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: MAGA's cabinet picks show standards are falling
body:
Gaetz AG Nomination marks an all-time low in cabinet standards.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vgxyh-ib2bsd-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **MAGA's Cabinet Picks Show Standards Are Falling**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vgxyh-ib2bse-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | folks, In 1993, President Bill Clinton saw two potential Attorney General picks, Zoë Baird and Kimba Wood, withdraw under public pressure for hiring undocumented workers as nannies—actions that, though commonplace among affluent families, were deemed unacceptable for public officials. These controversies set a precedent where ethical standards and public trust mattered. Fast forward to today, and it’s clear how far our standards have fallen. President Elect Donald Trump’s choice of Florida Representative Matt Gaetz for Attorney General is a glaring example of this decline. Gaetz, facing serious allegations of sexual misconduct and unethical behavior—including an investigation by the House Ethics Committee—is somehow still considered for one of the most powerful roles in the country. The same political system that once turned away nominees over nanny taxes now faces the potential confirmation of an individual whose controversies far surpass any past improprieties. Polling confirms Gaetz's unpopularity, with a majority of voters opposing his nomination. Yet Trump’s cabinet is filled with other contentious figures, like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., a vaccine skeptic, and Elon Musk, the billionaire slated to lead the newly created Department of Government Efficiency. The standards that once protected the American public from unfit leadership are now being trampled in favor of personal loyalty and partisan politics. Trump’s potential use of recess appointments to bypass Senate confirmation only adds to this erosion of norms. Even some Republicans, like Senator Kevin Cramer, have publicly called it “unwise,” showing that the concern spans party lines. [**_This isn’t just about one man or one administration—it’s about the integrity of our government. Our most powerful weapon right now is our microphone, so we need to use platforms around the country to hold MAGA accountable! Join us in our fight today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vgxyh-ib2bsf-kyd76rh9/)

subject: Trump has fallen below 50% of votes cast. Sign your name if you’re part of the anti-Trump majority >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign Your Name: “I’m a part of the anti-Trump majority!” >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8392d678-239f-4fba-bd9a-f434cb866223/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb475ecc2-2093-4103-9864-7df20041d2b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After Trump won the election, he declared "America has given us an unprecedented and powerful mandate," thinking he had won some kind of overwhelming majority of the popular vote. But as the votes are actually counted, it turns out that he's actually fallen BELOW 50% of the votes cast. Trump has NOT, in fact, won a "powerful mandate." A majority of voters actually voted AGAINST Donald Trump. As Trump tries to begin his fascist dictatorship, we need to send him a loud and clear message – "We are the anti-Trump majority, you have no mandate, and we'll continue standing up to you and fighting your attempts to undermine our democracy every step of the way." Let's show Trump that he doesn't have "an unprecedented and powerful mandate" – not even close. [**Sign your name if you're a part of the anti-Trump majority >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f95b9aa-59a1-4f94-9104-67e25e6c402c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Join us now!

Friend,

Enough is enough. For too long, weak border policies from Kamala have allowed cartels to flood our communities with drugs and crime undermining our sovereignty.

**[But that stops NOW.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07735d636bde4a8e84694b1aba1cbd00&_e=7xhGOA_UadqxXpYAxW-nMP7aOSj2oTzIOzy3rTOHlro6a0i1Fn2LD8bV0L4YqRWkUhfw8oJ3uycD7jxNV0MZJx3x75gZL09wEy-jzL5PVTH6jB1-n1EJ1h_G6EdQE8Ys1kmZo-h37_oTuoaOOewZUmbdyDQz0hkpGf7a0JD-v87Jt-zoq_GGPZx-ulWekAh66eHWgKk6AzrzmKntRw9bpZENTDbW_hnzEThXZT4Dl0ibQ5ildN0Tyh-3Y6orU2MO6KG0nIOVUMnRv5vv_Ns_V-Ijq0W2rgyqn2yDXXWr5H6cDLcV0J3sKKDDR7Ld6wz6hw9hzTbjdQou4NKaZp5gv9rzuKdQLzHBLQCIWJwFykXCohJO99I_3JaVOnzd0jqNRvRmmLocA6vgYL3elUaSIUFnEKUZFw15mrTsrVW9Pskm5TkXj2W1HH-2uB5NkFdSwuIgxf0aSNEz7IiNL587tw%3D%3D)**

Tom Homan, former ICE Director, will be joining the Trump Administration as a _**[no-nonsense leader of border control](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07735d636bde4a8e84694b1aba1cbd00&_e=7xhGOA_UadqxXpYAxW-nMP7aOSj2oTzIOzy3rTOHlro6a0i1Fn2LD8bV0L4YqRWkUhfw8oJ3uycD7jxNV0MZJx3x75gZL09wEy-jzL5PVTH6jB1-n1EJ1h_G6EdQE8Ys1kmZo-h37_oTuoaOOewZUmbdyDQz0hkpGf7a0JD-v87Jt-zoq_GGPZx-ulWekAh66eHWgKk6AzrzmKntRw9bpZENTDbW_hnzEThXZT4Dl0ibQ5ildN0Tyh-3Y6orU2MO6KG0nIOVUMnRv5vv_Ns_V-Ijq0W2rgyqn2yDXXWr5H6cDLcV0J3sKKDDR7Ld6wz6T5uFckC_HdmpY7Ow4K7ldk3WJMCzrg1tyHBXCRI613ekhAGNJMr_obnG1LiN_RPS6oVvUmfqSxSfoU2oiHxB3ShXeYjbUw-15Zbza01l260ysF9rdU_Qj8kezR48ghXQhdYA6nHgXUhNuIQ_JcfnKA%3D%3D)**_ __**.**__ With his _AMERICA FIRST_ policies, he will restore our borders and ensure that people come here _LEGALLY. _

This isn't just about policy, it's a fight for our nation's survival. We need patriots like you, Friend to join the fight.

******************************************************[RUSH YOUR SUPPORT>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07735d636bde4a8e84694b1aba1cbd00&_e=7xhGOA_UadqxXpYAxW-nMP7aOSj2oTzIOzy3rTOHlro6a0i1Fn2LD8bV0L4YqRWkUhfw8oJ3uycD7jxNV0MZJx3x75gZL09wEy-jzL5PVTH6jB1-n1EJ1h_G6EdQE8Ys1kmZo-h37_oTuoaOOewZUmbdyDQz0hkpGf7a0JD-v87Jt-zoq_GGPZx-ulWekAh66eHWgKk6AzrzmKntRw9bpZENTDbW_hnzEThXZT4Dl0ibQ5ildN0Tyh-3Y6orU2MO6KG0nIOVUMnRv5vv_Ns_V-Ijq0W2rgyqn2yDXXWr5H6cDLcV0J3sKKDDR7Ld6wz6h1MM4MsXzs8-yFr9LkFcnV_UHOW6vafQCx2L0zVu-3THu88aR6ymtAwGMTPLARJTlVw3C4c_HWZ2o-loxsqUldVdN5VbhIQR2f2Jqmu9K89jkcCI2mPZ8W7ULMXssuuEuZE0nw6Ie0AH06S5Fpj_ZA%3D%3D)******************************************************

The time to act is NOW. **[The radical left's open border agenda is its way to destroy our country. Stand with us today and join the fight to take back America.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07735d636bde4a8e84694b1aba1cbd00&_e=7xhGOA_UadqxXpYAxW-nMP7aOSj2oTzIOzy3rTOHlro6a0i1Fn2LD8bV0L4YqRWkUhfw8oJ3uycD7jxNV0MZJx3x75gZL09wEy-jzL5PVTH6jB1-n1EJ1h_G6EdQE8Ys1kmZo-h37_oTuoaOOewZUmbdyDQz0hkpGf7a0JD-v87Jt-zoq_GGPZx-ulWekAh66eHWgKk6AzrzmKntRw9bpZENTDbW_hnzEThXZT4Dl0ibQ5ildN0Tyh-3Y6orU2MO6KG0nIOVUMnRv5vv_Ns_V-Ijq0W2rgyqn2yDXXWr5H6cDLcV0J3sKKDDR7Ld6wz6GYHRsByVmtAXSnbYLrMXA3p_IYRAjF9TsETl1za8Kzk65oNe6kGQeSHlnrmOM96GoQL7KvUVtEXgLBet_rRRxxScxDNHtxcS3hXGaSfn4wASS4q1QokTWznC98wqfGH9Sn5w5dQ6a_Q59z8elzkNHA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

NRSC HQ

---
**“So if the ultimate goal of these changes is to pass ranked-choice voting, it behooves us to know where this revolutionary idea came from and who is behind it. Not surprisingly, the supposedly non-partisan idea is funded by far-left donors like Kathryn Murdoch (wife of one of Rupert Murdoch’s sons) and Alex Soros (son of radical billionaire George Soros).”**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673ce8d5b027c5674c4dd254&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ce82aea8af96fde66fded&l=en-US&s=XyF2SY5eoBachP6WVnZKTYzLAMY%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

name: The Democratic Party
subject: This will only take a minute
body:
We have a request for you, and it’s not for money.
---
It’s been a long few weeks, Derek. But today, we have one more request for you. And it’s not for money. Our country needs a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under Trump's control. We know that you may be exhausted. But we can’t sit back and let Trump take us backward without a fight. So we have to ask: [**Will you add your name if you’re ready to fight back against Trump and his allies’ disastrous agenda, and elect Democrats in 2025, 2026, and beyond?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/are-you-ready-to-get-to-work-2024/?refcode=em_20241119_2341_so&akid=2341%2E22930333%2EZoWj1Q) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/are-you-ready-to-get-to-work-2024/?refcode=em_20241119_2341_so&t=1&akid=2341%2E22930333%2EZoWj1Q)** In just a few weeks, a new Congress will be sworn in and Trump will take office again. That means we need to be prepared for _anything_ coming our way. But to do that, we’re going to need to come together now. So one more time, we’re asking: [**If you’re committed to staying in this fight and stopping Trump and his allies from dragging our country backward, can you add your name now?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/are-you-ready-to-get-to-work-2024/?refcode=em_20241119_2341_so&akid=2341%2E22930333%2EZoWj1Q) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/are-you-ready-to-get-to-work-2024/?refcode=em_20241119_2341_so&t=2&akid=2341%2E22930333%2EZoWj1Q)** Thank you for your support today and every day, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

We know that you may be exhausted. But we can’t sit back and let Trump take us backward without a fight. So we have to ask: In just a few weeks, a new Congress will be sworn in and Trump will take office again. That means we need to be prepared for anything coming our way. But to do that, we’re going to need to come together now. So one more time, we’re asking: Thank you for your support today and every day, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: Lila Rose
subject: Sign our petition to stop subsidizing Planned Parenthood
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=714781d8ea2840e08a46ee1286038b1b&_t=tiLEhOUlkoSOwpdaVPBtoBYTQVgBcIL7-9vbX5-SerINQme3E8U7q1AIsGIhjTK_hNn5ZXjeMj1XVsNAXyR7ZtVzbpv0pForRkR26XSwGCL9LFO0lD3NgzgB2DMxBd53)_

#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=714781d8ea2840e08a46ee1286038b1b&_e=1LZVg6kqSoxNkjV1SZOHijeD_AAhcpgO9t6gY7uj0FbZnqsi4QZ6cuNfotbxfg5Ph6ZbD4L1bntBCDoIc9dLo3eFyV5mKqlgZeM3SwKi7XF062uk-l4wHLpily_AE1RD5ZO1hZGQJqspGlicu_WjunZ55bC6s9I8Xj9Z8n2s3kd8VTYo6tUV6xKEpc5CHgy93msDvK7ITkbk3DUczSxQBdXQpxXKZ3wcE9zoGBsuErFsX0BBGa1S7lGv_fdJZgHhinbcMnbU7ZD67823iyzJN5w-ZLwmqYDl2jECP68ltUkl7HLJzoJs31WPNdVgnVD2PqIASe9xWDv3iB1ZeTSja5BRz6800Vf6rLuGxOO15f2evVpnjHpG9RQr0oZHYFDhsoGO4aWnxXRKGge9WzP3Kg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=714781d8ea2840e08a46ee1286038b1b&_e=1LZVg6kqSoxNkjV1SZOHijeD_AAhcpgO9t6gY7uj0FbZnqsi4QZ6cuNfotbxfg5Ph6ZbD4L1bntBCDoIc9dLo3eFyV5mKqlgZeM3SwKi7XF062uk-l4wHLpily_AE1RD5ZO1hZGQJqspGlicu_WjunZ55bC6s9I8Xj9Z8n2s3kd8VTYo6tUV6xKEpc5CHgy93msDvK7ITkbk3DUczSxQBdXQpxXKZ3wcE9zoGBsuErFJRKg_Z5DbrjUlCXMU9mKlzLr41tWCyla1-9_WWEYMzNX5PtLW3Tz29bfE9v1OpDKGA6WyvrhzDy9OuCNYNtQTeCZ9RY_4naehdi55dN0C6XQrjA2Df8kXZ88DLS_hJmNk_KLuDau-iMA0Y2_VojFmEntqm9hnele_5bvljxMj2g%3D%3D)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6fe31ec30c214174a0a9cdebc5d082c6&_e=YoHDiyX4h6B2JhzBsShzRVh7u9_ORcFVQNmIkhRHMjlZpfgBBBivy4a0Z-jGFqqK2Jaq7vsN037lPFvTxOvACZOmNE-TyfBON4GDIkFc28GhiG1M2Wo0-dJNDmCbigLbwkWJ45Je0YjU8ftV6IwOzySn2U5T562-y5JJyrpC8zerT_idAfJpkcrKqDET1Xslg-dxFH6Hih4AejrLXZq7_YXUhW4wMtd5bHc2A1ko7-lt6uwlA3ScerY60Fgc0rJBlW8ugofJoG7lFNNyplIfuLWzGVk4UXbvcn8Nbg4h8o9cWbPCk69w0YOSzIAv0MuvVzs2d1_Ey1BdLJLzK7Q_If4VwCYwqriy7d7WoQo9w0FSfl9KgkwAHNQqPE55-0EwQ0eiZPq1Z0VXWFeaxegwE2qH39AcmlB5-RaTyhryy4ZG3vWeJhvKjPH1QgFaAAzi)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.

But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | |

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Democratic House Alert

body:
I need to tell you the latest.

---
| | I need to tell you the latest. – A handful of House races are still too close to call. – If we want ANY chance of narrowing Republicans’ House Majority, we need to ensure every last vote is counted fairly – the deadline to ensure a fair count of the votes is as late as December 1st for some of these races. – This is our FINAL chance to build a Democratic firewall in the House and block Trump’s extreme Project 2025 Agenda. [**Trump and Republicans are FURIOUS. He knows if we raise the resources to make sure every vote is counted and Democrats WIN every seat we can in the House – we will DESTROY his hopes of a massive MAGA Majority that lets him run rampant with unchecked power.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97342920/513104478/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241119_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTBjOWY3MS1hZmE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JxUsN30gvjfQEKX2D12tOpwMSFempdUqpAFbpV4ELgg=) [**_Look, some Democrats likely spent down to ZERO after Election Day and may be struggling to find the resources to fight these battles.
