name: Jenna Burns
subject: It’s basically a death sentence
body:
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGqJypS0pDg1t5Ncrh0DOb4oTdqPFWb1yV1JtP0Xy9kL5PDD25L-z_sOtRFBd48_BwmG4SK9Qf3rPliTByr-hmj9CwL5V1acSjZStx90mip03ijnYOZti8Vrqyg-zbPrSD8oFNm7uOO6lMpb2lHsFJo5U4Qh_b0tZNJwO8O8bVcNPg%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGrlGJ8Qw9j1EmcqhiZwn2hmd0funBySlWke8CEJYxU17GE6OmUd8BJ5gopmta_gRLr9Vet0uE4sBIPSGvww2PKdZaHUJVu_RjEr53_sxEDli1w7YPtWz3Im8XCCAySwvlNkU_uGqzn7Jur55vGRN79aEDYFOmtay-kwEQ8jCLnRPg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGpl2IqVXkOUbuKnJAevUAulQx3r6wQOr-weRPTFEM43KVXf6KhC3NrHxyNnJKPcOW8pqR1iUsa89Lk9RMtVhOQjrVowgiwSF00h07DdN5AYqgk1i9lpHCTokEod6qNyGel0wK9W0eB6SZLEKfMYnX8rY9Hiq10bgPXdoEAnNoqybQ%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGq8RK9j6usrZ3KRC5gp5ufG4Llrcmtv1A_TK1PrqwDFMA6QlBwhHEuo0FmAuG75NF3dD2Sd4gjeB95bM8FcOxkOA8IoaMemAVQxmxodKHcl-h0LiTn3qb-Cjud1exRUPs7xirBLh8rMms5sgJjhPsvfjnJcTkN7SHD10ps3OJpeBw%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGocASgTGEtFzPGOMy08NsTeyZ_QOuU_MulAi-BCMFJRJ37AJK5--0uEJhMZMwBqIBu0f4RMnq13mEyn_G6QmoxxevCn_DSN1D75cnwdVmaJbuli2Ac7wBLL_GUa895DlXsWFhWg1znFnPC0MrGh6Usa0LcyLrM-LuR2fIinI0P1Ig%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGrezOuF4GHl1FEKUNy5b7bztXEx8Y746nv7k_dAnyFcDvfG3VFDx9B5NjGDzex-Hi2lo5HvHYBUty47UFfSjSKq3sqgAu30Pr3FuTwc4g5fSFt_0DEiKDMBR5fFmtKx89MjjwyLhuEBG6A5U68lbjkBMcU6PjaRCMFC7673AyNGaw%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rZjE3cFqcAaDkzDzkrVZFqb8xicu__Acb_jGJs-iqzI6feLGSQ4atqodoczAkGTfhHQ1XJ63i7sfD47J2p8yFMzXZyvhvC6k-UBKvpU0aos84X4yyc7yAYX6IYmTSL2a2y8ZL7Rxb_FELFo7FcvkYpLtz3i8VFehIyTk1EtdxakAjJZZ07xHPu5pkpaTAXbAT-WZpIk73yiXfLVdPIeTwGq4PPWKCmZ24K4LrENZBzTTxRL8gl49uKyAYyL1K5ayqHc-FXtG1JQ2F8xHTQK9tAhiAHVpU_4zSMzn3jAm4pWpSGxE89y8Mv9aiew5a9GUdylMz1dsrySHKTJPZQiPVB8XgCJCxq52lKsZXBpi-STGRXRp48kwhRdv1_v3gAy4kA%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_e=N5jvbe-mLN_k6oRWu9L9rRdDvAttTgAryYyiq_-FSb1EMWmrhLrJeJkLQwKd7XOqPvol78HlmQdFWbLJ3GsLCKMgr3Ukb0dP1A6nUNNF_MiUm_otvDc098KTFuur9wXrv3LtlmlfCW8iQ2bDH06p3v5kBccNgW2ehyrVvos5IqLirbM06eRs1_NZ-hV_nk0Hh--Sdc3fHmovrljo-t0BFw%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=4c8dbfc22ad24739b0c56f52ee27d91a&_t=hPPpF-5HDHwOMFvHefwhObW3XwhHpZ2dlvDnXSVW1iAI-8tbDA7uS03XslaaH68Ccj70PJ2YJSlGBoJAP4oc2wwAFBmrV9kcAv90abQgW8eEO15obWR1HvIUm8o8gXvw) to unsubscribe

But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

Dear Friend,
---
Thank you for all your prayers this past week. They were needed and felt! The Kingdom business never slows down and neither do we. That’s why, despite traveling across the country all year, I still felt it vital to head to India to hold a _HISTORIC_ Let Us Worship Revival. India is home to over 1.4 BILLION people and is the single largest unreached population group in the world. Where there is great need, there is great opportunity for the love of Jesus to come in and radically change lives! We witnessed a move of God in just a few short days! _**Check out the amazing highlight video below!**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=5b3873fa94914660870dd67eed6455dc&_e=1Q50Xz00pQKt8b9V-ymt6gYO0N57rWtP2BnaxKOH1HHJd6YE0g2zzooVbMbWEYZbOg8u2QN5Yw5sM0vg99sY_gs9pJbtUGU7WpMfQ0vJ5J379h1Aex6H5RKJIVtH-80vEzMm_ctZra-HzgTiWXhLwWJCMs7NCYiuptKe9Mrx191bGKPC2E4GcfyoKOSvhCxpldMzFROEntlAByuZT6D8870VZi7P1ZtXkMcq_R9PSfQ13aCKJZLS03qgktSfYiKIYOIB2gPtMK9o8tD4AHwUe3I6g0jYdJsNqP5p3qwKXYDcrMQ2eE5Q-zOaQgTOztvbRXvfJyDEy7LpxxgUJsY_Mg%3D%3D)
---
What we witnessed and experienced was beyond our wildest dreams!!! All of this was made possible by the prayers and generosity of the Let Us Worship movement. Our heart is to bring revival to every corner of America and the world: India showed that there is a fire for the Gospel burning, ready to sweep over the nation!
---
[**SUPPORT THE LET US WORSHIP MISSION >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=5b3873fa94914660870dd67eed6455dc&_e=1Q50Xz00pQKt8b9V-ymt6gYO0N57rWtP2BnaxKOH1HHJd6YE0g2zzooVbMbWEYZbOg8u2QN5Yw5sM0vg99sY_gs9pJbtUGU7WpMfQ0vJ5J379h1Aex6H5RKJIVtH-80vEzMm_ctZra-HzgTiWXhLwWJCMs7NCYiuptKe9Mrx191bGKPC2E4GcfyoKOSvhCxpZjntS1bupZTC_E0CNd6zUu4iSiefpAkivM2NgCv8CHjWDyQg-kt24PNy9rgvsPLjTYU4mRnNyRU1Fdy1AFDZYdQfLSIdqJQ8QNGd_oEv3Y2hgrf7ykq8yLQBHcouPCh6pXASMGJsm0aDB51ztZp1tA%3D%3D)

Sean

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: Hit the ground running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
We need your input BEFORE President Trump is sworn in!| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=588fe9ba0498400e95194166d0fa28d6&_e=KReu92KzMolUD-lLk2Yidh8gKQSARH9CVahYJXWSyejnkgysKfocydnJ84RPaubJF1paQvGnYGo60tXdl1rNPs2jcz66YY-HESarVVQOUlp53uPcqZ43H7pvKbEPhU2ZfjEkXIg25icXspTZwh12u8fHrs24GsNEa5Xrgd0lVao7JTYHUomJfxE8LkEMgAyOK-_XVyGvap1JKT9oi_ZobTOzNsMH1UH6tlmloYFZT297qsJ7ls6aERY6vcKJscYZRqCSSCpWgPqUcktzyEzCiA7hX2z8tVtXnJ6rsPHQh2Gi2lUtJIS_ob6bOTO1v8Jk4h72KtzwnfzlLwPOKR52Nm3s_VEJBpSQvoxqvit8mbkseTd7cJ_KzKdypI05QJOM3jDokSEInNbXyzuy2bANUGsrGDJX8iXtwD3r8wRU_dIigl-8kjguBUIaZvDdU32DRafojdEqtKQf57kLi8Rxbg%3D%3D)
---
**Fellow Republican, I’ve opened this up exclusively for TOP PATRIOTS like you!** Guiding our country back on track is absolutely critical for the future of our country and our Party. That’s why we need our Republican Party leaders on the same page. As Speaker, I want to ensure that we’re able to hit the ground running as soon as President Trump puts his hand on the Bible in January and returns to the White House. [**But that can’t happen if we don’t have feedback from our top conservatives. Friend, I’m reaching out to**** _personally_****invite you to complete my****Official Speaker’s Audit.**_ _](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=588fe9ba0498400e95194166d0fa28d6&_e=KReu92KzMolUD-lLk2Yidh8gKQSARH9CVahYJXWSyejnkgysKfocydnJ84RPaubJF1paQvGnYGo60tXdl1rNPs2jcz66YY-HESarVVQOUlp53uPcqZ43H7pvKbEPhU2ZfjEkXIg25icXspTZwh12u8fHrs24GsNEa5Xrgd0lVao7JTYHUomJfxE8LkEMgAyOK-_XVyGvap1JKT9oi_ZobTOzNsMH1UH6tlmloYFZT297qsJ7ls6aERY6vcKJscYZRqCSSCpWgPqUcktzyEzCiA7hX2z8tVtXnJ6rsPHQh2HgsktSUG2UW51tiUchZ3qPzLBqxWjgvKl4r9hJqlZBb-nil1TTglLQYKIJvMnz5sNAGr8LvwJw0CMa9PrZuIt23LOmQbloljgiOv3sr7x7Q73Ks1VwhZD-GwXIfouywBw7UpA18Nmbap4lFYDMvJvbdNKm-hV-3tpSywAXCEziKQ%3D%3D)
---
[**TAKE THE AUDIT >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=588fe9ba0498400e95194166d0fa28d6&_e=KReu92KzMolUD-lLk2Yidh8gKQSARH9CVahYJXWSyejnkgysKfocydnJ84RPaubJF1paQvGnYGo60tXdl1rNPs2jcz66YY-HESarVVQOUlp53uPcqZ43H7pvKbEPhU2ZfjEkXIg25icXspTZwh12u8fHrs24GsNEa5Xrgd0lVao7JTYHUomJfxE8LkEMgAyOK-_XVyGvap1JKT9oi_ZobTOzNsMH1UH6tlmloYFZT297qsJ7ls6aERY6vcKJscYZRqCSSCpWgPqUcktzyEzCiA7hX2z8tVtXnJ6rsPHQh2HqpBmO9clEHspSMFKe9JEhSTocvzksjbZrDs8jIEXBcq2ugEYxgMdWfLJGDD8la_T2Oamu_TFFaqdHu4gPWRsD_5v9BY7--T-wRf20ShLf35hPsPn9sADPnVoNwxwIq_UXOSzcfL4LBBJd3uXpaZl-qjCFUkgB5L_AbcXenChNCQ%3D%3D)
---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Tony Buzbee sued for extortion in L.A. by mysterious 'John Doe',** " Houston Chronicle's **John Lomax V** -- "**Tony Buzbee**, the prominent [Houston attorney representing more than 100 people in a suit against](https://substack.com/redirect/e7926cb1-f9a6-4731-b764-9e29254b1a66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Sean "Diddy" Combs**, has been sued in California for allegedly extorting "high profile" individuals, according to court documents filed in Los Angeles County Court.

The lawsuit, which was filed in L.A. Monday by an unnamed individual identified only as "John Doe," accused Buzbee and his firm of threatening to publicize "entirely fabricated and malicious allegations of sexual assault -- including multiple instances of rape of a minor, both male and female." The suit claimed Buzbee weaponized allegedly baseless accusations in a bid to extort money from the unidentified plaintiff.

Attorneys from Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP are representing the plaintiff. [The firm is one of the largest in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/7e72c01b-4a1f-448f-815c-5633b2a4da85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with more than 1,000 attorneys and 35 offices in countries across the globe.

"Buzbee has established a pattern of leveling baseless, fabricated and malicious allegations at high profile individuals and threatening to name them publicly if they fail to pay exorbitant sums of money," the firm stated in a Monday release. "Buzbee then uses this money to fund his lavish lifestyle. He has deployed these threats in letters, statements to the press, his website and on social media in recent months to try to shake down well known individuals."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b05daa99-6a37-4c20-b368-3acfea5fc639?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The complaint filed against Buzbee alleged the Houston attorney employed a "clear playbook" for extorting celebrities. According to the unidentified plaintiff's attorneys, Buzbee would fabricate allegations and then send a letter demanding payment. If those targeted did not pay, Buzbee would turn to various media outlets as a means to apply public pressure, according to the complaint.

While the plaintiff's identity remains uncertain, the lawsuit accused Buzbee of employing a scheme to obtain payment from individuals associated with Combs.

"With Combs behind bars, and payment unlikely to be forthcoming any time soon, Defendants devised a scheme to obtain payments through the use of coercive threats from anyone with any ties to Combs -- no matter how remote," the complaint alleged. "Defendants specifically targeted high-profile individuals who would suffer immeasurable loss from being publicly accused of committing sex crimes, including drugging and raping minors, even if those allegations are false."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b05daa99-6a37-4c20-b368-3acfea5fc639?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In a statement to the Houston Chronicle, Buzbee dismissed the claims, saying they were without legal merit and "laughable."

"We won't allow the powerful and their high-dollar lawyers to intimidate or silence sexual assault survivors," Buzbee said. "It is obvious that the frivolous lawsuit filed against my firm is an aggressive attempt to intimidate or silence me and ultimately my clients. That effort is a gross miscalculation. I am a U.S. Marine. I won't be silenced or intimidated."

Buzbee said that, on behalf of two clients alleging sexual assault, he sent a standard demand letter to a New York lawyer who represented a potential defendant. The letter was a routine part of the legal process and included no threats or requests for compensation, Buzbee said.

"The letters were sent seeking a confidential mediation in lieu of filing a lawsuit. No amount of money was included in the demand letters. No threats were made. The demand letters sent are no different than the ones routinely sent by lawyers across the country in all types of cases," he said." [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/a82107ad-75cd-4111-b065-9cd9caaada5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Tony Buzbee sued for extortion in L.A. by mysterious 'John Doe', " Houston Chronicle's John Lomax V -- "Tony Buzbee, the prominent Sean "Diddy" Combs, has been sued in California for allegedly extorting "high profile" individuals, according to court documents filed in Los Angeles County Court. The lawsuit, which was filed in L.A. Monday by an unnamed individual identified only as "John Doe," accused Buzbee and his firm of threatening to publicize "entirely fabricated and malicious allegations of sexual assault -- including multiple instances of rape of a minor, both male and female." The suit claimed Buzbee weaponized allegedly baseless accusations in a bid to extort money from the unidentified plaintiff. Attorneys from Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP are representing the plaintiff. with more than 1,000 attorneys and 35 offices in countries across the globe. "Buzbee has established a pattern of leveling baseless, fabricated and malicious allegations at high profile individuals and threatening to name them publicly if they fail to pay exorbitant sums of money," the firm stated in a Monday release. "Buzbee then uses this money to fund his lavish lifestyle. He has deployed these threats in letters, statements to the press, his website and on social media in recent months to try to shake down well known individuals." The complaint filed against Buzbee alleged the Houston attorney employed a "clear playbook" for extorting celebrities. According to the unidentified plaintiff's attorneys, Buzbee would fabricate allegations and then send a letter demanding payment. If those targeted did not pay, Buzbee would turn to various media outlets as a means to apply public pressure, according to the complaint. While the plaintiff's identity remains uncertain, the lawsuit accused Buzbee of employing a scheme to obtain payment from individuals associated with Combs. "With Combs behind bars, and payment unlikely to be forthcoming any time soon, Defendants devised a scheme to obtain payments through the use of coercive threats from anyone with any ties to Combs -- no matter how remote," the complaint alleged. "Defendants specifically targeted high-profile individuals who would suffer immeasurable loss from being publicly accused of committing sex crimes, including drugging and raping minors, even if those allegations are false." In a statement to the Houston Chronicle, Buzbee dismissed the claims, saying they were without legal merit and "laughable." "We won't allow the powerful and their high-dollar lawyers to intimidate or silence sexual assault survivors," Buzbee said. "It is obvious that the frivolous lawsuit filed against my firm is an aggressive attempt to intimidate or silence me and ultimately my clients. That effort is a gross miscalculation. I am a U.S. Marine. I won't be silenced or intimidated." Buzbee said that, on behalf of two clients alleging sexual assault, he sent a standard demand letter to a New York lawyer who represented a potential defendant. The letter was a routine part of the legal process and included no threats or requests for compensation, Buzbee said. "The letters were sent seeking a confidential mediation in lieu of filing a lawsuit. No amount of money was included in the demand letters. No threats were made. The demand letters sent are no different than the ones routinely sent by lawyers across the country in all types of cases," he said." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Tony Buzbee sued for extortion in L.A. by mysterious 'John Doe',** " Houston Chronicle's **John Lomax V** -- "**Tony Buzbee**, the prominent [Houston attorney representing more than 100 people in a suit against](https://substack.com/redirect/830639a2-0257-4890-8692-5dbb8331abbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Sean "Diddy" Combs**, has been sued in California for allegedly extorting "high profile" individuals, according to court documents filed in Los Angeles County Court.

The lawsuit, which was filed in L.A. Monday by an unnamed individual identified only as "John Doe," accused Buzbee and his firm of threatening to publicize "entirely fabricated and malicious allegations of sexual assault -- including multiple instances of rape of a minor, both male and female." The suit claimed Buzbee weaponized allegedly baseless accusations in a bid to extort money from the unidentified plaintiff.

Attorneys from Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP are representing the plaintiff. [The firm is one of the largest in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/b6a722b1-4947-41f6-8a10-662931bc6d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with more than 1,000 attorneys and 35 offices in countries across the globe.

"Buzbee has established a pattern of leveling baseless, fabricated and malicious allegations at high profile individuals and threatening to name them publicly if they fail to pay exorbitant sums of money," the firm stated in a Monday release. "Buzbee then uses this money to fund his lavish lifestyle. He has deployed these threats in letters, statements to the press, his website and on social media in recent months to try to shake down well known individuals."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/e192179c-a81c-4e3c-9416-f13606a6a88d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The complaint filed against Buzbee alleged the Houston attorney employed a "clear playbook" for extorting celebrities. According to the unidentified plaintiff's attorneys, Buzbee would fabricate allegations and then send a letter demanding payment. If those targeted did not pay, Buzbee would turn to various media outlets as a means to apply public pressure, according to the complaint.

While the plaintiff's identity remains uncertain, the lawsuit accused Buzbee of employing a scheme to obtain payment from individuals associated with Combs.

"With Combs behind bars, and payment unlikely to be forthcoming any time soon, Defendants devised a scheme to obtain payments through the use of coercive threats from anyone with any ties to Combs -- no matter how remote," the complaint alleged. "Defendants specifically targeted high-profile individuals who would suffer immeasurable loss from being publicly accused of committing sex crimes, including drugging and raping minors, even if those allegations are false."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/e192179c-a81c-4e3c-9416-f13606a6a88d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In a statement to the Houston Chronicle, Buzbee dismissed the claims, saying they were without legal merit and "laughable."

"We won't allow the powerful and their high-dollar lawyers to intimidate or silence sexual assault survivors," Buzbee said. "It is obvious that the frivolous lawsuit filed against my firm is an aggressive attempt to intimidate or silence me and ultimately my clients. That effort is a gross miscalculation. I am a U.S. Marine. I won't be silenced or intimidated."

Buzbee said that, on behalf of two clients alleging sexual assault, he sent a standard demand letter to a New York lawyer who represented a potential defendant. The letter was a routine part of the legal process and included no threats or requests for compensation, Buzbee said.

"The letters were sent seeking a confidential mediation in lieu of filing a lawsuit. No amount of money was included in the demand letters. No threats were made. The demand letters sent are no different than the ones routinely sent by lawyers across the country in all types of cases," he said." [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/3079f3df-6d45-4d96-a207-4b94af506777?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Tony Buzbee sued for extortion in L.A. by mysterious 'John Doe', " Houston Chronicle's John Lomax V -- "Tony Buzbee, the prominent Sean "Diddy" Combs, has been sued in California for allegedly extorting "high profile" individuals, according to court documents filed in Los Angeles County Court. The lawsuit, which was filed in L.A. Monday by an unnamed individual identified only as "John Doe," accused Buzbee and his firm of threatening to publicize "entirely fabricated and malicious allegations of sexual assault -- including multiple instances of rape of a minor, both male and female." The suit claimed Buzbee weaponized allegedly baseless accusations in a bid to extort money from the unidentified plaintiff. Attorneys from Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP are representing the plaintiff. with more than 1,000 attorneys and 35 offices in countries across the globe. "Buzbee has established a pattern of leveling baseless, fabricated and malicious allegations at high profile individuals and threatening to name them publicly if they fail to pay exorbitant sums of money," the firm stated in a Monday release. "Buzbee then uses this money to fund his lavish lifestyle. He has deployed these threats in letters, statements to the press, his website and on social media in recent months to try to shake down well known individuals." The complaint filed against Buzbee alleged the Houston attorney employed a "clear playbook" for extorting celebrities. According to the unidentified plaintiff's attorneys, Buzbee would fabricate allegations and then send a letter demanding payment. If those targeted did not pay, Buzbee would turn to various media outlets as a means to apply public pressure, according to the complaint. While the plaintiff's identity remains uncertain, the lawsuit accused Buzbee of employing a scheme to obtain payment from individuals associated with Combs. "With Combs behind bars, and payment unlikely to be forthcoming any time soon, Defendants devised a scheme to obtain payments through the use of coercive threats from anyone with any ties to Combs -- no matter how remote," the complaint alleged. "Defendants specifically targeted high-profile individuals who would suffer immeasurable loss from being publicly accused of committing sex crimes, including drugging and raping minors, even if those allegations are false." In a statement to the Houston Chronicle, Buzbee dismissed the claims, saying they were without legal merit and "laughable." "We won't allow the powerful and their high-dollar lawyers to intimidate or silence sexual assault survivors," Buzbee said. "It is obvious that the frivolous lawsuit filed against my firm is an aggressive attempt to intimidate or silence me and ultimately my clients. That effort is a gross miscalculation. I am a U.S. Marine. I won't be silenced or intimidated." Buzbee said that, on behalf of two clients alleging sexual assault, he sent a standard demand letter to a New York lawyer who represented a potential defendant. The letter was a routine part of the legal process and included no threats or requests for compensation, Buzbee said. "The letters were sent seeking a confidential mediation in lieu of filing a lawsuit. No amount of money was included in the demand letters. No threats were made. The demand letters sent are no different than the ones routinely sent by lawyers across the country in all types of cases," he said." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Adam needs our support now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8193%2E5257348%2EBWDj7U)
Derek, we want to give you a quick update:
**FIRST,** Adam was attacked by Donald Trump, Tucker Carlson, Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and dozens of other MAGA leaders who wanted to stop him from making it to the Senate _(they failed)_.
**THEN,** just _days_ after the election, Elon Musk — a top Trump advisor — came after Adam for speaking out against Trump’s selection of Matt Gaetz for Attorney General. Musk called Adam “as dirty as they come.”
**NOW,** we need to rush support to Adam. If the wealthiest person in the world, who happens to be a close ally with Trump, is coming after Adam, then who knows what attacks will keep coming his way. Musk is using his media platform and tens of millions of followers to continue demonizing anyone with the guts to stand up to Trump.
**[Derek, can you pitch in $10 right away to help us support Adam as he faces attacks from Elon Musk and the MAGA movement?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241119_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=8193%2E5257348%2EBWDj7U)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Derek, we want to give you a quick update: FIRST, Adam was attacked by Donald Trump, Tucker Carlson, Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and dozens of other MAGA leaders who wanted to stop him from making it to the Senate (they failed). THEN, just days after the election, Elon Musk — a top Trump advisor — came after Adam for speaking out against Trump’s selection of Matt Gaetz for Attorney General. Musk called Adam “as dirty as they come.” NOW, we need to rush support to Adam. If the wealthiest person in the world, who happens to be a close ally with Trump, is coming after Adam, then who knows what attacks will keep coming his way. Musk is using his media platform and tens of millions of followers to continue demonizing anyone with the guts to stand up to Trump. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thanks! Team Schiff | | 135 E. name: Diane Sare
subject: WWIII before January 20th?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241119_donate&n=1)
---
Friend -- It turns out that not only was I right when I warned that "A Vote for Kamala Harris is a Vote for Nuclear War," but apparently, even a vote AGAINST Kamala Harris was a vote for nuclear war, as we can see from the recent reversal of the Biden Administration in allowing Ukraine to launch ATACMS into Russia just two months before President-Elect Donald Trump assumes office. Of course, it's not Ukraine which is doing the launching, which began this morning, but the United States of America, as Russian President Putin and others have told us for months. Ukraine doesn't have the capacity to guide these American-made weapons to their targets, but requires American soldiers to do it. So President Biden, or someone acting for him, has put us in a direct military confrontation with Russia (a nuclear superpower), without going to Congress for the required Declaration of War. This is an impeachable offense. Former Congressman Dennis Kucinich said that Congress can take the following action immediately: "Any Member of Congress can, under privileges of the House, ask for immediate consideration of a joint resolution which invokes Article I, Section 8, and then cuts off all funding for personnel, coordination, technical advisers, materiel, equipment and deployment of ATACMS and emplacement of any other offensive missile systems in Ukraine." This is why Jose Vega and I ran for office in 2024, and why I will not be silent in the face of this threat to our mortal existence as a human species. Call your Representatives and demand that they uphold the U.S. Constitution by stopping this war now! In the next couple of days, I will be making a very exciting announcement about my plans for the immediate future. You will not be disappointed. I will remain highly visible and active, as you can see from my statement below. In the meantime, I need to raise $11,500.00 to wrap up my campaign by December 1, and I need your help. It's not a lot, unless you don't chip in! | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241119_donate&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241119_donate&n=2)

name: Team Hawley
subject: Josh on Ingraham Angle: “January 20th can’t come soon enough”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=009fcc6fced64c929aeb294ab3b3169a&_e=tlwbMB872HqAwvsqExxTvuM4VCsL9nMfg2m4abykFNY2s_TUHH-rWU4kiiXRLm1kzibb_qWFSGSfgUm_xOi5HtTTBsS_CmuP1MlN_qn5eGNulMnZ1a7SXu3OXyLcOTZySGnfP6DuDTQOxsb7OXMbUBp8nErAFMEnnW3biTrS14keASWgimDjkbhhmIUaYngvhVZf5f2LloVWlSYGJLsOLHw_pxCSu8qoN-R4Utg2vqcrtDhThDcrx2bKfTUOFPtwg5_JAtYbUH-bG9-YxSgU7Cr9PAAsIJXRXZ5YHaI3VcLc_22sfsqokaHXGIkXFBKB4Rh3mocqs5pNgGlMlbpK-c906ohFwX0YJUpLdZ1ybZXgnCQoyQi4TQiKytI13VYn)
---
Last night, Josh joined Laura Ingraham to discuss Biden’s dangerous escalation of the war in Ukraine - who’s making the decisions, and where America's national security interests really lie. Two things are clear, expanding the war in Ukraine is pushing the world closer toward an all-out war, and January 20th can’t come soon enough! _**WATCH THE INTERVIEW BELOW ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=009fcc6fced64c929aeb294ab3b3169a&_e=tlwbMB872HqAwvsqExxTvuM4VCsL9nMfg2m4abykFNY2s_TUHH-rWU4kiiXRLm1kzibb_qWFSGSfgUm_xOi5HtTTBsS_CmuP1MlN_qn5eGNulMnZ1a7SXu3OXyLcOTZySGnfP6DuDTQOxsb7OXMbUBp8nErAFMEnnW3biTrS14keASWgimDjkbhhmIUaYngvhVZf5f2LloVWlSYGJLsOLHw_pxCSu8qoN-R4Utg2vqeF6JzoggbyUp0GCbC_yp5yyb9c02-6glVGkYmaAgl-C8PHoWkORklKRc8nFFd783Yinaor9PIx3SO9JbVzEuCFi9isN1_9aJsSM77hU10ZrKNw_K_U0VmLrNZNMY9rshFsJsvmkNCmHIPslu8x6M-m)
---
Here's a great quote from the interview:

_It looks like escalation to me, Laura. It looks like a green light for escalation on the part of Ukraine, and then Russia as you pointed out. What would happen if Russia would launch missiles into the territory of a NATO member? Then our treaty obligations would be triggered. Then we're talking about a full-scale war. I can't imagine that President Trump wants that. He's been totally against it. What I'm sure he wants is for Biden to stop screwing this up and allow him to get into office and begin to work towards America's security interest. Let's remember what our interests in the region are—it’s our national security, that's what we ought to be putting first and giving a green light to shoot missiles into Russia— that's not putting our interests first, it's putting them last._
---
[**STAND WITH JOSH HAWLEY >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=009fcc6fced64c929aeb294ab3b3169a&_e=tlwbMB872HqAwvsqExxTvuM4VCsL9nMfg2m4abykFNY2s_TUHH-rWU4kiiXRLm1kzibb_qWFSGSfgUm_xOi5HtTTBsS_CmuP1MlN_qn5eGNulMnZ1a7SXu3OXyLcOTZySGnfP6DuDTQOxsb7OXMbUBp8nErAFMEnnW3biTrS14keASWgimDjkbhhmIUaYngvhVZf5f2LloVWlSYGJLsOLHw_pxCSu8qoN-R4Utg2vqcZC0d4LfZ2158eHejHgqWGu-vKwMLKJueSmECkxzEFpLeSdJaXbCJU7hNxV8ekEN9c91H1vx8iJU9qRcZR1dcQOfNUl_u__WNmOgEyi0y6TF189rA83fMSmct0zi-efourhbWZG2XOkn36MXbdQ9CH)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: A disease in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Party building is different.
#
There is a disease in Washington of Democrats who spend more time listening to the donor class than working people.
If you want to know the seed of the party’s political crisis — **that’s it**.
**The DNC needs an organizer who gets people**. Not someone who sends fish heads in the mail.
A lot of people want to bring Obama-era insiders back for party building purposes.
While those folks ran successful presidential campaigns, they also oversaw some of the largest downballot losses in modern times.
**Party building is different**. Look to people with recent successes.
Our movement came to Congress to make _real change_ for working families across the country.
Even when they call us extreme, now more than ever we must continue doing what we came here to do: **demand better**.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today so we can keep pushing the Democratic Party forward? Every dollar goes to our campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241119.apk8tu&refcode=em20241119-7610-P_FND_CTR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7610%2E2526796%2EeE-MeB)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241119.apk8tu&refcode=em20241119-7610-P_FND_CTR_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7610%2E2526796%2EeE-MeB)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241119?refcode=em20241119-7610-P_FND_CTR_TWT&t=21&refcode2=7610_2526796_eE-MeB&akid=7610%2E2526796%2EeE-MeB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241119-7610-P_FND_CTR_TWT&t=22&akid=7610%2E2526796%2EeE-MeB)**

If you want to know the seed of the party’s political crisis — that’s it. The DNC needs an organizer who gets people. Not someone who sends fish heads in the mail. A lot of people want to bring Obama-era insiders back for party building purposes. While those folks ran successful presidential campaigns, they also oversaw some of the largest downballot losses in modern times. Party building is different. Look to people with recent successes. Our movement came to Congress to make real change for working families across the country. Even when they call us extreme, now more than ever we must continue doing what we came here to do: demand better. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Don’t let Republicans silence Pennsylvania voters!
body:
Peter: it’s tough.
I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.
I don’t want to rile you up unnecessarily after everything you’ve been through over the last week, but I need all hands on deck now to ensure we hold the line.
I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. Split $25 with The Real Texas PAC to help us get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1]

subject: The New York Times: Wrong About Trump's Economy
body:
The New York Sun told you the truth.
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8c5cc4d69705485099a65df1bead1c31&_e=-Niw-MQtohV7ukd-w_ROPkqGyXy-dnB_8S5GbJ86paiqNxLlisxxwvLaqMTY8-SJFY62OQX-j2T2adv2l-XLQZhAo8JsB9HHHJb76nT8ITtBeEVxwG3zWbbboS7mw7ADcxt24-73DxDkcStYK53mVJE_YAKHV3BEfZSyyvEh8pcMZQ_PdPWylmlpoW7vnCPGhydWXqrT6zl6ABWJz8jSLzXxno3u8CBN2B4U52akm6Bicpjp0iHjuxsAjWB5sdudHKEDpUdUUbHmZuLFGAxjn7dRR9yNnYQpUWlWwZuilm0TSvuUn4ycNWN8JVOC_9kGVX8qBN4lImXDd35d9tfq03niw7tsR5B4v06waO4lXvSAX2yulzpfMYnicEhQ08vq)

|

| | FROM THE DESK OF THE PUBLISHER
---
| | Peter,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from days ago, shows how the Times covered the prospect of President Trump's economic policies. The Times wants you to think they are doomed to fail, and not to consider the opportunity that comes with a fresh approach. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less.**
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8c5cc4d69705485099a65df1bead1c31&_e=-Niw-MQtohV7ukd-w_ROPkqGyXy-dnB_8S5GbJ86paiqNxLlisxxwvLaqMTY8-SJFY62OQX-j2T2adv2l-XLQZhAo8JsB9HHHJb76nT8ITtBeEVxwG3zWbbboS7mw7ADcxt24-73DxDkcStYK53mVJE_YAKHV3BEfZSyyvEh8pcMZQ_PdPWylmlpoW7vnCPGhydWXqrT6zl6ABWJz8jSLynuklnFoNj92cKp36pz-sH47qygXACz4mFKL42b2LHMFH-qQ8np73hMWDulu6B4M6dY0jF---gJd5_UZYI-3k9oRGyt4w2GY6E54EpJGMCcbeLnfZqx7jyw5DC2mQxba2itYrknR6UCVcqZ7s_Ob7Gk1pExAmqwyJ537aj-z8WS)
---
| | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what **you** can do about it. The answer is simple: [Join The New York Sun today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8c5cc4d69705485099a65df1bead1c31&_e=-Niw-MQtohV7ukd-w_ROPkqGyXy-dnB_8S5GbJ86paiqNxLlisxxwvLaqMTY8-SJFY62OQX-j2T2adv2l-XLQZhAo8JsB9HHHJb76nT8ITtBeEVxwG3zWbbboS7mw7ADcxt24-73DxDkcStYK53mVJE_YAKHV3BEfZSyyvEh8pcMZQ_PdPWylmlpoW7vnCPGhydWXqrT6zl6ABWJz8jSLxldRBYwR2hksreoq660aMGpoCHJEzXrB84npTwHPlP0AH9F9RTT0tG2zpOFvYQ8FxrH8Vns7amDC_90Hey03PYQN9J1f3G80N-2t-5Afktw62lpq35HcnMXYtiLJDn_11ooDD-vL0TfTmfZuJFEyTPQQxnZdqdLlR4ZMcxCKzNE). Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record! Don't wait. Join the movement to save American journalism now.

body:
Our historic victories are thanks to you! | | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c9ca2044931249a38bde439539a9c074&_e=yVQq1B5kPufR0OazppsuikbS-wz_mNiT1RMkySGNHRVUQzfCS4c7Ns2-gtNifrXv_gTaTAr9H1nVGppFfmmDwVgF4n8dKOGbbi2Rp5C-4_jY_1MCx_VgOtSTnqmSHMiJyHJxYuGKFcmGbMEuJUbNYhZlppi0tKy2s0RWfShBNwUxzgW2utp1DI4V8d7Ni7rqxcpszj91va-wYItSSfVm7_V4Ibsr5KUgpBDZDSlugzOnvwVilk96GhVZIt0lUnhknzM6v9x66ehUP1hgEoVh3NkQiRzkQ_4s3RRTHgxLJ3Dla4eJicqZiA4xaX9AKNDJFQro3BIoD4w3CjBwEwddgic3BNjQaxktNcGs-PVyYbColRQ_W3a7HjlJVTthfjkAr4UB2LjdTa5urn6ATrIt-G1BhDjQc_p76BIx_8CwW8k%3D)

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your dedication and hard work this election. **Thanks to your support, Republicans have SWEPT INDIANA!**
---
[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c9ca2044931249a38bde439539a9c074&_e=yVQq1B5kPufR0OazppsuikbS-wz_mNiT1RMkySGNHRVUQzfCS4c7Ns2-gtNifrXv_gTaTAr9H1nVGppFfmmDwVgF4n8dKOGbbi2Rp5C-4_jY_1MCx_VgOtSTnqmSHMiJyHJxYuGKFcmGbMEuJUbNYhZlppi0tKy2s0RWfShBNwUxzgW2utp1DI4V8d7Ni7rqxcpszj91va-wYItSSfVm7_V4Ibsr5KUgpBDZDSlugzOnvwVilk96GhVZIt0lUnhknzM6v9x66ehUP1hgEoVh3LhYi-yY8JPF5ckKXnMWCcSvYHfKy2NzcHvpd2FF02qa9j2dW1RbVypsdabDT4JRpeBNxn7Vkd6szp-h6P1MqNXosXQUb5F8pwNOYHRseFL8XOl3DeuLrfwiarlyWpwe2TTJaz_3DQCcm9dqYJDMvR0%3D)

President Trump, Mike Braun, Jim Banks, Todd Rokita, and our down-ballot candidates have secured historic victories in our state. Now, they can enact the policies YOU voted for and defend YOUR values. But we can’t rest on our laurels too long because**Democrats are already preparing to sabotage, investigate, and stall President Trump and the Republican agenda.** I won’t ask you for a lot of money after you did so much this year. However, I would like your help preparing for 2025 and beyond. Democrats will have energy and will come swinging back to tear down our majorities next year. _**[**Can you please make a $2.50 commitment each month starting today so we can prepare to defend President Trump and our new Republican majorities?**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c9ca2044931249a38bde439539a9c074&_e=yVQq1B5kPufR0OazppsuikbS-wz_mNiT1RMkySGNHRVUQzfCS4c7Ns2-gtNifrXv_gTaTAr9H1nVGppFfmmDwVgF4n8dKOGbbi2Rp5C-4_jY_1MCx_VgOtSTnqmSHMiJyHJxYuGKFcmGbMEuJUbNYhZlppi0tKy2s0RWfShBNwUxzgW2utp1DI4V8d7Ni7rqxcpszj91va-wYItSSfVm7_V4Ibsr5KUgpBDZDSlugzOnvwVilk96GhVZIt0lUnhknzM6v9x66ehUP1hgEoVh3P7mJ38YQ50xMeOv4LJ_18vCX2pCACdN9pdUl_7nyARKDh_vGalNQlOYUcsx6I_Ai-6dX7L2MmhX0Gf3ITO9v2HVfOBwrjuJIUri2dw3NIeeoJsHlJcKx4nDwiYpj2Ds91jTk8eqagEdywkuSvRIeZg%3D)**_ _Two dollars and fifty cents may not sound like much, but we don’t need much to keep Indiana red next year. If every Hoosier reading this email can pitch in, we’ll have the resources in time to pave the way for even more victories._ _**[**Please make a monthly donation of $2.50 to keep up our momentum for more wins in 2025 and beyond. >>**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c9ca2044931249a38bde439539a9c074&_e=yVQq1B5kPufR0OazppsuikbS-wz_mNiT1RMkySGNHRVUQzfCS4c7Ns2-gtNifrXv_gTaTAr9H1nVGppFfmmDwVgF4n8dKOGbbi2Rp5C-4_jY_1MCx_VgOtSTnqmSHMiJyHJxYuGKFcmGbMEuJUbNYhZlppi0tKy2s0RWfShBNwUxzgW2utp1DI4V8d7Ni7rqxcpszj91va-wYItSSfVm7_V4Ibsr5KUgpBDZDSlugzOnvwVilk96GhVZIt0lUnhknzM6v9x66ehUP1hgEoVh3NfW13zQST4phitWjkZPino9dlkcz2aP7eXkR0lGtMep4pgXPFcOAjWcDptA27fA3Z3fjD208RbpcGX7b_mybTNqs7RPyXVevU9AbzB3hPLm4tdJ7BMAAHZMAUdDxXFTVmItVQ3GcOuYfWCoUEmCLTc%3D)**_
---
[**HELP REPUBLICANS KEEP WINNING IN 2025**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=c9ca2044931249a38bde439539a9c074&_e=yVQq1B5kPufR0OazppsuikbS-wz_mNiT1RMkySGNHRVUQzfCS4c7Ns2-gtNifrXv_gTaTAr9H1nVGppFfmmDwVgF4n8dKOGbbi2Rp5C-4_jY_1MCx_VgOtSTnqmSHMiJyHJxYuGKFcmGbMEuJUbNYhZlppi0tKy2s0RWfShBNwUxzgW2utp1DI4V8d7Ni7rqxcpszj91va-wYItSSfVm7_V4Ibsr5KUgpBDZDSlugzOnvwVilk96GhVZIt0lUnhknzM6v9x66ehUP1hgEoVh3K3VfSX0GMCykyo9g5aanyIh3UJzUMXvK6Db-7XAmV5qpMxPOkolo-9L7eLkkcWYGc2LvKQQHldYtG6GpjAOu437QG0klFJl-awWyn1ool02471xn35JxCKGb608tMcHpcbpl5xd4ifEycc0hCiSkr4%3D)

Randy Head Chairman

name: Team Lateefah
subject: Entering the coliseum…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap]
Friend,
Lateefah likes to say she’s “entering the coliseum,” since that’s what the Capitol can feel like in these turbulent times. Good thing our Congresswoman-elect is ready for a fight. Lateefah is wrapping up congressional training this week, so that she will be ready on day one to stand up for our communities, protect what matters, and drive real change where it's desperately needed.
Take a moment to check out some photos of Lateefah’s past few weeks:
https://www.msnbc.com/the-weekend/watch/-we-know-what-s-in-front-of-us-congresswoman-elect-lateefah-simon-takes-on-the-incoming-trump-admin-224693317799 [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weekend/watch/-we-know-what-s-in-front-of-us-congresswoman-elect-lateefah-simon-takes-on-the-incoming-trump-admin-224693317799]
Our Congresswoman-elect had the pleasure of joining The Weekend on MSNBC to talk about her new role in a Republican-dominated Washington, and how she’s pushing back against the incoming Trump administration. Click here [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weekend/watch/-we-know-what-s-in-front-of-us-congresswoman-elect-lateefah-simon-takes-on-the-incoming-trump-admin-224693317799] to watch the full video.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap]
During their District Download event, Congresswoman Barbara Lee and Congresswoman-elect Lateefah Simon discussed key issues like housing accessibility and violence prevention. Afterward, Lee officially passed the "baton" to Lateefah, entrusting her to carry the fight for CA-12 forward.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap]
Lateefah joined Democratic leaders in celebrating Barbara Lee at her appreciation event in Washington, DC. This event wasn’t just a celebration — it was a recognition of the legacy Barbara Lee has built and the impact she’s had on our community.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap]
On the first day of Congressional Orientation, Lateefah joined the 119th Congress Progressive Caucus freshman class, making it clear she’s ready to fight for hard-working Americans and the people depending on real change.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap]
Class photo! At the end of the new member Orientation's first week, Lateefah stood proudly along with the freshman class of the 119th Congress. History in the making.
Friend, here's the truth: right now, our voices are being drowned out by those who are more interested in preserving the status quo than addressing the real issues facing everyday people.
Lateefah has made it clear that she’s prioritizing stepping up as a leader for CA-12 and working to rebuild the Democratic Party nationwide.
But this fight is bigger than one person. It’s going to take all of us working together to continue pushing for change. Your support is what keeps Lateefah in the fight, ensuring that the needs of working families are represented every single day.
Will you contribute today to help us build a foundation to continue this fight and protect our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap]
Together, we will ensure that the people's voices are never silenced.
In solidarity,
Team Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_111924_quarterlyrecap] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

clean_body: [] Friend, Lateefah likes to say she’s “entering the coliseum,” since that’s what the Capitol can feel like in these turbulent times. Good thing our Congresswoman-elect is ready for a fight. Lateefah is wrapping up congressional training this week, so that she will be ready on day one to stand up for our communities, protect what matters, and drive real change where it's desperately needed. Take a moment to check out some photos of Lateefah’s past few weeks: [] Our Congresswoman-elect had the pleasure of joining The Weekend on MSNBC to talk about her new role in a Republican-dominated Washington, and how she’s pushing back against the incoming Trump administration. Click here [] to watch the full video. [] [] During their District Download event, Congresswoman Barbara Lee and Congresswoman-elect Lateefah Simon discussed key issues like housing accessibility and violence prevention. Afterward, Lee officially passed the "baton" to Lateefah, entrusting her to carry the fight for CA-12 forward. [] Lateefah joined Democratic leaders in celebrating Barbara Lee at her appreciation event in Washington, DC. This event wasn’t just a celebration — it was a recognition of the legacy Barbara Lee has built and the impact she’s had on our community. [] [] On the first day of Congressional Orientation, Lateefah joined the 119th Congress Progressive Caucus freshman class, making it clear she’s ready to fight for hard-working Americans and the people depending on real change. [] [] Class photo! At the end of the new member Orientation's first week, Lateefah stood proudly along with the freshman class of the 119th Congress. History in the making. Friend, here's the truth: right now, our voices are being drowned out by those who are more interested in preserving the status quo than addressing the real issues facing everyday people. Lateefah has made it clear that she’s prioritizing stepping up as a leader for CA-12 and working to rebuild the Democratic Party nationwide. But this fight is bigger than one person. It’s going to take all of us working together to continue pushing for change. Your support is what keeps Lateefah in the fight, ensuring that the needs of working families are represented every single day. Will you contribute today to help us build a foundation to continue this fight and protect our democracy? [] Together, we will ensure that the people's voices are never silenced. In solidarity, Team Lateefah [] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter. To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] Lateefah for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 United States Paid for by Lateefah for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Thanks to your efforts and generous donations, we took back the U.S. Senate, and President Trump won!

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tomorrow the Senate will vote on sending more weapons and bombs to Israel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders is bringing his Joint Resolutions of
Disapproval to block new shipments of U.S.-made weapons and military
equipment to Israel up for a vote TOMORROW.

Have you signed the petition in support of it yet,
Peter?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140516?t=1002&akid=36164%2E1203867%2EDYEqkZ ]Add your name to stand with Bernie and urge the Senate to stop arming
Israel’s genocide now →

Add Your Name

Peter,

For more than a year, the far-right government of Israel has conducted
countless war crimes against Palestinian and Lebanese civilians — and the
United States gave them $22 billion in weapons and bombs to do it.

A new report found that U.S. taxpayers funded 70 percent of Israel’s
attacks over the last year that have left at least 170,000 people killed
or injured in Gaza and Lebanon, even though a majority of Americans
support an immediate ceasefire.

The Biden administration wants to send another $20 billion worth of
military aid despite clear evidence of Israel displacing millions of
people, systematically destroying Gaza’s healthcare system, blocking food
and medical aid from reaching those in need, burning families alive in
refugee tents, and much more. To continue arming Israel while it commits
genocide and ethnic cleansing would violate federal and international law.

We cannot stand by while our tax dollars fuel this carnage. That’s why
Senator Bernie Sanders has introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to
block new shipments of U.S.-made weapons and military equipment to Israel.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140516?t=1003&akid=36164%2E1203867%2EDYEqkZ ]Bernie is bringing his resolutions up for a vote, so we need to build

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I will always fight for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m eager to roll up my sleeves, and get back to work in the Senate.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4532%2E35263%2EHt_q1m)
Peter — My opponent has finally conceded, and I’m eager to put this race behind us, roll up my sleeves, and get back to work in the Senate. >From the bottom of my heart, **I want to say thank you to the people of Wisconsin for putting their trust in me to continue to be their fighter in Washington,** and thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign from afar. The way we won this race is the way I have always approached the job: we did everything — _everywhere_ — all at once. Our campaign traveled all over our great state and really listened to people — and I worked day in and out to deliver progress on the issues that matter most to people across our state. And in turn, Wisconsinites showed up for me. Folks like the farmers and the dairy industry who I’ve fought alongside, earning the endorsement of the Wisconsin Farm Bureau. The workers on foundry floors who are getting more business because of my Made in America laws. The LGBTQ+ families who saw through the nasty attacks ads and knew that I had their back to live their authentic lives free from hate and discrimination. And the women who had their rights stripped away and saw me on the frontlines fighting for their freedoms. While I am overjoyed at our victory, I know the results of the presidential race weren’t what we hoped for. While we worked our hearts out to elect Kamala Harris, I recognize that the people of Wisconsin chose President Trump. Nevertheless, our work is not over yet, and we cannot give up. **I will always fight for Wisconsin.** That means working with President Trump to deliver for our state, and standing up to him when he does not have our best interests at heart. Because the heart of why I got into public service is to get things done, and make life better for the people I represent. We all deserve a country with less vitriol, less division, less hatred, and more truth. Because it’s time we come together and tackle the problems that are _actually_ facing working people and communities across our state. It’s time we put the politics of division behind us. It’s time we lower costs for working families, deliver more affordable health care, continue our fight for a Made in Wisconsin economy, and redouble our effort to pass my _Women’s Health Protection Act_ so every woman has the same rights and freedoms regardless of their state, county, or zip code. And it’s time we follow our state motto and continue our march: **Forward.** But I can’t do this work alone, so I want to end by thanking _everyone_ who made this victory possible: My talented campaign team who worked their hearts out, all in an effort to reach as many voters as we could. Each individual who volunteered for this campaign. Our state has the most dedicated volunteers anywhere in the country. We could not have done this without the tens of thousands of Wisconsinites who knocked on doors and made phone calls to win this race. Supporters like you who stood by my side every step of the way — kept up with our campaign updates, made sure your family and friends had a plan to vote, and chipped in your hard-earned dollars when you could. I couldn’t have done this without you, Peter. And to the people of Wisconsin: thank you for putting your trust in me as your United States Senator. Let’s get to work! Forward, Tammy | | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov2024.9Ml3Bd&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241119_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4532%2E35263%2EHt_q1m)
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

clean_body: | I’m eager to roll up my sleeves, and get back to work in the Senate. Peter — My opponent has finally conceded, and I’m eager to put this race behind us, roll up my sleeves, and get back to work in the Senate. >From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you to the people of Wisconsin for putting their trust in me to continue to be their fighter in Washington, and thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign from afar. The way we won this race is the way I have always approached the job: we did everything — everywhere — all at once. Our campaign traveled all over our great state and really listened to people — and I worked day in and out to deliver progress on the issues that matter most to people across our state. And in turn, Wisconsinites showed up for me. Folks like the farmers and the dairy industry who I’ve fought alongside, earning the endorsement of the Wisconsin Farm Bureau. The workers on foundry floors who are getting more business because of my Made in America laws. The LGBTQ+ families who saw through the nasty attacks ads and knew that I had their back to live their authentic lives free from hate and discrimination. And the women who had their rights stripped away and saw me on the frontlines fighting for their freedoms. While I am overjoyed at our victory, I know the results of the presidential race weren’t what we hoped for. While we worked our hearts out to elect Kamala Harris, I recognize that the people of Wisconsin chose President Trump. Nevertheless, our work is not over yet, and we cannot give up. I will always fight for Wisconsin. That means working with President Trump to deliver for our state, and standing up to him when he does not have our best interests at heart. Because the heart of why I got into public service is to get things done, and make life better for the people I represent. We all deserve a country with less vitriol, less division, less hatred, and more truth. Because it’s time we come together and tackle the problems that are actually facing working people and communities across our state. It’s time we put the politics of division behind us. It’s time we lower costs for working families, deliver more affordable health care, continue our fight for a Made in Wisconsin economy, and redouble our effort to pass my Women’s Health Protection Act so every woman has the same rights and freedoms regardless of their state, county, or zip code. And it’s time we follow our state motto and continue our march: Forward. But I can’t do this work alone, so I want to end by thanking everyone who made this victory possible: My talented campaign team who worked their hearts out, all in an effort to reach as many voters as we could. Each individual who volunteered for this campaign. Our state has the most dedicated volunteers anywhere in the country. We could not have done this without the tens of thousands of Wisconsinites who knocked on doors and made phone calls to win this race. Supporters like you who stood by my side every step of the way — kept up with our campaign updates, made sure your family and friends had a plan to vote, and chipped in your hard-earned dollars when you could. I couldn’t have done this without you, Peter. And to the people of Wisconsin: thank you for putting your trust in me as your United States Senator. Let’s get to work! Forward, Tammy | | P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701 | mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: Thanksgiving Meals @ USO
subject: Did you see this urgent message about our Thanksgiving 2X-MATCH offer?
body:
Don't miss this 2X-MATCH from the NFL ahead of Thanksgiving.
USO Supporter,
With Thanksgiving just over a week away, we wanted to make sure you saw this:
It's up to us to help our service members celebrate Thanksgiving in any way we can -- and that begins with providing them with a warm holiday meal.
But right now, we're falling behind our goal to fund programs for service members at military bases and USO Centers around the world, including at least 2,500 Thanksgiving meals.**Our generous match offer from the NFL is still active** ,* so your gift will be DOUBLED to provide programs for service members year-round, including Thanksgiving meals.**
[$37.50 CAN HELP FUND
A WARM MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)

USO Supporter,
Next week, Americans will celebrate Thanksgiving with family, friends, food and fun. However you celebrate, we sincerely hope you enjoy this time with your family and loved ones.
But for service members deployed far from home, it'll just be another Thursday. Another day in a lonely barracks, thousands of miles away from their loved ones. Another day of the same old mess hall food. Another day of hoping they'll be able to find a secure internet connection to call home before their kids go to bed. **It 's up to us to brighten this day for them.**
The USO is determined to uplift our service members on this important day. That's why we've set a goal to fund 2,500 Thanksgiving meals at military bases and USO Centers around the world.
**And we 're so glad to share that the NFL is _matching_ all gifts, [but we're counting on YOU to help us reach this ambitious goal by Thursday at midnight.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/a9zxSPy~bpJG/cHIxbThGTzhiVWx2KzRmcWJoQmlpZVhJdVJGN240dzVqTjJuc2RrbHdqNHVpZm5MVGsxQk9CT2tFQ1dCVVljUWszcUhodmt6UUJKTGpJbDJ5R3d4REdoZU51OVR0bGV1dEdTaVJzUUFINHc9S0/OXpnNGRqMzYzWXc4d1FiM1VBT1dpcEw4VlIzQlZEYzdhM1VjaDI1OWNaeXgza2lyYnhvek8xenZQbW9BREZRMmxaMEhmai9UcklBRC9RVTB4UDBWcjFua0VxeGFaaHhyS0)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP PROVIDE
ONE THANKSGIVING MEAL**](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP PROVIDE
TWO THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/dp4vCPw7~WJe/cHIxbThGTzhiVWx2KzRmcWJoQmlpZVhJdVJGN240dzVqTjJuc2RrbHdqNHVpZm5MVGsxQk9CT2tFQ1dCVVljUWszcUhodmt6UUJKTGpJbDJ5R3d4REdoZU51OVR0bGV1dEdTaVJzUUFINHc9S0/OXpnNGRqMzYzWXc4d1FiM1VBT1dpcEw4VlIzQlZEYzdhM1VjaDI1OWNaeXgza2lyYnhvek8xenZQbW9BREZRMmxaMEhmai9UcklBRC9RVTB4UDBWcjFua0VxeGFaaHhyS0)
---
[$150 CAN HELP PROVIDE
FOUR THANKSGIVING MEALS**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/k3vwHbYDyXC~/cHIxbThGTzhiVWx2KzRmcWJoQmlpZVhJdVJGN240dzVqTjJuc2RrbHdqNHVpZm5MVGsxQk9CT2tFQ1dCVVljUWszcUhodmt6UUJKTGpJbDJ5R3d4REdoZU51OVR0bGV1dEdTaVJzUUFINHc9S0/OXpnNGRqMzYzWXc4d1FiM1VBT1dpcEw4VlIzQlZEYzdhM1VjaDI1OWNaeXgza2lyYnhvek8xenZQbW9BREZRMmxaMEhmai9UcklBRC9RVTB4UDBWcjFua0VxeGFaaHhyS0)
---
[GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-EDVkMA/cHIxbThGTzhiVWx2KzRmcWJoQmlpZVhJdVJGN240dzVqTjJuc2RrbHdqNHVpZm5MVGsxQk9CT2tFQ1dCVVljUWszcUhodmt6UUJKTGpJbDJ5R3d4REdoZU51OVR0bGV1dEdTaVJzUUFINHc9S0/OXpnNGRqMzYzWXc4d1FiM1VBT1dpcEw4VlIzQlZEYzdhM1VjaDI1OWNaeXgza2lyYnhvek8xenZQbW9BREZRMmxaMEhmai9UcklBRC9RVTB4UDBWcjFua0VxeGFaaHhyS0)
---
Spending Thanksgiving far away from their loved ones is just one of many, many sacrifices our military members make throughout the year in service of our country while asking nothing of us in return. **We may not be able to bring them home or fully understand the challenges they go through -- but we can make sure they enjoy a warm, festive Thanksgiving meal.**
**[Please, will you rush $37.50 or more right now to DOUBLE the value of your gift to support our heroes this Thanksgiving and year-round? There couldn't be a better time to donate this holiday season.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC0jGzAfE/cHIxbThGTzhiVWx2KzRmcWJoQmlpZVhJdVJGN240dzVqTjJuc2RrbHdqNHVpZm5MVGsxQk9CT2tFQ1dCVVljUWszcUhodmt6UUJKTGpJbDJ5R3d4REdoZU51OVR0bGV1dEdTaVJzUUFINHc9S0/OXpnNGRqMzYzWXc4d1FiM1VBT1dpcEw4VlIzQlZEYzdhM1VjaDI1OWNaeXgza2lyYnhvek8xenZQbW9BREZRMmxaMEhmai9UcklBRC9RVTB4UDBWcjFua0VxeGFaaHhyS0)

Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform when it matters most.
The USO
*The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 15, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.
