name: Care in Action
subject: Building care— from the ground up
body:
We’re not backing down from this fight.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347913/513122777/664783965?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
It’s been a long month, and we’re sure you’re looking forward to a holiday break as well.
It often feels like the only time we can make a difference for our communities and the causes we care about is during major elections. But the reality is that _**the years between election cycles are just as important.**_ We’re prepared to continue fighting for a care economy where families and workers thrive.
Local advocacy, in our towns, cities, and states, is also how we **build movement power and organize together to accomplish our goals.**
Earlier this month, local initiatives to support care infrastructure won in [**_Washington State_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347916/513122798/376694553?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787), [**_Sonoma County, California_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347917/513122799/5438973?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787), [**_Travis County, Texas_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347918/513122800/-1503942354?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787), and [**_Missouri!_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347919/513122801/-1020694474?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)
We all know that building support for a healthy care economy with policies to match is an everyday task — just like care work is work that happens around the clock. But, Peter, the more volunteers and members we have, the faster we’ll be able to accomplish our goals.
**[**_Will you sign up to continue the fight for a care agenda that works for caregivers and families, and invite your friends and family to join us?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347920/513122802/2085007565?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)**
**********__[Continue the fight for the care agenda](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97347921/513122803/2085007565?ms=111924_localadvocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUyN2ViMi1jM2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qciUsvSiVPIhw-DTADfGxPLtUvpxfvJ_J_HdNRPhRko=&emci=f60f9611-8ba6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6be27eb2-c3a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)__**********
At Care in Action, we’re a community of care workers, caregivers, and advocates committed to fighting for the care agenda. **Join us as we organize year-round to enact the change we’d like to see in the world.**
In support and solidarity,
Care in Action

clean_body: We’re not backing down from this fight. Hi Peter, It’s been a long month, and we’re sure you’re looking forward to a holiday break as well. It often feels like the only time we can make a difference for our communities and the causes we care about is during major elections. But the reality is that the years between election cycles are just as important. We’re prepared to continue fighting for a care economy where families and workers thrive. Local advocacy, in our towns, cities, and states, is also how we build movement power and organize together to accomplish our goals. Earlier this month, local initiatives to support care infrastructure won in , , , and We all know that building support for a healthy care economy with policies to match is an everyday task — just like care work is work that happens around the clock. But, Peter, the more volunteers and members we have, the faster we’ll be able to accomplish our goals. ************** At Care in Action, we’re a community of care workers, caregivers, and advocates committed to fighting for the care agenda. Join us as we organize year-round to enact the change we’d like to see in the world.** In support and solidarity, Care in Action

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: How our democracy works

body:
Pennsylvania is on the frontlines of the fight for voting rights.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4876%2E552475%2E-pB4V4)
Pennsylvania’s Senate race is **not over.** We need your help to re-elect Bob Casey. **[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-4?refcode=em20241119-4&refcode2=4876_552475_-pB4V4&akid=4876%2E552475%2E-pB4V4)**

If we’re going to protect our fundamental freedoms, we must re-elect Bob Casey. Bob has always stood up for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights — and he’s not going to stop now.
Our democracy only works when every voice is heard. We need the resources to fight back against efforts to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
**[So please, donate whatever you can to Bob Casey’s campaign today so we can keep up the fight to protect voting rights and our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241119-4?refcode=em20241119-4&refcode2=4876_552475_-pB4V4&akid=4876%2E552475%2E-pB4V4)**

| Peter,

Two weeks ago, Marylanders across MD-06 elected me to represent them in Congress.

It was undoubtedly a tough election cycle, but I’m proud of the work we did to turn out voters and win a historically red district. As I transition into my role as your representative and prepare to navigate the tough challenges ahead, it’s clear we have a long road ahead to make progress on the issues that matter most.

body:
We want you at the forefront of our strategy. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348111/513123358/1783039852?sourceid=1055444&refcode=WTENEW51_20241119_DemStrategy_PL_MO_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ1ZWYzNC1jNGE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd2IhYL3DgRn17NC6MXuR2e_GfZHF3yaNFUBbizxdX0=&emci=e3381c2e-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=1fd5ef34-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=5177934) **Peter, in the wake of the 2024 election, we want to hear from you.** [**What do you want to see from the Democratic Party going forward?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348112/513123359/1783039852?sourceid=1055444&refcode=WTENEW51_20241119_DemStrategy_PL_MO_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ1ZWYzNC1jNGE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd2IhYL3DgRn17NC6MXuR2e_GfZHF3yaNFUBbizxdX0=&emci=e3381c2e-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=1fd5ef34-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=5177934) | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348113/513123360/1783039852?sourceid=1055444&refcode=WTENEW51_20241119_DemStrategy_PL_MO_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ1ZWYzNC1jNGE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd2IhYL3DgRn17NC6MXuR2e_GfZHF3yaNFUBbizxdX0=&emci=e3381c2e-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=1fd5ef34-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=5177934)
---

Peter,

No matter how long you've been a supporter of EMILYs List, you've helped change the face of American politics for the better.

And now, as a vital member of our pro-choice community, we'd like to hear from you directly as we chart our path forward.

[**Please, Peter, will you fill out our quick survey and let us know: How do you want to see the Democratic Party evolve from here?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348114/513123361/1783039852?sourceid=1055444&refcode=WTENEW51_20241119_DemStrategy_PL_MO_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmQ1ZWYzNC1jNGE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd2IhYL3DgRn17NC6MXuR2e_GfZHF3yaNFUBbizxdX0=&emci=e3381c2e-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=1fd5ef34-c4a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=5177934)

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c85bf74ecce4c8abf539f8abd256700&_e=ihIEof3mjSZpY1IguQ6sktB1GkRS0Zkr9I0GGXozrGcm8TLAAwK06yCUJ73eBe0VrUO_OYnJeTfRHE-a2fmNKRKFW-VDHWzOJd_2y3L0x_lXr0Xe3J9ETV12S3dwR_AsDPhx5YYPZAO8ZfjQYKEbh8P2HyKPDijNnIbNSix2i4nti_0lM0WNd9rt_fGT5xDBZiGOQVuhnV3XizLX_lMdIX5-UomsMV5CHaLBEEvZq6VoH86S_GkKDOaJQ8D-PxDYOjSCOWIaQU1vPwnpbW7IqKbPnC2bzXf0kMJlAjYopmGvry54unWWWgkwLvl8LvEeHlhThjhWmErFPYG_AutHQmz2tlzwU1XKCWbUdb2hQPE_uSNgttUp1ReG-gjK3TtB)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c85bf74ecce4c8abf539f8abd256700&_e=ihIEof3mjSZpY1IguQ6sktB1GkRS0Zkr9I0GGXozrGcm8TLAAwK06yCUJ73eBe0VrUO_OYnJeTfRHE-a2fmNKRKFW-VDHWzOJd_2y3L0x_lXr0Xe3J9ETV12S3dwR_AsDPhx5YYPZAO8ZfjQYKEbh8P2HyKPDijNnIbNSix2i4nti_0lM0WNd9rt_fGT5xDBZiGOQVuhnV3XizLX_lMdIX5-UomsMV5CHaLBEEvZq6WXEn5krHxXCN_NBgpDvET1jAWXncAY_3xnQ4JS73oB5-Iat6XzUe0doi9G-gna5pMfqQUqJGUvtb94oceeXxq-H4HE7x2kPQTwuG_VLJ2_Lk5nguZr07ie6aQ1NU03NO-YDaqtbjwJYbn0Lf9aidRZ)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c85bf74ecce4c8abf539f8abd256700&_e=ihIEof3mjSZpY1IguQ6sktB1GkRS0Zkr9I0GGXozrGcm8TLAAwK06yCUJ73eBe0VrUO_OYnJeTfRHE-a2fmNKRKFW-VDHWzOJd_2y3L0x_lXr0Xe3J9ETV12S3dwR_AsDPhx5YYPZAO8ZfjQYKEbh8P2HyKPDijNnIbNSix2i4nti_0lM0WNd9rt_fGT5xDBZiGOQVuhnV3XizLX_lMdIX5-UomsMV5CHaLBEEvZq6W8ZjKrKm7Vg9lPiGzlbk1iBBa9sJyxxbYfgG697vAjMoLhrdUfuirI5YSfys6MwStAZSAbuiBnycdwz-F0xDW9fi8AQhXUc_V8uyOxesqMdJu25526pEhCTMZGdJvsKQ7HHLuJg1pWUFF9HPguPfa_)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

clean_body: You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. #
Peter —
142\.
That’s the number of VoteVets endorsed candidates that won races across the country this year. When Veterans run, Veterans win. And YOU make it happen.
We’ve gone through our victories at the federal level already — Andy Kim, Elissa Slotkin, and Ruben Gallego are going to the Senate and many strong candidates that VoteVets backed will take the fight to the MAGA Right in the House.
But we had victories everywhere.
36 city or county council candidates backed by VoteVets won — like Jonathan Duncan in Kansas City and Shané Darby in Wilmington, Delaware.
We notched judicial wins like Daniel McCaffrey going to Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court, Colleen Osborne to Pennsylvania’s Municipal Court, and Pavan Parikh as Hamilton County Clerk of the Court in Ohio.
Dante Pittman won his election to the North Carolina House and broke the GOP’s Super Majority.
Even today, there are still races that are too close to call. In California we’ve got Derek Tran running against Michelle Steel for CA-45 in Congress, and Derek leads by about 100 votes.
Every seat counts. Every victory counts. This matters, and your support is pivotal. When you get involved with an organization we’re sure there are a few things you consider before signing on or chipping in.
You want to know if your support is going to make a difference.
With VoteVets, you never have to worry about that. Even in a tough year, VoteVets won across the map. And as we look ahead, make no mistake...
**We’re going to fight like hell against Trump and the MAGA Right.**
If you’re still with us, please:

subject: Do you think kids should hear THIS in schools?
body:
The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.”

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=5f83a506232e41d3898078131772d1cf&_t=BIucP2uBdAx91AOZUoXE4d0y1dmhCuJXlREq4rLDdFd_YDM3KmEVMeqDQNarN6pI9u9e4CfszuB2X2B-6xdck2dd1BmbDuzdodYFGZZ3f72UTNOLeH_M2s3E91O6n0sJ)_

[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5f83a506232e41d3898078131772d1cf&_e=zd-c4aa7xXvdfZL_AFapDi2sKHv7IBPKOuP153erITHjk8T9qtovyx4KoSnN7L66-FNzfIpeSjPzNzWLO7MuiDx_9X4nvd7EoHqhL766WXk4KgLU8ZEhvSs7wKZ2Yn7BPHCEBbk2r2Zsa-e-dOd4LTVpAp-ODlFg2fx-4Arpfw2D6qSkmDqztxDlPadQnm6SXrW_td5Se5D-Bt6yLfFwGDyH4ImmbFd55Q0LZ-WxwZnaJeOZwdcToeuOjsiyncuUBc2T3uRytWdsO2l5T9tJM19NaZawRjS15O3Zb3Kiot7u_ejLsxvMcjS2vpSgWdjZ8sqEGHpwubbgMzhjK5awlKqwUng0x7TIeWknfr2K248%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5f83a506232e41d3898078131772d1cf&_e=zd-c4aa7xXvdfZL_AFapDi2sKHv7IBPKOuP153erITHjk8T9qtovyx4KoSnN7L66-FNzfIpeSjPzNzWLO7MuiDx_9X4nvd7EoHqhL766WXk4KgLU8ZEhvSs7wKZ2Yn7BPHCEBbk2r2Zsa-e-dOd4LTVpAp-ODlFg2fx-4Arpfw2D6qSkmDqztxDlPadQnm6SXrW_td5Se5D-Bt6yLfFwGJwH2hy8CQDqQy5IMmMcXfpcC8RJfIWFP3Ezs7VgSou6VIZi_ARfN2vekor6_r6jLGhVAsyS_4E6LUJMSBXxKOdGyPh32Mc_QEYuGc78RqdDOKPKukMLg2rPPcbxIZuslZFkCrUJ1hGVHKS04ff7eAI%3D)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5f83a506232e41d3898078131772d1cf&_e=zd-c4aa7xXvdfZL_AFapDi2sKHv7IBPKOuP153erITHjk8T9qtovyx4KoSnN7L66-FNzfIpeSjPzNzWLO7MuiDx_9X4nvd7EoHqhL766WXk4KgLU8ZEhvSs7wKZ2Yn7BPHCEBbk2r2Zsa-e-dOd4LTVpAp-ODlFg2fx-4Arpfw2D6qSkmDqztxDlPadQnm6SXrW_td5Se5D-Bt6yLfFwGAD0g_ePFe7CpWRidGbb3BVkuDQx20LI5FDg6Q8MySNkWn0TBCUzhQIPmi7hLMmdCX6oU3VuJGOJGEUHP8BAuCqpkbC3fYN3p9lWjCsM277ELvM5cPRwIew9mILKkVCkUDpSTJwgXza13QIGXVuLj40%3D)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5f83a506232e41d3898078131772d1cf&_e=zd-c4aa7xXvdfZL_AFapDi2sKHv7IBPKOuP153erITHjk8T9qtovyx4KoSnN7L66-FNzfIpeSjPzNzWLO7MuiDx_9X4nvd7EoHqhL766WXk4KgLU8ZEhvSs7wKZ2Yn7BPHCEBbk2r2Zsa-e-dOd4LTVpAp-ODlFg2fx-4Arpfw2D6qSkmDqztxDlPadQnm6SXrW_td5Se5D-Bt6yLfFwGPt_TnHSfLDsBUMgtotXvSdxaY1U10pByZyaKxTvOZYNCbxTHAKxUF7ToCQ51qeeDd0ALWi6yRK5UgT0esFXarX5VNeAjDaaLtWLLi8WXEdV7t6oyhVLr53aMaQVq5QDfTLjzy3UHe6JU1FSVK7FStQ%3D)

name: History Facts
subject: Once-popular baby names you never see anymore
body:
Old-fashioned names such as Harriet and Amos may make us think of our grandparents and a bygone era, but there is always a chance they’ll make a trendy comeback alongside more contemporary names such as Onyx, Anakin, and Nova. clean_body: Old-fashioned names such as Harriet and Amos may make us think of our grandparents and a bygone era, but there is always a chance they’ll make a trendy comeback alongside more contemporary names such as Onyx, Anakin, and Nova. | Old-fashioned names such as Harriet and Amos may make us think of our grandparents and a bygone era, but there is always a chance they’ll make a trendy comeback alongside more contemporary names such as Onyx, Anakin, and Nova. name: JanePAC
subject: The fight against Trump's pro-polluter agenda starts now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Here’s the plan.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348535/513124861/1328794144?refcode=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YjI1NzhkLWM2YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jBGMgSCrSrzL13OoxfJcj2sc4h8dZhnoGFWzcpPDO7g=&emci=96a6a4db-afa6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
Remember earlier this year when Donald Trump shamelessly solicited a $1 billion campaign bribe from oil executives? He promised to reverse progress on clean energy, roll back environmental regulations, and hand over more offshore drilling leases — all starting on _Day One_ of his presidency. Well, he’s _already_ delivering on that dirty deal, and he’s about two months ahead of his schedule. Last week, Trump announced two little-talked-about but catastrophic picks for his new administration: **❌ Lee Zeldin to lead the EPA, a former congressman with one of the worst environmental records imaginable.** **❌ Chris Wright to head the Department of Energy,_a fossil fuel CEO_ who denies the climate crisis and directly profits from oil and gas extraction.** With these appointments, Trump is signaling a full-scale assault on every inch of progress we’ve made on clean energy, electric vehicles, climate resilience, and so much more. **Big Oil is working in lockstep to dismantle climate progress for profit. They’re united, and we have to be united, too.** Across the country, the JanePAC candidates who won their elections are already in critical positions to fight back — from state legislatures to city councils to school boards. They’re protecting clean energy projects, safeguarding water systems, and enforcing pollution limits. **[But we can’t stop now. We’re committed to electing even more climate champions in 2025 and beyond to build a movement capable of taking on Trump’s dirty agenda and winning. Will you chip in — even just $5 today — to power JanePAC and maintain strong climate protections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348536/513124862/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YjI1NzhkLWM2YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jBGMgSCrSrzL13OoxfJcj2sc4h8dZhnoGFWzcpPDO7g=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348537/513124863/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YjI1NzhkLWM2YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jBGMgSCrSrzL13OoxfJcj2sc4h8dZhnoGFWzcpPDO7g=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97348538/513124864/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.48b2578d-c6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YjI1NzhkLWM2YTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jBGMgSCrSrzL13OoxfJcj2sc4h8dZhnoGFWzcpPDO7g=)

clean_body: Here’s the plan. | Remember earlier this year when Donald Trump shamelessly solicited a $1 billion campaign bribe from oil executives? He promised to reverse progress on clean energy, roll back environmental regulations, and hand over more offshore drilling leases — all starting on Day One of his presidency. Well, he’s already delivering on that dirty deal, and he’s about two months ahead of his schedule. Last week, Trump announced two little-talked-about but catastrophic picks for his new administration: ❌ Lee Zeldin to lead the EPA, a former congressman with one of the worst environmental records imaginable. ❌ Chris Wright to head the Department of Energy,a fossil fuel CEO who denies the climate crisis and directly profits from oil and gas extraction. With these appointments, Trump is signaling a full-scale assault on every inch of progress we’ve made on clean energy, electric vehicles, climate resilience, and so much more. Big Oil is working in lockstep to dismantle climate progress for profit. They’re united, and we have to be united, too. Across the country, the JanePAC candidates who won their elections are already in critical positions to fight back — from state legislatures to city councils to school boards. They’re protecting clean energy projects, safeguarding water systems, and enforcing pollution limits. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. Hello,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to support the _No Kings Act_ to revoke Trump’s immunity.

But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed. We’re still [17] local signatures short of our goal!

We can’t abandon the fight to revoke Trump’s immunity. [**Click HERE or use the button below to sign »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/revoke_pres_immunity/?source=FFR_20241119_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22551%2E4449941%2EMRaTaE) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/revoke_pres_immunity/?source=FFR_20241119_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22551%2E4449941%2EMRaTaE)
---
We’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: signature pending [FFR]
Subject: re: the historic _No Kings Act_
To: TOP DEMOCRATS
**WE KNOW:** The corrupt Supreme Court essentially turned presidents into KINGS by giving them immunity for their acts in office.

**AND WE KNOW:** Trump has already been accused of inciting an insurrection, mishandling classified documents and paying hush money – **_what will he do with immunity?!_**

**SO WE KNOW:** We have to fight back against this horrific ruling – _and Chuck Schumer did just that by introducing the _No Kings Act_!_
[**We need a MASSIVE wave of public support for this crucial legislation, team! Add your name to support Chuck Schumer’s effort to revoke Trump’s immunity »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/revoke_pres_immunity/?source=FFR_20241119_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22551%2E4449941%2EMRaTaE)
[ 25,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: ADD YOUR NAME TO SUPPORT THE _NO KINGS ACT_ »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/revoke_pres_immunity/?source=FFR_20241119_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22551%2E4449941%2EMRaTaE)
---
Together, we can hold Trump accountable!

_– Fight for Reform_

name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily’s Notes: First day of school edition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Getting to know my amazing new colleagues, walking past the U.S. Capitol, and spending time in places like the Library of Congress have reminded me how important this work is and how much we have to fight for.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97348602/513125102/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWUwMzRhYS1jN2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbFATr2yCD3PFM1hzoKel8_r4YtDCk9Xv3m-aMe4e04=&emci=ae5217b5-5ba4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cae034aa-c7a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I’m writing you a quick note from D.C. — it’s new member orientation for Congressmembers-elect! Like you, I’m still heartbroken by the national election results. Like you, I’m extremely concerned by many of the initial announcements from the incoming Trump administration and what it means for healthcare, human rights, and keeping our neighbors safe. Getting to know my amazing new colleagues, walking past the U.S. Capitol, and spending time in places like the Library of Congress have reminded me how vital this work is and how much we have to fight for. A few items: • It feels a lot like the first day of school — [_**I shared some thoughts on TikTok**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97348603/513125103/-1553486745?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWUwMzRhYS1jN2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbFATr2yCD3PFM1hzoKel8_r4YtDCk9Xv3m-aMe4e04=&emci=ae5217b5-5ba4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cae034aa-c7a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=23483442) as I got ready for one of our marathon orientation days. • I’m especially proud to share [_**this photo with Congresswomen-elect Sarah McBride (D-DE) and Julie Johnson (D-TX)**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97348604/513125104/-717578165?img_index=1&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWUwMzRhYS1jN2E2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbFATr2yCD3PFM1hzoKel8_r4YtDCk9Xv3m-aMe4e04=&emci=ae5217b5-5ba4-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cae034aa-c7a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=23483442). All of us just made history. Sarah is the first trans woman elected to Congress, and Julie is the first LGBTQ+ member of Congress elected from the South. I loved meeting them and can’t wait to get to work to defend ALL of our rights from the Trump administration. clean_body: Getting to know my amazing new colleagues, walking past the U.S. Capitol, and spending time in places like the Library of Congress have reminded me how important this work is and how much we have to fight for. | Peter, I’m writing you a quick note from D.C. — it’s new member orientation for Congressmembers-elect! Like you, I’m still heartbroken by the national election results. Like you, I’m extremely concerned by many of the initial announcements from the incoming Trump administration and what it means for healthcare, human rights, and keeping our neighbors safe. Getting to know my amazing new colleagues, walking past the U.S. Capitol, and spending time in places like the Library of Congress have reminded me how vital this work is and how much we have to fight for. A few items: • It feels a lot like the first day of school — as I got ready for one of our marathon orientation days. • I’m especially proud to share . All of us just made history. Sarah is the first trans woman elected to Congress, and Julie is the first LGBTQ+ member of Congress elected from the South. I loved meeting them and can’t wait to get to work to defend ALL of our rights from the Trump administration. • I also attended orientation for the , a group of pragmatic Democrats focused on working across party and ideological lines to deliver results for our constituents. I’m one of 23 new members of the caucus. • The election isn’t over! In a handful of House races, especially in California, they are either still counting votes or expecting a recount. I’ll continue to pass on information about how to or = to support those efforts. Even if Republicans retain control of the House, how narrow their majority is will impact what they can pass without defections. Thank you for your continued engagement and support. Please follow me on , , and for more updates. — ER = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Short survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
As the second Trump administration takes shape and we start to look toward the new year, we want to hear from you.
#
Derek,
Team Fetterman here — despite some tough losses earlier this month, we wanted to reach out to say THANK you for being part of this team and having John’s back. 💪💪💪
As the second Trump administration takes shape and we start to look toward the new year, we want to hear from you.
**What issues do you want to see Congress prioritize in the new year? And what do you think Democrats should do to win back working folks?**
[**Please take just two minutes (or less) to share your thoughts on what you think our priorities should be. Our team will review each + every response.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20241119?source=em20241119-9609&akid=9609%2E434096%2ExP4qpq)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20241119?source=em20241119-9609&akid=9609%2E434096%2ExP4qpq)**
John has never shied away from the toughest and most urgent issues facing PA, and he’ll work with anyone in the U.S. Senate to make life better for working folks + families.
With Donald Trump set to enter the White House again, the next four years will be unpredictable to say the least. That’s why we wanted to pause for a sec to get your thoughts on what our priorities should be.
John’s work has always been about the people, so [**can you share your thoughts via our post-election survey now? We really want to know what your priorities are and what you think Dems need to do to win back working people.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20241119?source=em20241119-9609&akid=9609%2E434096%2ExP4qpq)
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Your continued support means so much. 🙏
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241119-9609-footer&t=1&refcode2=9609_434096_xP4qpq&akid=9609%2E434096%2ExP4qpq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9609%2E434096%2ExP4qpq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9609%2E434096%2ExP4qpq)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Team, Our state is in a crucial period of transformation. We need your support to recruit and retain passionate staff and volunteers, to arm them with the skills needed in this battleground state. This is how we prepare to fight back against Donald Trump’s agenda and GOP extremism. **But here’s what’s at stake:** Project 2025 threatens everything we've fought for. We have state leaders here in Arizona ready for the fight to protect our constitutional rights and fundamental freedoms, but we have to continue winning seats and building our blue coalition. That means building long-standing relationships with marginalized communities that are often overlooked and under-invested in. This means supporting our constituency groups that are best positioned to really reach Black, Indigenous, Latino, and low-income Arizonans. This coalition is our strongest line of defense against extreme right-wing policies. **[Your donation today is what will make this vision a reality. name: Truth to Power
subject: We deeply appreciate your insights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39311%2E3422442%2ERoJeSo)
Derek,
Katie isn’t a typical elected official. She does the job differently, including her focus on creating opportunities to hear directly from the American people.
The moment we’re in right now feels uncertain. We know that many people are still trying to process the election results and have questions about what happens next.
Katie and our whole team want to gauge how our supporters are feeling, so we put together a simple and quick three question survey. It shouldn’t take more than 60 seconds to complete!
**We’re hoping that 10% of folks who receive this email will complete our survey,** so we have a good number of responses to reflect on.
**[Will you be one of the folks we need to take our 3 question survey? We’ll read responses and share the results with Katie.](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20241119/?source=em20241119-39311&akid=39311%2E3422442%2ERoJeSo)**
We deeply appreciate any time you can spare to inform our path forward.
Thank you,
Truth to Power

name: Tony Johnson
subject: The state of America’s military
body:
Right now, America’s biggest adversaries are working to surpass our nation’s military capabilities.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b870cd57bbc14ed99e991a828ccfdb7a&_t=5twl5acgYJgd-DKorh4S7KfEBUn9xsFZ0AQdGggSCpj7ngChu6QeblzkO2sRkJY_O6HDEKwFNJYBQRzuIK6NdZ3gdh7-_XMG2n9b7Nc11Ee9xJgQhXgF9CASSxwlcnDm)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b870cd57bbc14ed99e991a828ccfdb7a&_e=xZMQNGO2jv8uTGZt1z38l0wD3bAcN2eLTdIkKN4bZghiEr7Hr-bsDn4cReDsrsJ-Qfvyz8yhD2NDndxH16aHWJSLjAmkLM36svJpbucK1NUUBixJbNX4nnA3JZNAP14vhX98G5mqe84rJ1aFh5K_PkP_dtGElkZjGPweeqc7Q0SkGP-N2TBmHwLWuO1zxVkajMZv2vkpq-xg1S9L7XsIxYzqWnG4l9roWAN2d6AksJkLqUMlSpvDndgrI_qLP7hiDBP1TxttNYoqrgjP6ETGloECQLGrXkPzsnFYeUKpVTWTOLXOLbt_tNjuBvxybWs23u4t6Eoem6bxwGbGXBl9ONLqJM0cPQpdf_MfKrZuehgOEz6UApacGojTZ6qQNJ6n)

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b870cd57bbc14ed99e991a828ccfdb7a&_e=xZMQNGO2jv8uTGZt1z38l0wD3bAcN2eLTdIkKN4bZghiEr7Hr-bsDn4cReDsrsJ-Qfvyz8yhD2NDndxH16aHWJSLjAmkLM36svJpbucK1NUUBixJbNX4nnA3JZNAP14vhX98G5mqe84rJ1aFh5K_PkP_dtGElkZjGPweeqc7Q0SkGP-N2TBmHwLWuO1zxVkajMZv2vkpq-xg1S9L7XsIxYG_xhd1hnPQ4Xh1Nhk-wDlw_w5XnkamiWQF1PSAqS3MdOuZyh69Q07GA5nmezfLPAqsCXhxkUb3Uxa7xx7-x3-BM8m9PiDNuw1IFJGNLn8ShovVKDnxdIrf-EGriwMioItwif1G8HZumXfGKiA_e8E07trxGJ1bKGKxkhO8HdJB) Fellow Conservative,

Right now, America's biggest adversaries are working to surpass our nation's military capabilities. And critical problems exist in many areas of the world:
* Countries like Iran act deceitfully and use their military to bully other countries.

* Rogue states like North Korea and Syria pose direct threats to their regions and America's security.

* And the leaders of countries like China and Russia have proven they will do whatever they can to increase government control and state surveillance of their citizens.

On top of all this, our country's military equipment--including planes, tanks, and ships--is decades-old and years past its useful service.

With information like this, you would think our elected leaders would push to ensure a strong future for our nation's military. But some of them are actually looking to reduce America's defense spending. Apparently, they would rather prioritize issues like climate change.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

I'm told that you are a conservative who wants to ensure that our country remains a beacon of hope, opportunity, and liberty for all the world. And I understand that you are just as concerned as I am about the future of America's defense.

[So, today, I want to make sure you get a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's _2024 Index of U.S. Military Strength_.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b870cd57bbc14ed99e991a828ccfdb7a&_e=xZMQNGO2jv8uTGZt1z38l0wD3bAcN2eLTdIkKN4bZghiEr7Hr-bsDn4cReDsrsJ-Qfvyz8yhD2NDndxH16aHWJSLjAmkLM36svJpbucK1NUUBixJbNX4nnA3JZNAP14vhX98G5mqe84rJ1aFh5K_PkP_dtGElkZjGPweeqc7Q0SkGP-N2TBmHwLWuO1zxVkajMZv2vkpq-xg1S9L7XsIxU0DKFj85tHtCzt59T1MyLJSNBakYOLei--iyACXHogLcj8wId7cueUzTEJBEpHzo3JEQMjIkNMSVmp27p5Mue1Zl96dOTYpKSiDiA3uDiKJmM8ty0jDNU2cctrR4_DkLVOtSqLBrKchPAIO-StRedke90RJ1u_dDlLQ-zKQpf9V)

We publish this report to help decision-makers in government see how conditions have evolved in the past year and where American strengths, challenges, and opportunities for improvement lie.

But we also make this important resource available to the general public, so that you are aware of how well--or poorly--the government is handling this sacred task.

In addition to all of this, you can use this Index to explore topics like:
* Understanding risk in the great competition with the Chinese Communist Party.

* What we risk if we fail to fully modernize the U.S. nuclear deterrent.

* How prioritizing climate change and DEI training weakens America's military.

**You can get instant access to your FREE guide right now using this secure link:** [https://secured.heritage.org/us-military-strength-ebook/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b870cd57bbc14ed99e991a828ccfdb7a&_e=xZMQNGO2jv8uTGZt1z38l0wD3bAcN2eLTdIkKN4bZghiEr7Hr-bsDn4cReDsrsJ-Qfvyz8yhD2NDndxH16aHWJSLjAmkLM36svJpbucK1NUUBixJbNX4nnA3JZNAP14vhX98G5mqe84rJ1aFh5K_PkP_dtGElkZjGPweeqc7Q0SkGP-N2TBmHwLWuO1zxVkajMZv2vkpq-xg1S9L7XsIxeuUDI4YIN0Z6dwwAPlMO2N2CKEyKPzZM-mzjsLaSUqD76K9KAsniYlojoCxFoyg9ktXBN5xdkPcGp2RSF-z9L9ue6zE3pBlf3ck75GjN17MKZFolXbfURJfJY1vWUIrkuxGA2hMVGZRZ_IRYOdxoSEqZUqnDxnIK2bBWAGpfKKN).

There's some eye-opening information in here, so I really hope you'll get your copy today. And you can share it with anyone you think would benefit from it.

**[Use this link to get your _2024 Index of U.S Military Strength_ today! >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b870cd57bbc14ed99e991a828ccfdb7a&_e=xZMQNGO2jv8uTGZt1z38l0wD3bAcN2eLTdIkKN4bZghiEr7Hr-bsDn4cReDsrsJ-Qfvyz8yhD2NDndxH16aHWJSLjAmkLM36svJpbucK1NUUBixJbNX4nnA3JZNAP14vhX98G5mqe84rJ1aFh5K_PkP_dtGElkZjGPweeqc7Q0SkGP-N2TBmHwLWuO1zxVkajMZv2vkpq-xg1S9L7XsIxSbaYLgNfRtqV-i8L48ZzPVje6Y14hL56PS6S-qqKp43K_dUT9qIqQM21i9mHXjkX6Uh-Y7MJOV0fYNvO-tVPl17n5_pV1oJmGY4DLgY0TtjPb1zMS_XfQ4smpGf04EOMQ6h8ERCXHvGG5M2d68-rZ_319ZzlMKsKRPAyYsCs-Fq)**

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My friend Mikie has an announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
She’s running for Governor of New Jersey.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)

Friend, when I first entered Congress in 2019, I became close friends with a group now informally called the “badass women”— women with military and national security backgrounds, who answered the call to serve once again by running for office in 2018.
One of those incredible women is Mikie Sherrill of New Jersey.
As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, Mikie knows that in a crisis, there are only three options: **you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way.**
[**I know which one we both pick -- and that’s why I’m thrilled to share that Mikie Sherrill is officially running for Governor of New Jersey. friend, will you split a contribution between Mikie and me to become a Founding Donor of her campaign for New Jersey?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.JNPPB5&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=2&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Elissa Slotkin and Mikie Sherrill:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.mkyVLj&amount=3&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=21&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.HJsea2&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=22&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.uGnX8U&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=23&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.sPv5ZP&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=24&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.F14CsB&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=25&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.mkyVLj&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=26&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)**
---
****
I can tell you first-hand that Mikie fights every day for the people of New Jersey.
In the House, she’s always looking for ways to make life more affordable for New Jerseyans -- taking on issues like health care, the cost of groceries, and child care.
And on the Armed Services committee, where we serve together, Mikie is a relentless advocate for our service members and their families.
Back when we were first running for Congress, leaders in DC told us both not to work together -- that it would somehow harm us both to share tips learned from the campaign trail, or introduce each other to our supporters.
But Mikie and I both know from a life of service that accomplishing a big mission requires a big, dedicated team.
Now, she’s announcing her candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey.
[**So friend, I’m asking you to join Mikie’s team. Will you help us make the first days of her campaign as strong as possible by splitting a contribution of any amount?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherrill-nov24.JNPPB5&refcode=em241119-1-15&t=27&akid=2208%2E135344%2Eh15KE1)

name: Adam Gray
subject: Count every vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District

| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. [Will you split a donation between our recount fund and UNITEDemocrats today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97349287/513127525/281639194?amount=3&refcode=UD_20241119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMGRiYjYxLWNiYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QS9ONK0_re3cRrGnkN7hI4hZDGGx6LbK91NBhYIkoCk=) | **[DONATE $3 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97349288/513127526/281639194?amount=3&refcode=UD_20241119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMGRiYjYxLWNiYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QS9ONK0_re3cRrGnkN7hI4hZDGGx6LbK91NBhYIkoCk=)**
---
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**

[This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $3 or more between our recount fund and UNITEDemocrats. clean_body: My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District | My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is still too close to call and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. = | = I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly. I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one. As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support. Let’s finish the job. name: Urgent Message from House Republicans
subject: We couldn’t have done it without your support, Fellow American!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are reaching out to our most trusted patriots with an important election update.
Urgent Message from House Republicans

|
---
| | |
**🚨OFFICIAL UPDATE FROM HOUSE GOP🚨**

_We are reaching out to our most trusted patriots with an important election update. _

**Friend, because of your support, we were able to secure a GOP House Majority! **

This completes a historic GOP Majority trifecta that will help keep the Radical Left away from power for years to come. _Now, Trump 's House Majority can get started on making sure that our MAGA agenda isn't halted by the Democrats!_

But we can't afford to take our foot off the gas, Friend. We **MUST** start Trump's House Majority on the right foot & show the Left that we aren't going to be bullied by their liberal agenda!

---
| | | [CHIP IN TO SUPPORT TRUMP'S MAJORITY](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6d1b6fb279ca4abaa959fd753c154416&_e=WRTDfEw7x65zOJTMU8c_GynlbR14KUWPfPzg4uBled_gukz4sb6OyVTIr7TgDYOReG3k7bYWM-cCbBtn6DyXxiZ1QnnC6H15TVtJxHbdBNvn84G0GCEIqxO-MpgZVYXk_FSXvC3XA0RPq8xW_KNIkI0oFpqU0xLIN3KkA5IrPEleV1LlgEu6dqYIShlCvKeppR34_crANFx8wFUOORBOFchNYc2-dpQBg0jwDqrnGQjDYMOAUGdEMSXPIdVEcBmzqZ1l68JGR0AxlbXIz3umeYHlOoGMC-Rsr7aOf_vzFlnNIc8KkffMGZwHyQFO7owfLPaeg5QaKyWGC3dLAf7-d1Gw0EofGtT15JHV50QyPtGbpiV51VpWgnxqIpXnVxoevgjtRje17T54Q2X8RF4Jgsxb8_kI_Q0I8A5rxx5dKPo%3D "Generic Button")

subject: our success at the state-level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Despite a tough election year, we’re recognizing the Emerge women who will be heading to state capitals to defend democracy.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97349452/513128156/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3ZmFkMjhmLWNjYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeZtcOSm9NG1rX0BuIoaPmxXM3hgXlKhXyHm65INGiM=)

| Peter,

Despite a tough election year, we’re recognizing the Emerge women who will be heading to state capitals to defend democracy. Emerge women are transforming every level of government – **70%** of Emerge’s state legislative candidates have won their elections so far, and this was only possible with your support.
---
| [MATCH MY CONTRIBUTION ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97349453/513128157/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3ZmFkMjhmLWNjYTYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeZtcOSm9NG1rX0BuIoaPmxXM3hgXlKhXyHm65INGiM=)
---
✅ In Pennsylvania and Wisconsin, **13 Emerge** **alums** and **10 Emerge alums** , were elected and re-elected to seats in the state legislatures respectively.

✅ In Nevada, **Hanadi Nadeem** won her race for Assembly District 34 and will be the first Muslim woman in the Nevada Legislature.

✅ In New Mexico, **Cindy Nava** won her bid for the State Senate in the 9th District and became one of the first former DACA recipients to win public office.

✅ In Virginia, two Emerge alums, **Alyia Gaskins** **from Alexandria and Michelle Davis-Younger from Manassas,** won their Mayoral elections. Gaskins will be the first Black woman mayor of Alexandria and all five Northern Virginia cities (Alexandria, Manassas Park, Manassas, Falls Church, and Fairfax) will be led by women for the first time.

Thanks to you and your support, there is no other organization in Democratic politics that is consistently successful in getting women into office – year after year. This is what Emerge does best – and our work is just getting started as we’re ramping up our efforts to recruit and train our new class of Democratic women.

**_A generous donor offered to match contributions – dollar for dollar – up to $50,000 through the end of the year!_[_Will you contribute today to celebrate with us and help us kick off the 2025 recruitment season strong? name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6127408b69e542428e4c8a8a0765fc12&_e=Xy-lQGY0n_9yYo0s4lUNVIktNDyRwVI3L9iWmbvFzuBud6uX9k2KFOYsXlLPgy2XbMWcpyvE_O1U9svHv-wv4Ftqe8hCQuUX1GQnskl-LlXcn5mZ4bmhBUs_nq6khWwIOo12MAgF6swqNAHPSIF5OpchroZFRnnOx0sQd5R0cNk3FxRp6yCq3OZ3xYKDfXBoP9RSbzp3o9F6d-xlFVbMSKBMf4vLpptp5PHkHVnKWnBB8BU9lvicHF5zRToe0_kVQxDIpmsG2Q7HNEGjPxb-nCGzrHXCiXPsrO-zn_LtLnVsD4usjqiVLOVUxfdYp0p_PqrqQd-08cgVDLrXbbDtWIitmSI2u0GfAfe8jNxO1tM6s__yN775OtPyqjOrSj-jWYkgxSa1VmiHJhQzuxHbJQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6127408b69e542428e4c8a8a0765fc12&_e=Xy-lQGY0n_9yYo0s4lUNVIktNDyRwVI3L9iWmbvFzuBud6uX9k2KFOYsXlLPgy2XbMWcpyvE_O1U9svHv-wv4Ftqe8hCQuUX1GQnskl-LlXcn5mZ4bmhBUs_nq6khWwIOo12MAgF6swqNAHPSIF5OpchroZFRnnOx0sQd5R0cNk3FxRp6yCq3OZ3xYKDfXBoP9RSbzp3o9F6d-xlFVbMSKBMf4vLpptp5PHkHVnKWnBB8BU9lvicHF5zRToe0_kV2BfRyVWmqf1X_Rq4p8mAm-E9NRt5M2ddf9FD6XhSPm0QSLV52oDSR4LJvZ66ZJr2KM2CLYPLIc65PyP-G_6tlMqj5pRVwGaL5dJruPZ9aj9uFWMEZqF4CPAELNF2mbKLXz2gL5SHCo4qVFts2HB8DA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6127408b69e542428e4c8a8a0765fc12&_e=Xy-lQGY0n_9yYo0s4lUNVIktNDyRwVI3L9iWmbvFzuBud6uX9k2KFOYsXlLPgy2XbMWcpyvE_O1U9svHv-wv4Ftqe8hCQuUX1GQnskl-LlXcn5mZ4bmhBUs_nq6khWwIOo12MAgF6swqNAHPSIF5OpchroZFRnnOx0sQd5R0cNk3FxRp6yCq3OZ3xYKDfXBoP9RSbzp3o9F6d-xlFVbMSKBMf4vLpptp5PHkHVnKWnBB8BU9lvicHF5zRToe0_kVGVcxivgKW_7wxilddXSJ--jcqX64L_wDXaguxqEKGShVcQK7tHTlJIKgpXzlMdEv3_PDhMioFu8o2kvItD1r9gcMwHoOGxThE1EVZR3A_loZXf1epwtEamuWWSAH9-ZP09TLFcIsZauHg_JbXcVyRA%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6127408b69e542428e4c8a8a0765fc12&_e=Xy-lQGY0n_9yYo0s4lUNVIktNDyRwVI3L9iWmbvFzuBud6uX9k2KFOYsXlLPgy2XbMWcpyvE_O1U9svHv-wv4Ftqe8hCQuUX1GQnskl-LlXcn5mZ4bmhBUs_nq6khWwIOo12MAgF6swqNAHPSIF5OpchroZFRnnOx0sQd5R0cNk3FxRp6yCq3OZ3xYKDfXBoP9RSbzp3o9F6d-xlFVbMSKBMf4vLpptp5PHkHVnKWnBB8BU9lvicHF5zRToe0_kVpK4okjHCopfxHG_Xhn_KIzblLPilcAuKBRdOkh7Pjt7tIwpcNDdaYUxuyh7Wo3lhFIrIsfYMkY10IbZrAVb37W9D6ehi5lc5fjvOKNpiaPfxUwqqSoZhmwDJV4A_BO-uZMaAPf2Rqd1XwL4u9XAtaQ%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

name: Power the Polls
subject: [Please Respond] Poll Worker Experience Survey
body:
| We’d like to hear more about your experience – whether or not you served. _You’re receiving this email because you have expressed interest in the past about applying to be a poll worker in your community. Power the Polls is here to help connect people to their local elections offices. If you no longer wish to receive emails from Power the Polls,[_you can safely unsubscribe here_](https://act.powerthepolls.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=8838.934366.FxG1OG&t=1&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG)._
# [](https://act.powerthepolls.org/go/42?t=2&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG)
Dear Peter,** This election season, poll workers across the country helped millions of voters cast ballots and make their voices heard. Now we’d like to hear about your experience – whether or not you ended up serving as a poll worker. [**_Please complete our short survey about the poll worker process._**](https://act.powerthepolls.org/survey/2024_poll_worker_experience_survey_step_1/?t=3&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG) **Important:** By completing the survey, you’ll help Power the Polls and election officials across the country learn how we can improve the process of becoming a poll worker to support elections. [Please complete the survey today](https://act.powerthepolls.org/survey/2024_poll_worker_experience_survey_step_1/?t=4&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG)** _Your responses will be kept confidential._ Thank you for being a part of Power the Polls. People like you help make our elections strong! —The Power the Polls Team P.S. We’re giving away 10 poll worker sticker packs! [**_Submit the survey now for a chance to win._**](https://act.powerthepolls.org/survey/2024_poll_worker_experience_survey_step_1/?t=5&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG) [](https://act.powerthepolls.org/survey/2024_poll_worker_experience_survey_step_1/?t=6&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG)
---
* * *
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Power the Polls' mailing list. [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://act.powerthepolls.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?ak_proof=1&akid=8838.934366.FxG1OG&t=7&akid=8838%2E934366%2EFxG1OG) If you have any questions, please contact us at [info@powerthepolls.org](mailto:info@powerthepolls.org) and a member of our team will be in touch.

You’re receiving this email because you have expressed interest in the past about applying to be a poll worker in your community. Power the Polls is here to help connect people to their local elections offices. If you no longer wish to receive emails from Power the Polls,. Dear Peter, This election season, poll workers across the country helped millions of voters cast ballots and make their voices heard. Now we’d like to hear about your experience – whether or not you ended up serving as a poll worker. Important: By completing the survey, you’ll help Power the Polls and election officials across the country learn how we can improve the process of becoming a poll worker to support elections. Your responses will be kept confidential. Thank you for being a part of Power the Polls. People like you help make our elections strong! —The Power the Polls Team P.S. We’re giving away 10 poll worker sticker packs! *

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Our folks aren't tuning out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1011?refcode=email-20241119_v&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Politico
just ran a feature that said the resistance is “tuning out.” We couldn’t
disagree more!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20521?t=1060&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ][IMG]

The REAL resistance is as tuned in as ever, even if Democratic Party
elites are tuning out.

While CNN and MSNBC report losing HALF of their viewership post-election,
our folks are energized to battle Trump and use this moment of change to
forge a more democratic party.

If you’re ready to fight back against Trump’s right-wing extremism and
organize for party leadership that rejects the billionaire class and
centers progressive economic policies — then we need your help right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Can you chip in to help fund our fights ahead? The process for a new party
chair is already underway and we must mount a resistance to stop Senate
confirmation of Trump’s worst cabinet picks.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Media figures on cable news and high-ranking officials in the Democratic
Party might be tuning out, but for the people living paycheck to paycheck,
relying on social safety net programs like Social Security, Medicare and
Medicaid, with kids in public schools, seeing their rent, insurance, and
childcare payments skyrocket — we cannot afford to just sit back and watch
the next four years happen.

As Bernie said shortly after the election, “While the Democratic Party
leadership defends the status quo, the American people are angry and want
change.”

It’s on us right now to strategize as a grassroots progressive movement
and chart a path forward. We must fight Trumpism and the billionaire
class. We must prevent the wholesale privatization of government services
and stop more tax cuts for the rich. We must build for a future where
Democrats embrace the economic and social issues that make a winning
coalition AND a material difference in the lives of the American people.

We must continue fighting. And in order to do that, we need grassroots
donations from all of our supporters who refuse to simply “tune out.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241119nd&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Your donation today will ensure our team is at the table and mobilized
over these next few weeks — when they think (and hope) we will be tuning
out.

Thank you,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy ]GIVE ONCE

http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7268%2E5885482%2EuHomIy

name: Georgia HQ
subject: Congratulations, Lucy McBath!
