Peter, it’s official: Rep. Lucy McBath, Congresswoman for Georgia’s 6th district, has won re-election!
Since the tragic death of her son at the hands of senseless gun violence in 2012, Lucy McBath has fought relentlessly to ensure no parent has to undergo that same pain.
She championed legislation stipulating universal background checks for all gun sales and Red Flag Laws to limit access to firearms for those who are potentially dangerous, both of which passed the House.
We couldn’t be prouder to have Rep. McBath representing the Peach State for another term, and we’re excited to see what we can accomplish together in the next two years.
[Sign our card to congratulate Rep. McBath on delivering another key victory for Georgia Democrats now! →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97349748/513129289/391608945?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111924_1_1_McBath&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjRkMDYzZC1jZWE2LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pzia_ZEHDeDJCRBROpA4aDH5MoYxh3jCrvhwV1QnQfU=&emci=eb4d063d-cea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=ef4d063d-cea6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=43566853)

_**FAUCI PROSECUTED?
**_
Elon Musk just dropped a _**BOMBSHELL.**_

_**JUST RECENTLY ON X**_ , Elon Musk called for Dr.Fauci to be publicly _**PROSECUTED**_ for his handling of the _**COVID-19**_ pandemic.

__**This. Is. HUGE!
**__
For _**FOUR YEARS**_ , Joe Biden and the Radical Left took Fauci’s word as _**LAW.**_

They defended him when his _**DRACONIAN LOCKDOWNS**_ kept _**MILLIONS**_ of Americans shut inside their homes.

They protected him when it was leaked that he _**KNEW ABOUT**_ the _**TRUE**_ purpose of the Wuhan laboratory.

__**And now is our chance to fight back.

name: Mike Pompeo, Former Secretary of State
subject: They couldn't have done it without you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
Read my full message, thanking you for your commitment.

| |
---
| | |
Hi, it's former Secretary of State and CIA Director Mike Pompeo.

As I reflect on the blessings of this election cycle, I am filled with gratitude for your unwavering support.

Your tireless efforts, generous contributions, and unshakeable enthusiasm have been instrumental in securing crucial victories for our Conservative values.**I am thrilled to report that the following candidates I endorsed have emerged victorious:**
_Burgess Owens (UT)
Roger Wicker (MS)
Tom Tiffany (WI)
Elise Stefanik (NY)
August Pfluger (TX)
Ronny Jackson (TX)
Beth Van Duyne (TX)
Randy Feenstra (IA)
Andrew Garbarino (NY)
Ashley Hinson (IA)
Warren Davidson (OH)
William Timmons (SC)
Mike Waltz (FL)
Nick LaLota (NY)
Claudia Tenney (NY)
Brian Mast (FL)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ)
Brian Fitzpatrick (PA)
Maria Salazar (FL)
Derrick Van Orden (WI)
Tim Sheehy (MT)
Pete Ricketts (NE)
Deb Fischer (NE)
Rick Scott (FL)
Jim Banks (IN)
Zach Nunn (IA)
Bernie Moreno (OH)
Young Kim (CA)_
Peter, these wins are a testament to the power of prayer, perseverance, and Patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what is right. **[Your contributions have been the lifeblood of our movement, and I am humbled to have you as a partner in this righteous cause.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=23ba2bb9023e441698cd8c841a671e86&_e=sYntXcRKCgkEjyYwoYGBP3aHOkfYdNQN_u0hHLii5aIZw567ZcLawdLQK-Z6g0HD0zR3eQM1GFoE8gcdGdaGqoygHhEs8gVHepjNYX49kQCsH_9ipzFOsBdNueuXzIw-3pLaH-b8eelpfTOY-6YGIqFimwINzWzAMUFE3um-1JT1yOjKT-vH05nZ9aiJDey0f_RInOrjNO2ZZCtdeUSSRgd5Hb_wNmzvqxE07uEbbWyFebSMAc92hc9sU5_KOlGM2lItYGnAB1r2mcO3zpCqtSbhjPOObdirqH2Y21NI8jYWZDIl3vsEkUjaUf3BhVCwww_j5UXGWofmtxuCSSJrLWV3x8mWtWue4zFIJ1KFk1zhxG6jHPh_5_FhNmx06iCdtYSSLa8jCP6WSUioxx8KrWyYTXnRzLHTIpN2U86dSdP0gsGDp-3LqOQ_Qj1LSo7g "Your contributions have been the lifeblood of our movement, and I am humbled to have you as a partner in this righteous cause.")**

But I want to share more with you about what these victories mean for our country and our movement. Please take a moment to read my full thoughts on this critical moment in our nation's history.

clean_body: Read my full message, thanking you for your commitment. | | | | | Hi, it's former Secretary of State and CIA Director Mike Pompeo. As I reflect on the blessings of this election cycle, I am filled with gratitude for your unwavering support. Your tireless efforts, generous contributions, and unshakeable enthusiasm have been instrumental in securing crucial victories for our Conservative values.I am thrilled to report that the following candidates I endorsed have emerged victorious: Burgess Owens (UT) Roger Wicker (MS) Tom Tiffany (WI) Elise Stefanik (NY) August Pfluger (TX) Ronny Jackson (TX) Beth Van Duyne (TX) Randy Feenstra (IA) Andrew Garbarino (NY) Ashley Hinson (IA) Warren Davidson (OH) William Timmons (SC) Mike Waltz (FL) Nick LaLota (NY) Claudia Tenney (NY) Brian Mast (FL) Tom Kean Jr. (NJ) Brian Fitzpatrick (PA) Maria Salazar (FL) Derrick Van Orden (WI) Tim Sheehy (MT) Pete Ricketts (NE) Deb Fischer (NE) Rick Scott (FL) Jim Banks (IN) Zach Nunn (IA) Bernie Moreno (OH) Young Kim (CA) Peter, these wins are a testament to the power of prayer, perseverance, and Patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what is right. "Your contributions have been the lifeblood of our movement, and I am humbled to have you as a partner in this righteous cause." But I want to share more with you about what these victories mean for our country and our movement. Please take a moment to read my full thoughts on this critical moment in our nation's history. | | With deepest gratitude, Mike Pompeo | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: No President Should Have this Power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Add your name to urge Congress members to oppose this bill. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW44BqMgBpCY4-95m54kyD1U3mGnVs4gsR52XxYUVBfpCNa35Qrqw5-TbIB6SVCnQ3JmLB1J3WJ-bbr2Fko0xDL4TAExESbHIod8vtd45zUKv62VGwV6g2j3IeeXvIvf6Rn33o1w-aKXgXKGGEOuYZRd2n-eP-OKjy8CU7AXCJHjA/4bl/S5majmaBRNuqKHL5ZM-EDg/h0/h001.l0aZMrJbM_Ea0zgfbCQXaA2qGBFRPhB4uL3x85fSkR4)
---
Friend, Social movements have pushed the United States to live up to its ideals of freedom and equality time and time again. We come together to make this country better for all, which is why dissent is patriotic. But this week, the U.S. House of Representatives will vote on a bill that would hand Donald Trump authoritarian powers to silence dissent. Known as the “Non-profit Killer” bill, HR 9495 would give Trump’s Treasury Secretary the ability to strip any non-profit organization of its tax-exempt status by labeling them as “terrorist-affiliated,” without any evidence or opportunity for the organization to respond. This is the first step in enabling Trump to attack those who he perceives as political enemies. If signed into law it would be disastrous for our social movements, our right to free speech, and our democracy. The first time this bill came up in the House last week, it failed because it needed a 2/3 majority to pass. However, now House Republicans are bringing it up again this week for another vote, which only needs a simple majority (over 50%) to pass. We urgently need every Democrat to stand in opposition now. [**Add your name to demand Congresspeople vote against HR 9495, which would allow Trump to target any non-profit organization that opposes his racist, inhumane agenda.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmjTXZ8AXdhudgfDJjHIZ8Ye5hJ2ixw-DDU7CPuQPhj2NZjzG7AVGQbXueMCbYr3nagxVxsYVex-D3sTMh0Dm5-yulwRJKcOjqm-nH0IafRGregmoMzoz0YIaBcw355NQU3AW9HE0gQBFpNfxpfazASAKRZFGLR5TKYUjhxd2-TJ3nmB45l2Xirwh_4SyIha1F_MBYPcLGcyNclZgeyzrc2qeccGbZJ6_gdjrneUcNAqoBzihD4DNreIAA_g6lvRN9qV15pSeQhWc4UdmRIhVUlc93jFznOps6NR1KV-WwuCWpwRaBjlD8lIiqCFF5-FHU/4bl/S5majmaBRNuqKHL5ZM-EDg/h1/h001.cNZgAFp8OCbkYYmnQEgwqeaoIJhX8XJ3uWd_Sik9Bfg) | [TAKE ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmjTXZ8AXdhudgfDJjHIZ8Ye5hJ2ixw-DDU7CPuQPhj2NZjzG7AVGQbXueMCbYr3na1ua9cJxmEl-7Iy0nfTQF0vDeTz449mSZSyPhPmYIKcuEV-0MrBvl4IlQJp-z9n1_Nf0G46HTJ4SyJuq37U7w-jDZwV0wjqriZ-U2O70xC6IagJrmro8Bos2cHMz0vH9L82Tknh5GHP_k7Xr2CFL3eNt5cg8ewDfpOKCMpxoolqgQxF_etsoimxfzmM6VwCKyd7xh9kpfovaMou81bBEwBsRYK6SmfHhDJxWHUf9X6hvmAumyj8uKVqjS8MLraIkf/4bl/S5majmaBRNuqKHL5ZM-EDg/h2/h001.378T5VirNzEHmKKIAgf7CeInmjjVlyLoQCWk0FDmigQ)

Trump said repeatedly on the campaign trail that he would target his political opponents if elected. Just as he plans to dismantle aspects of the federal government like the Department of Education, he will use his executive powers to go after political rivals and groups that he doesn’t like.
**Take a stand against Trump’s mass deportation policy?** _He’ll label you as a terrorist._
**Opposed to U.S. tax dollars supporting war crimes?** _He’ll label you as a terrorist._
**Don’t want Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” to cut Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid?** _Trump will label you as a terrorist._
In order to get to the world we deserve, we need progressive groups to keep fighting and win. Each month we give you the opportunity to support impactful non-profit organizations doing important work in our communities, from defending our rights to bringing about social justice to providing humanitarian aid and more.
Any one of these groups could be in jeopardy of losing their non-profit status if Trump’s Treasury Department is given unilateral authority to label them as “terrorist-affiliated.”
[**Add your name now to tell Democrats to oppose this dangerous bill.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmjTXZ8AXdhudgfDJjHIZ8Ye5hJ2ixw-DDU7CPuQPhj2NZjzG7AVGQbXueMCbYr3naQvJJWdIR80TuhwTWJ9x8JwaNJmcrw5B7soufgdNcUyoAfMdV-b-Ni9XTh1B3l5tIONwOj_eW209qesKxjvohPg8cfgscmW9NwuNbSiMJuZydgp2C01QxxbbY3pFcHjFotGjEAdSVkDekuZ5uz4FjiBtz_lZEO6wp4-zEZ4fA9NRjBvAGZ16qyCsaX_VXuYRSUIiuKge89aCkePhLFXUsGHA1kZfa14qIxY99QsGbxGinyqfJuDzetnebi8zeO9_g/4bl/S5majmaBRNuqKHL5ZM-EDg/h3/h001.Uah9JnTNoSbADO1zfGP9J_u79v2GG-YSRZrlXwORImc)
Together, we will keep speaking truth to power and standing up to those who seek to silence us.
In solidarity,
Rashida

The first time this bill came up in the House last week, it failed because it needed a 2/3 majority to pass. However, now House Republicans are bringing it up again this week for another vote, which only needs a simple majority (over 50%) to pass. We urgently need every Democrat to stand in opposition now. | Trump said repeatedly on the campaign trail that he would target his political opponents if elected. Just as he plans to dismantle aspects of the federal government like the Department of Education, he will use his executive powers to go after political rivals and groups that he doesn’t like. Take a stand against Trump’s mass deportation policy? He’ll label you as a terrorist. Opposed to U.S. tax dollars supporting war crimes? He’ll label you as a terrorist. Don’t want Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” to cut Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid? Trump will label you as a terrorist. In order to get to the world we deserve, we need progressive groups to keep fighting and win. Each month we give you the opportunity to support impactful non-profit organizations doing important work in our communities, from defending our rights to bringing about social justice to providing humanitarian aid and more. Any one of these groups could be in jeopardy of losing their non-profit status if Trump’s Treasury Department is given unilateral authority to label them as “terrorist-affiliated.” Together, we will keep speaking truth to power and standing up to those who seek to silence us. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Amanda Chase
subject: BREAKING NEWS Details for the Senate District Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | | SPECIAL ELECTION TO BE HELD
WHEN? TUES, DEC 12, 2024
WHERE? to be determined
---
---
| Well folks, I finally have some news for you.
Tonight, the Senate District 10 Committee chose to have a Republican Mass Meeting on Thursday, November 22 with registration beginning at 5:30pm, with only those in line by 6:30pm being eligible to vote.
My concern is that most working people will be driving home from work on a weekday and unable to participate in the Special Election.
It was brought to my attention that many of the hunters in Senate District 10 did not want a Special Election on Saturdays, because that's when they hunt.
While I am all for hunters, I believe we should adopt a firehouse primary on a Saturday like they did in Loudoun County in the 32nd district. That seemed to work and they already have their candidate.
The Senate 10 District Committee chose a Republican Mass meeting instead of a Firehouse primary. So now, instead of simply casting your vote and then leaving, you have to stick around until your candidate wins with 50 percent plus one.
With 6 candidates in the race, this is going to take awhile, folks.
My experience is that most of these mass meetings last hours, unless a candidate wins on the first ballot.
Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way?
Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years.
I truly hope this committee has a change of heart.
As of tonight, they didn't have a location for us to publish so that we could get the word out to you.
They are going to have a 2nd meeting on Tuesday, November 26 at 6pm at the Goochland County Administration Building.
I truly hope Republican leadership intervenes before we have hundreds of people try to participate in the process and instead are turned away. We need to avoid that at all cost. We want to grow the Republican Party.
This is exactly why I voted to make these confusing party processes that limit voter participation and frustrate voters illegal. I was successful. Effective this past July, these practices were made illegal with the exception of Special Elections.
The Senate District 10 Committee chose a Republican Mass Meeting. This is similar to the Republican Convention that many of you participated in 2023, only there are no speeches and you don't have to fill out and turn in paperwork to participate in voting. You must simply be a registered voter.
The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory.
You may want to pack some snacks, water and even a lunch. It's such a small price to pay for our freedom.
My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. So please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly.
Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County.
As many of you know, I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections.
---
|
---
We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December.
If you would like to vote for me, you:
1. Must live in Senate District 10
2. Be a registered voter
3. Be willing to drive to the voting location which is centrally located in Senate District 10.
4. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting.
5. Just bring your driver's license to vote.

---

name: Powered By People
subject: We need your help to spread the word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Have you seen the news?
DACA recipients are eligible for health insurance under the Affordable Care Act for the first time!
**[You can help get the word out by sharing a resource guide from the National Immigration Law Center](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63847?t=1&akid=239900%2E444211%2Egjnfmg)** with your friends, family or anyone who is a recipient of DACA and is looking to enroll in health care coverage under the Affordable Care Act (also known as Obamacare).
**[Read+Share NILC’s Guide](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63847?t=2&akid=239900%2E444211%2Egjnfmg)**
Health care is a human right. Every single person should have access to affordable and high-quality health care.
Thank you for your time,
Team Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20241119-239900-footer&t=3&refcode2=239900_444211_gjnfmg&akid=239900%2E444211%2Egjnfmg)**

subject: The GOP’s anti-trans bill and how to fight back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This anti-trans bill is specifically targeted at Sarah McBride.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241119-2&t=1&akid=1458%2E587540%2El5uVbK)
We wanted to make sure you saw the news that broke overnight, Peter:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241119-2?refcode=em20241119-1458&amount=5&refcode2=1458_587540_l5uVbK&akid=1458%2E587540%2El5uVbK)
**Rep. Nancy Mace, an extreme MAGA Republican from South Carolina, just introduced a bill to ban transgender women from using Capitol bathrooms.**
This anti-trans bill is specifically targeted at Sarah McBride, the first transgender member of Congress who Leaders We Deserve helped elect just two weeks ago.
**[Now more than ever, we need to stand with Sarah McBride and show the GOP we won’t back down when it comes to equal rights for LGBTQ+ people. Split a $5 donation between Sarah McBride and Leaders We Deserve right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241119-2?refcode=em20241119-1458&amount=5&refcode2=1458_587540_l5uVbK&akid=1458%2E587540%2El5uVbK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241119-2?amount=5&refcode=em20241119-1458&refcode2=1458_587540_l5uVbK&akid=1458%2E587540%2El5uVbK)**
Sadly, this moment was somewhat expected given the current state of the MAGA GOP. In an election where right-wing extremists were animated by hatred of trans people, it’s no great surprise that Trump’s loyalists are personally attacking Sarah.
Peter, MAGA Republicans have no real plans and no meaningful solutions to the problems that the American people are facing today. The only promises these professional provocateurs offer are manufactured culture wars fueled by hatred.
Sarah McBride is a fearless warrior who will never stop fighting for the people of Delaware. She will not be deterred by the extremists or their personal attacks. But she hasn’t even been sworn in yet, and the GOP is already circling with pitchforks.
**[Today, we need to show Sarah – and the MAGA lowlifes who are attacking her – that we have her back. Can you split a $5 contribution to join the fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241119-2?refcode=em20241119-1458&amount=5&refcode2=1458_587540_l5uVbK&akid=1458%2E587540%2El5uVbK)**
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
